So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Product Designer
description:
Mentimeter is an engagement tool with a clear goal in mind. To turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we get people to participate, engage and become more productive. Transforming all those passive meetings, airless classrooms and drawn out trainings into valuable and memorable moments.
   

  

 We truly believe that you achieve the best results by doing things together. And that successful leaders need to adopt a curious and collaborative mindset in order to get there. So with you at Mentimeter, you’ll be a big part of the ambition to help over 1 billion people listen, learn and work better together.
   

  

 We are looking for a Product Designer to join the Capabilities area, working across our Payments and Identity teams. In this role, you will help us deliver two user- and business-critical experiences in Mentimeter.
   

  

 You will contribute to a seamless payment experience that powers reliable billing, enables strategic pricing, and supports the full subscription lifecycle from first purchase, through expansion, up to renewal.
   

  

 You will also design and shape secure, seamless sign-up and login experiences for all Menti users, from first-time free users to paying Enterprise customers. The goal is to create a trusted, adaptable, and intuitive identity experience that minimizes friction.
   

  

 You will join a multidisciplinary group of engineers and designers, partnering closely with Product, Data, Sales, Support, and other product teams. Together, you will make flows feel simple and consistent, while meeting the reliability and security expectations of modern SaaS and enterprise products.
   

  

 Your work will shape how customers buy, manage, and renew Mentimeter, and how users and organizations sign up, log in, and administer access with confidence. These are high-impact, high-trust areas where clarity, quality, and thoughtful UX matter deeply. Strong design in this area powers the business and enables teams across the product to move faster.
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
 You are a product designer who blends user-centered craft with systems thinking, and you enjoy working on core problems that show up across multiple user journeys. You can turn complex constraints such as compliance, security, technical dependencies, edge cases, and pricing rules into experiences that feel clear, predictable, and trustworthy. You collaborate closely with engineers and product managers, and you use qualitative and quantitative insight to guide iteration and prioritize impact.
   

  

 Most importantly, you care about reducing friction and making experiences better. Your designs earn trust and scale, and you create business impact by putting the customer and end user experience front and center.
   

  

**In This Role You Will**
* Design and improve end-to-end flows across Payments and Identity, including core journeys, edge cases, error states, recovery patterns, and admin workflows.
* Optimize and experiment on the subscription and billing experience, and drive self-service impact by reducing friction and increasing clarity across moments like checkout, billing, invoicing, renewals, cancellations, and plan management.
* Enable secure, seamless identity across Mentimeter by shaping flows and patterns around sign-up and login, account management, and enterprise identity expectations. Keep the experience frictionless while meeting security requirements.
* Collaborate closely with engineering, Sales Engineering, and product to explore solution spaces, align on constraints, and ship iteratively. Balance speed, quality, and long-term scalability.
* Create reusable patterns and guidance so other product teams can implement payments and identity experiences consistently and confidently.
* Partner with key stakeholders to ensure designs support enterprise needs and compliance without compromising usability.
* Use data and feedback to drive improvement, leveraging product analytics, support insights, and customer learnings to prioritize work and evaluate outcomes.
* Contribute to cohesive product quality by aligning with our design language, accessibility standards, and interaction principles across different touchpoints.


**Requirements**
* 3+ years of experience in product design (UX and UI) working on digital products. SaaS experience is a plus.
* Proven ability to design complex, multi-step flows with attention to states, edge cases, and clear communication.
* Strong fundamentals in interaction design, information architecture, accessibility, and visual craft.
* Experience collaborating cross-functionally with engineering and product, including navigating constraints and making pragmatic trade-offs.
* Comfort using qualitative and quantitative methods for user insight, such as UX research, analytics, and support signals, to inform design decisions.
* Strong communication skills, including explaining rationale, aligning stakeholders, and documenting decisions when needed.
* A portfolio that demonstrates your process and impact end-to-end.


**Nice to have**
* Experience in payments, billing, subscriptions, pricing, checkout optimization, and/or working with Stripe.
* Exposure to identity and security-adjacent domains such as authentication, organization and admin experiences, permissions, and enterprise requirements.
* Experience contributing to a design system or scalable pattern library.


**What Mentimeter Can Offer**
 At Mentimeter we can offer a diverse and inclusive work environment supported by smart and driven colleagues. We believe in continuous professional development for all of our colleagues and therefore offer access to a leadership program (including external personal coach) and relevant education to ensure that we continue to be state-of-the-art when it comes to innovating and building Mentimeter. Your place will be in a growing company with lots of career opportunities, working on a beloved product used by more than 300 million people. It’s not all about work though, we also offer a very healthy view on work-life balance.
   

  

 All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package, including pension contributions. Learn more about our benefits by visiting our Benefits & Perks page
   

  

**AI and Hiring at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter, we believe AI helps us work smarter - but it never replaces the human assessment, curiosity, and personal connection that define our culture and our hiring. We use AI as a sparring partner: to bounce ideas, bring new perspectives, support structure, and make our work more efficient. But the meaning, decisions, and interactions always come from people.
   

  

* AI does not screen or decide on candidates.
* There is no automated filtering, ranking, or decision-making in our recruitment process. Every application is reviewed by a person.
* Hiring teams may use AI to support their work - for example, to structure notes, prepare interview questions, or organize their thinking.


 AI strengthens our work, but it does not define it. At Mentimeter, we’re not building an AI-driven hiring process - we’re building a people-first culture, where technology helps us listen, learn, and grow together.
   

  

**Culture at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter we believe in giving everyone a voice - regardless of who you are. So we build a platform that does just that. Our platform is not only our product but also our organization. A platform where people feel safe, where differences are embraced, a place where you can have fun. We strongly encourage applicants who are people of color, LGBTQ+, women, people with disabilities, and/or formerly incarcerated people, and a college degree is not strictly required. In order to give everyone a voice, we need to be as diverse as our users.
   

  

 Learn more about our culture by visiting our Culture page.
   

  

 Review our Privacy Policy for more information.

title: Senior User Researcher
description:
*The world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service is looking for a Senior User Researcher to join the band in a consultant assignment. The client has transformed music listening forever when launched in 2008.* 




  





***Period:***
*ASAP, 12 months (full-time), with potential extension to 18 months.* 




  





**About the role** 




 Delivering the best client experience, everywhere and every time. Our client is seeking a Senior User Researcher to join the CoreX team on a fixed-term basis, providing senior research capacity across high-priority company bets. This is an opportunity to contribute to some of our client's most consequential product work - bringing deep research craft, strong judgment, and the ability to hit the ground running in a fast-moving team.
 



 In this role, you will work across high priority company bets within the mobile experience where research capacity is needed most. You'll be expected to operate with a high degree of autonomy, bringing structure to ambiguous problems and delivering insights that shape product direction.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Define, plan, and conduct research across mobile experience initiatives, covering the full range of methods from generative to evaluative
* Deliver evidence-based insights that guide product strategy and UX direction in fast-moving, high-stakes bets
* Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Design, Data Science, and Engineering to ensure work is human-centred and grounded in real user needs
* Represent research with senior stakeholders - bringing findings to life through clear storytelling, workshops, and live discussion
* Synthesise across projects where relevant, connecting insights to build a coherent picture of user needs
* Contribute to the health and capability of the broader UR team



  





**Who you are** 



* An expert researcher with extensive industry experience and a degree or equivalent in Human-Computer Interaction, Cognitive Psychology, or a Social Science
* Comfortable adapting quickly to shifting workflows as AI UR capabilities increase and improve
* Skilled across a wide range of User Research methods - ethnography, contextual inquiry, usability testing, concept testing - and comfortable blending them with quantitative or behavioural data
* Able to hit the ground running in a new environment, quickly building context and trust with cross-functional partners
* Comfortable navigating ambiguity and breaking down unstructured challenges into actionable learning plans
* An excellent communicator, confident with senior audiences and at ease in dynamic discussion, debate, and live reasoning
* A strong systems thinker with deep UX expertise, able to influence scalable, cohesive experiences



  





**We are Market Partner** 




*Market Partner is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome to our community regardless of who you are, no matter where you come from, or what you look like. We apply ongoing selection and may fill the position as soon as we find the right candidate.*

title: UX Research Lead
description:
**Are you a research leader who turns user insight into meaningful business direction?**
 Do you want to shape how Podme understands its users, what they need, where things break, and how their everyday experiences can work better?
   

  

 Then this might be the role for you.
   

  

 As a part of our vision to enrich people’s lives through stories, we’re expanding our user research capabilities in Stockholm to help us continuously improve end-to-end user experiences, ensuring they are intuitive, valuable, and worth coming back to.
   

  

 This is a great opportunity to grow your impact at a fast-moving company backed by Schibsted Media, and to work in a team that combines strong engineering with product thinking.
   

  

**About This Position**
 You will play a key role in shaping how Podme understands its users and turns that understanding into better product decisions and experiences.
   

  

 This is not a traditional research role focused on tactical design validation.
   

  

**As UX Research Lead, You Will**
* Help the organization see users more clearly
* Lead proactive, strategic research initiatives that influence product direction
* Identify the problems worth solving before solutions exist
* Build a continuous learning system that identifies friction, unmet needs, and growth opportunities
* Make research a driver of strategy
* You will work closely with Product, Design, Data, and leadership – not as a service function, but as a decision partner


**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead Strategic User Research
* Define and drive a strategic research agenda aligned with Podme’s strategic direction
* Identify and prioritize key knowledge gaps across the user lifecycle
* Translate behavioral patterns into clear problem framing and opportunity spaces
* Ensure research informs bet selection, not just evaluation
* Build a Continuous Learning System
* Establish proactive, ongoing research practices
* Ensure continuous understanding of:
+ Where users drop off
+ What strengthens or breaks habits
+ How discovery influences engagement
+ What differentiates retained vs churned users

* Drive Research-Led Product Development
* Embed research into product leaderships planning cycles
* Ensure every major initiative starts with a validated behavioral hypothesis
* Strengthen the organization’s ability to:
+ Frame problems before solutions
+ Validate assumptions early
+ Measure real behavior change

* Elevate Insight Quality and Impact
* Combine qualitative research, behavioral data, and AI-assisted synthesis to generate deep, actionable insights
* Ensure insights are:
+ Clear
+ Prioritized
+ Connected to desired business outcomes

* Improve how insights are communicated and used across the organization
* Develop Research Capability & Culture
* Build and evolve research practices, frameworks, and standards
* Coach designers, PMs, and teams in research thinking and user-centric decision making
* Contribute to a culture where:
+ Learning is continuous
+ Assumptions are challenged
+ User understanding drives strategy

* Be the Voice of the User at Leadership Level
* Represent user needs and insights in strategic discussions
* Ensure trade-offs are evaluated against long-term user value and retention
* Act as a key partner to Product, Design, and Data leadership


 The UX Researcher Lead reports to the UX Manager at Podme.
   

  

**What Success Looks Like In This Role**
* Research shapes what we build, not just how we validate it
* Product decisions are grounded in clear behavioral insights
* We identify growth constraints before they impact metrics
* Learning velocity increases across teams
* More of the roadmap is driven by validated user problems


**Qualifications/Who You Are**
* You have deep experience in user research, including exploratory and strategic work
* You’ve influenced stakeholders product direction, not just usability improvements
* You know how to turn messy human behavior into clear, actionable insights
* You’re comfortable working across disciplines and challenging thinking when needed
* You care about impact over output
* You are fluent in Swedish and have a good understanding of Norwegian, enabling you to work effectively with user insights across our core markets


**Bonus Skills**
* Experience in subscription products or retention-driven businesses
* Experience working with AI-assisted research or data synthesis
* Background in media, content platforms, or recommendation systems
* Experience scaling research in multi-market environments


**Who We Are**
 Podme is the place for premium podcasts and audiobooks. With over 350,000 paying subscribers, we’re available in Sweden, Norway, and Finland, and part of Schibsted Media since 2021.
   

  

 Our vision is to enrich people’s lives through stories, which embodies our core belief in the power of narratives to bring joy, meaning, and connection to individuals. We strive to create effortless and habit-forming audio and product experiences that resonate with the listener and add value in their everyday lives.
   

  

 We’re a friendly and passionate team of +80 people, here to make listening effortless, inspiring, and part of everyday life. Backed by Schibsted Media, the largest media group in Scandinavia, we are now on a growth journey which requires us to strengthen (example: the data-driven excellence in our company.)

title: Digital Marketing and Communications Trainee, Autumn 2026
description:
As a trainee at Curious Mind, you will work side by side with experienced consultants and sharpen your skills in digital content for different channels. Our workdays are anything but predictable. One day you are shaping a brand’s tone of voice, the next you are supporting a client workshop full of new ideas.
   

  

 To enjoy life as a consultant, you need to appreciate variety — because it’s that constant change that makes the work so rewarding.
   

  

**What we do**
 Curious Mind is a Nordic content partner with global reach. We work with a broad range of clients across a wide spectrum of strategic and operational engagements, including website maintenance and CMS migrations, Content prompt engineering, CRM content, UX writing, project coordination, and sustainability reporting.
   

  

 Want to know more about us? Head over to curiousmind.se and explore.
   

  

**What you can expect as a trainee at Curious Mind**
* A mentor, senior advisors, and a whole team of curious consultants ready to support you every step of the way.
* The chance to create sharp, relevant content in different projects — we always aim to find real client assignments for our trainees.
* The opportunity to grow your skills as a consultant: navigating clients, managing stakeholders, and creating real value.
* A culture built on feedback, coaching, and shared growth.
* A global network of experts in digital communication and transformation through Eidra.


**Who we think you are**
* You are at the end of your studies within media, communication, digital marketing, or a similar field.
* You have an internship, LIA, or trainee period coming up.
* You speak both Swedish and English fluently and have a passion for writing.
* You have a curious mindset and want to know more about what it really means to work as a content consultant.
* You are a communicative problem solver and you’re not afraid to ask for help and support when needed.
* Whether it’s AI, smart tools, or structured thinking, you see technology as a way to fuel your creativity.


 Questions? Reach out to Amanda Jernberg at amanda.jernberg@curiousmind.se.
   

  

 Don’t hesitate to apply — interviews are held continuously and spots fill up quickly.
   

  

 Curious Mind is a Nordic content partner with a global reach, fueled by curiosity. Our team of around 50 content consultants helps brands across the Nordics grow through digital communication, with impact that travels far beyond our borders.
   

  

 We’re proud to be part of Eidra, a carefully selected group of specialist companies. While we each have our own craft, we’re united by a shared ambition: to help our clients become leaders in their fields.
   

  

 Our modern offices in the heart of Stockholm are home to a vibrant community, where we work side by side with our sister agencies.

title: Product Manager - R&D
description:
This role is a part of the R&D team at Avalanche Studios Group. This department has a singular focus: finding the next big thing! We do this by building prototypes and quickly testing them with real players.
   

  

 As a Product Manager in the R&D team at Avalanche Studios Group, your role is to lead and evolve the Playtesting Program that allows us to quickly test early game prototypes with external players. This role is key to our efforts of testing game ideas with real players often and early. You will focus on scaling the program to the next level, ensuring we can validate concepts effectively very early in development.
   

  

**The Position**
 As the Product Manager, you will take holistic ownership of the Playtesting Program. Your primary focus will be to define and execute the program's overall strategy and expansion. This includes cultivating a thriving ecosystem of playtesters and ensuring robust testing capabilities. The goal is to assess product-market fit and inform decisions about a prototype's future development. Furthermore, you will actively build out our internal capabilities for evaluating and testing ideas sourced from external partners.
   

  

 You will report to the Product Director, R&D. This on-site role is based in our Stockholm office, with the opportunity to work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Program Strategy & Expansion: Developing and refining the Playtesting Program strategy to scale effectively, including expanding its scope to incorporate external partners.
* Execution & Collaboration: Ensure the successful execution of playtests, working closely with User Research, the Community Manager, and development teams.
* Performance & Evaluation: Defining, tracking, and driving efforts to meet key success metrics related to playtester engagement and growth. Regularly evaluating the program to identify and implement improvements that support large-scale operation.


**Who You Are**
* Entrepreneurial and Proactive: Comfortable initiating and managing change with an entrepreneurial mindset.
* Proven Experience: Experienced in scaling products and/or services within the tech industry, preferably within gaming. This includes coaching internal support teams, as well as directing external agencies.
* Strong Communicator: Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, as well as strong presentation skills to confidently address stakeholders at all organizational levels.
* Organized and Collaborative: Demonstrates strong project management skills and thrives as a team player within a matrixed organization.
* Product Vision and Strategy: Proven ability to translate strategic business objectives into a clear product vision and roadmap, driving innovative and impactful gaming experiences.
* Passionate about Gaming: Has a genuine passion for and actively plays video games. Stays up to date with industry trends and demonstrates an understanding of what motivates players.


 Note: Research shows under-represented groups in the industry might not apply to a job if they don’t check off every requirement. At Avalanche, we’re more about your drive to learn and interest in tackling challenges than what’s on your resume! So don’t stress if you don’t tick every box— shoot us your application anyway! Diverse opinions and different experiences are what make our teams so great, not itemized lists of qualifications.
   

  

**The Stockholm location**
 Our Stockholm office is situated in Södermalm, the beating heart of the city’s game industry. It’s a physical representation of our games – the lush vegetation of Just Cause and theHunter: Call of the Wild meets corroded metal straight out of Mad Max. Our hybrid model requires you to be in the office on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays to foster collaboration and creativity.
   

  

**Our values**
 At Avalanche Studios Group, we create worlds beyond limits. But that’s not exclusive to our games, so we’re committed to developing a diverse and inclusive workplace. All Avalanchers have a shared responsibility to create an open work environment where everyone is treated equally and respectfully. Being part of our world is not contingent on your heritage, your gender, or sexual orientation. It’s all about your passion and creativity.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 To apply for this position, please register below and provide your CV in English. We review applications continuously. All further studio-related information is provided under a non-disclosure agreement.
   

  

 At Avalanche Studios Group we're always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our passionate team, but please note that relocation assistance is not available for this role.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Art Director
description:
Plats
   

  

 Stockholm , På plats
   

  

 Upplägg
   

  

 Heltid
   

  

 Ansök senast
   

  

 Löpande rekrytering
   

  

 Som Art Director i vårt Stockholms-team får du en nyckelroll i att utveckla och förverkliga kreativa idéer som stärker våra kunders varumärken och vår egen kreativa kultur. I denna roll arbetar du nära kunder och kollegor för att skapa kommunikation som engagerar och driver affär. Du rör dig obehindrat mellan strategi och hantverk, från koncept och kampanjidéer till visuella uttryck och produktion och är nyfiken på människor, trender och ny teknik, och hittar energi i att omvandla insikter till visuellt uttryck. Du utforskar gärna hur AI och ny teknik kan inspirera till nya kreativa vägar, effektivare processer och mer innovativa kreativa lösningar. Med din kombination av kreativ höjd, affärsförståelse och känsla för detalj bidrar du till att utveckla befintliga kunder och etablera vårt erbjudande i Stockholm. Du trivs i dialogen med kunder, inspireras av nya perspektiv och vill vara med och utveckla ett erbjudande där kreativitet och affär går hand i hand.
   

  

**Ansvar**
* Utveckla och visualisera kreativa idéer och koncept som stärker kundens affär och varumärke
* Arbeta med varumärkesidentiteter, kampanjuttryck, content och digital design
* Samarbeta med strateger, copywriters, UX/UI-designers och utvecklare för att skapa helhetsupplevelser
* Delta i pitcher, kunddialoger och kreativa workshops – både som idéskapare och presentatör
* Säkerställa att det visuella uttrycket håller hög kreativ nivå, kvalitet och relevans
* Följa upp och vidareutveckla leveranser baserat på insikter och användarbeteende
* Bidra till att forma och utveckla vår kreativa kultur och arbetsprocesser i Stockholm
* Utforska nya tekniker, format och trender inom design, marknadsföring och upplevelsekommunikation


**Låter detta som något för dig?**
 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan, innehållandes CV/Linkedin och portfolio. Tillträde sker enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Din kompetens
   

  

 Du är en idérik och formstark kreatör med 8-10 års erfarenhet av att skapa koncept och kampanjer som engagerar
   

  

 Du kombinerar kreativ höjd med förståelse för strategi, varumärke och affär
   

  

 Du har god presentationsteknik och du gillar att sälja in idéer, inspirera kunder och leda workshops
   

  

 Du har god erfarenhet av kunddialoger och bygger långsiktiga relationer genom förtroende, kvalitet och energi
   

  

 Du är proaktiv och prestigelös och trivs med att arbeta i ett team som växer och formas tillsammans
   

  

 Du tar ansvar, håller struktur i ditt arbete och bidrar till teamets gemensamma leverans
   

  

 Du arbetar obehindrat i Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma och Microsoft 365
   

  

 Säkerställa att projekt bidrar till ökad lönsamhet och stärkt varumärke för Consid Communication
   

  

 Du behärskar svenska och engelska flytande, både muntligt och skriftligt
   

  

 Meriterande
   

  

 Erfarenhet av storytelling, storyboard och manus för film och sociala medier
   

  

 Förmåga att hantera enklare filmredigering, ljudläggning och animation
   

  

 Erfarenhet av större produktionsuppdrag eller varumärkesplattformar
   

  

 Du håller dig uppdaterad på trender inom design, marknadsföring och digitala kanaler
   

  

 Fördelar hos Consid
   

  

 Fantastiska kollegor
   

  

 Du får världens duktigaste, trevligaste och mest hjälpsamma kollegor.
   

  

 Kompetenshubbar
   

  

 Med kontors- och landsövergripande kompetenshubbar finns ständigt möjlighet till kompetensutbyte.
   

  

 Stora men familjära
   

  

 Kan man vara ett världsledande bolag men behålla känslan av att vara ett mindre familjärt bolag? Svaret är Consid.
   

  

 Utvecklas
   

  

 Hos oss finns möjlighet att testa det som du är intresserad av och utveckla din roll i den riktning du vill.

title: Marketing Manager (vikariat)
description:
**Om Boneo** 




 Boneo är en bostadsportal som matchar rätt köpare och säljare. Här hittar du bostäder till salu och kommande bostäder, eller På G som vi kallar dem, som i många fall publiceras först eller bara på Boneo. Dessutom matchas bostäder och nybyggnadsprojekt mot över 500 000 köpsugna personer som varit på visning av liknande bostäder just nu. Bakom Boneo står några av Sveriges största mäklarföretag – HusmanHagberg, Länsförsäkringar Fastighetsförmedling, Bjurfors, Mäklarhuset, SkandiaMäklarna, Svenska Mäklarhuset och Mäklarringen.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Vi söker efter en kreativ, engagerad och initiativrik person som kan axla rollen som vår nya, vikarierande Marketing Manager under en estimerad 14 månaders period. Rollen innebär att ansvara för Boneos kommunikation och marknadsföring, både på en strategisk och operativ nivå. Du kommer därmed spela en nyckelroll i den fortsatta tillväxten av Boneo på den svenska marknaden.
 



  





 Du kommer tillhöra marknadsteamet och jobba nära vår VD, Digital Content Manager och Growth Manager – men även nära övriga kollegor på Boneo då vi är ett mindre och tajt team.
 



  





**Arbetsuppgifter och ansvar** 



* Ansvara för all marknadsföring, både extern och intern, för alla våra målgrupper
* Ansvara för att upprätthålla och hantera marknads- och aktivitetsplaner utifrån marknadsstrategi, varumärkesplattform och kanalval
* Stärka varumärkeskännedomen genom kampanjer, koncept och innehåll som engagerar målgruppen
* Ha budgetansvar
* Med stöd av designbyrå och UX/UI-designer skapa innehåll och creatives för digital och traditionell marknadsföring, landningssidor, marknadsmaterial etc.
* Skriva pressreleaser och hantera presskontakter och kommunikation
* Planera och hantera paid media för olika kanaler som Meta, Google Ads, LinkedIn etc. – och mäta och optimera mot mål (ROI och KPI:er)



  





**Vad du kan** 



* Minst 4 års erfarenhet som marknadsansvarig i ett företag som levererar digitala tjänster till konsumenter
* Mycket goda kunskaper inom paid marketing som Meta Ads Manager, LinkedIn Campaign Manager och Google Ads
* Mycket goda kunskaper i projektledning och att ha igång flera projekt samtidigt
* Mycket goda kunskaper i att arbeta både strategiskt och operativt
* Mycket goda kunskaper i designverktyg som Figma, Canva och/eller Adobe Photoshop
* Erfarenhet av att leda och/eller ansvara för marknadsfunktion; strategi, budget etc.
* Erfarenhet av och känsla för hur man får fram budskap och kommunikation i text och visuellt
* Erfarenhet av att vara kravställare och beställare till externa byråer och samarbetspartners
* Goda kunskaper inom PR och extern kommunikation
* Flytande i svenska och engelska, både i skrift och tal



  





**Extra plus** 



* Erfarenhet av B2B-relationsmarknadsföring utöver B2C



  





**Vem du är** 



* Kreativ och kommunikativ
* Resultatorienterad och handlingskraftig att driva idéer och projekt framåt
* Självgående och initiativrik, får saker att hända och tar ansvar för resultatet
* Gillar att jobba på både en strategisk och på hands on-nivå – och inte rädd för att kavla upp ärmarna
* Trivs med att arbeta både i team och självständigt
* Gillar ett högt tempo i en resultatdriven organisation, med breda arbetsuppgifter



  





**Vi erbjuder** 



* Ett föräldravikariat på 14 månader
* Möjlighet att sätta avtryck och bygga erfarenhet i en tillväxtorienterad organisation i en spännande bransch
* Arbeta tillsammans med drivna, kompetenta kollegor
* Vara med på resan att bygga vidare på Boneos varumärkeskännedom
* En arbetsplats där möjligheten för din egna utveckling bara sätts av dig själv



  





 Drivs du av att bygga något nytt, utmana en hel marknad, komma med idéer och egna initiativ som påverkar hur hundratusentals upptäcker och använder Boneo, då är det här rollen för dig!

title: Experienced Frontend Engineer
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for an Experienced Frontend Engineer to team up with the most dedicated team of cyber specialists in our Engineering Team.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company** 
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 350 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for an Experienced Frontend Engineer who wants to make a difference in our Truesec Engineering Team.
   

  

**Truesec Technology Organization** 
 This technology business unit at Truesec brings together highly skilled engineers, architects, platform specialists and IT specialist with a mission to develop, operate, and continuously improve our unified Truesec Platform and technical capabilities. The Engineering Team drives the adoption of AI, automation, and advanced technology across all business units, ensuring we deliver best-in-class cybersecurity solutions to our clients and maintain a robust, scalable, and secure technology stack.
   

  

****The role****
 As an Experienced Frontend Engineer, you will join the Truesec engineering team to design, develop, and implement user-facing features for our internal tools and portal. Your work will focus on creating intuitive and responsive interfaces using technologies like React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, prioritize deliverables, and ensure the quality and performance of the frontend services through clean coding practices and thorough documentation.
   

  

**Your Potential Background**
* Experience: Proven experience in a similar position.
* Technical Skills: Proficiency in React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript/TypeScript; experience in responsive and cross-browser web design; familiar with frontend build tools like pnpm; and experience with unit testing frameworks such as Playwright.
* Design Principles: Strong understanding of UX/UI principles, accessibility standards, and attention to detail in rendering designs accurately.
* Problem-Solving: Excellent analytical skills for breaking down complex issues and evaluating solutions effectively.
* Collaboration: Proven ability to communicate and collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers and backend developers.


****Required Skills:****
* Proficiency in React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript/TypeScript.
* Experience with responsive and cross-browser web design principles.
* Strong skills in web performance optimization and frontend build tools.
* Familiarity with testing and debugging frameworks.
* Ability to document technical specifications and collaborate effectively within a team.


****Bonus Skills:****
* Experience in providing mentorship to junior team members.
* Knowledge of emerging technologies and best practices in frontend development.
* Ability to create clear technical documentation, including decisions and architecture diagrams.
* Familiarity with version control systems such as Git.


***Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.***
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future** 
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Software Engineer - Merchant Onboarding
description:
What we do at Qliro
   

  

 At Qliro, we deliver safe and simple payments. We are a dedicated partner to our merchants who serve their customers every day. We believe that if our merchants grow, we grow. We are a company of dedicated, friendly, and highly competent people who together have redefined what Qliro and payments can be. We are now on a journey of scaling our business both in Sweden and the Nordics.
   

  

 What your team does
   

  

 The Merchant Onboarding team is building the future of how merchants get started with our checkout solution. We’re creating a self-service onboarding tool that lets merchants and agents configure payment options automatically through a user-friendly, intuitive UI. Our goal is to remove friction and make integration fast and simple, enabling Qliro to grow to new heights! 🚀
   

  

 We work in a modern, cloud-based environment with a strong focus on product thinking, developer experience, and great UX. You’ll be joining a collaborative, international team who learn and have fun together.
   

  

**Current focus for the team:**
 ✔ Building a self-service onboarding platform for merchants and agents with C#/.NET and React
   

  

 ✔ Creating intuitive, scalable UIs for payment configuration and checkout setup
   

  

 ✔ Being one of the key factors for making Qliro grow with new merchants every day
   

  

 ✔ Close collaboration between developers, product, and design
   

  

 ✔ A dedicated day every other week to be creative, try out ideas and learn something new
   

  

**Tech stack highlights:**
 C#, .NET (10), React, TypeScript, Tailwind, REST APIs, AWS, Terraform, Git, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
   

  

**What we are looking for in our new team member:**
 💡 Fullstack mindset – You’re comfortable working across backend and frontend, and enjoy owning features end-to-end
   

  

 🚀 Agile & quality-focused – You have hands-on experience with agile development and solid understanding of software engineering practices
   

  

 🧪 Testing & reliability – You value automated testing and building maintainable and scalable systems
   

  

 🤝 Team player - Strong communicator and team player who wants to drive initiatives and collaborate with others both in and outside of the team.
   

  

**Extra plus if:**
 👩‍🎨 Interest in design & UX – You care about how things look and feel, and enjoy building intuitive, merchant-friendly interfaces
   

  

 ☁️ Cloud-curious – Experience with AWS, Infrastructure-as-Code, or cloud platforms is a big plus
   

  

 💰 Payments or fintech experience – Nice to have, but not required
   

  

**Does this sound like your next role? What are you waiting for – apply now!**
*Qliro is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to gender, gender identity or expression, national origin, religion or other beliefs, disability, sexual* 
 orientation
 *or age* 
 .

title: Senior Gameplay Programmer
description:
**The role**
 Avalanche Studios Group and its incubation team are seeking a Gameplay Programmer for work on a game prototype. This role involves very strong Unreal Engine knowledge and the candidate would take ownership of a broad range of gameplay features, in the context of an authoritative PvP environment.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Be a key contributor in a prototype team of 6 people, where you are one of two programmers
* Technical ownership of multiple parallel gameplay feature areas (such as movement, combat, inventory), from concept to implementation
* Work closely with designers in ensuring that technical solutions are always aligned with short- and long term design goals
* Share, with rest of team, responsibility for overall prototype stability, health and success


**Who You Are**
* 5+ years of professional C++ game development experience in Unreal Engine, including work with the Gameplay Ability System, AI behavior trees, UI, and multiplayer networking.
* Strong focus on performance and production workflows, including CPU/memory optimization, profiling and debugging, and collaborative development using Perforce.
* Experienced with Unreal networking, and have a thorough understanding of constraints and best practices when working in an authoritative PvP environment
* Comfortable with rapid prototyping and iteration cycles, including frequent team playtesting and feedbacking
* Accustomed to working with designers in interpreting and ideating from high-level briefs, in order to find the best technical path to realizing gameplay goals
* In possession of a “developer first”, player-centric mindset, with user experience prioritized equally to code architecture
* Motivated by diverse tasks and dynamic areas of responsibility, where any one week might include everything from implementing UI components to network optimization


 Note: Research shows under-represented groups in the industry might not apply to a job if they don’t check off every requirement. At Avalanche, we’re more about your drive to learn and interest in tackling challenges than what’s on your resume! So don’t stress if you don’t tick every box— shoot us your application anyway! Diverse opinions and different experiences are what make our teams so great, not itemized lists of qualifications.
   

  

**The Stockholm location**
 Our Stockholm office is situated in Södermalm, the beating heart of the city’s game industry. It’s a physical representation of our games – the lush vegetation of Just Cause and theHunter: Call of the Wild meets corroded metal straight out of Mad Max. Our hybrid model requires you to be in the office on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays to foster collaboration and creativity.
   

  

**Our values**
 At Avalanche Studios Group, we create worlds beyond limits. But that’s not exclusive to our games, so we’re committed to developing a diverse and inclusive workplace. All Avalanchers have a shared responsibility to create an open work environment where everyone is treated equally and respectfully. Being part of our world is not contingent on your heritage, your gender, or sexual orientation. It’s all about your passion and creativity.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 To apply for this position, please register below and provide your CV in English. We review applications continuously. All further studio-related information is provided under a non-disclosure agreement.
   

  

 At Avalanche Studios Group we're always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our passionate team, but please note that relocation assistance is not available for this role.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Onsite Support Specialist
description:
Do you want to work in a global company where you can contribute to a more sustainable food production? DeLaval is a leading developer, manufacturer, and supplier of solutions for dairy farmers around the world. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers do more with less.
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
 The mission of Digital Workplace at DeLaval is to develop and govern the End User Services while ensuring their delivery and usage. By that, we contribute to DeLaval competitiveness by delivering standardized and fit for purpose infrastructure services, maintaining a balance between time to market, cost, quality and security.
   

  

 We put a lot of effort into offering modern and easy to use IT services and strive to be on the forefront. A few examples are a fully cloud managed client platform (Intune), Windows 365, Azure Virtual Desktop, Teams Telephony, Microsoft Teams Rooms (MTR), cloud print and storage. We have moved away from legacy platforms such as SCCM and Citrix. As majority of these services are delivered by external partners, the mission is focused at governing and controlling the partners. DeLaval is in the position to transform their end user productivity tool to enable modern way of working with collaboration and mobility to work close to our customers, at our manufacturing facilities and/or from any location our colleagues prefer working from.
   

  

 In this role you will be reporting to the End User Experience Manager. We are strengthening our presence by adding a second Onsite Support Specialist. You will be working in a close collaboration with the Digital Workplace Team and be responsible for all the Onsite Support activities in your site and area. Your main goal is to deliver the best onsite support possible, and we as team are working together to deliver a great end user experience to our DeLaval users.
   

  

**Key responsibilties**
**Site IT Coordination**
* Support assigned locations remotely and collaborate with Site IT Coordinators
* Troubleshoot technical issues and liaise with vendors
* Act as the local contact for central IT


**Digital Workplace**
* Train and onboard users for new tools and technologies
* Handle Service Desk tickets and basic computer repairs/diagnostics
* Install OS, applications, printers, Teams telephony, and MTR equipment
* Use monitoring tools to improve user experience


**Cybersecurity**
* Promote end‑user awareness on cybersecurity topics


**IT Asset Management**
* Manage PCs, peripherals, Teams telephony, and MTR equipment


**Operational Technology (OT)**
* Support local network, servers, and printers
* Coordinate with vendors and assist with audits
* Decommission old equipment properly
* Support printers in factory and warehouse environments, including label printers


**Qualifications**
 To be sucessfull in this role we believe you have:
   

  

* Microsoft 365 knowledge
* ServiceNow Knowledge
* Research, analytical, and problem-solving skills
* Knowledge of and experience troubleshooting/supporting Windows 11, mobile devices
* Networking skills such as LAN/WAN network configuration and troubleshooting, as well as VPN client connectivity
* Good verbal/writing skills in both Swedish and English
* An ability to cooperate and prioritize


**Working at DeLaval**
 Our core values Passion, People, Professionals and Partnerships connect individuals across entities and geographies. Success is far more than knowledge – it is strongly related to behaviour. At DeLaval we are all guided by our three behaviours: Set Direction, Make Things Happen and One DeLaval.
   

  

 We Offer You a Workplace Like No Other, Where State-of-the-art Technology Goes Hand In Hand With Animal Welfare. DeLaval Is a Part Of The Tetra Laval Group Together With Tetra Pak And Sidel. In Addition, We Offer
   

  

* Secure employment and benefits from the collective agreement (occupational pension, work-related accident insurance).
* Parental leave compensation (approx. 10 percent of the employee's monthly salary).
* Wellness allowance of SEK 4 000/year.
* Private healthcare insurance.
* Flexible working hours and reduced working hours.


**Additional Information**
 This is a full-time permanent position based at DeLaval’s headquarters in Tumba, south of Stockholm. We offer a hybrid workplace model, allowing flexibility to work remotely.
   

  

 We review applications ongoing. We do not accept applications via email, however if you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process don’t hesitate to contact us.
   

  

**Contact**
 Hiring manager: Johan Grandin, johan.grandin@delaval.com
   

  

 Recruiter: Agnes Edbom, agnes.edbom@delaval.com
   

  

**About DeLaval**
 Our vision is to make sustainable food production possible. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers, dairy farmers, do more with less by providing world-leading milking equipment and solutions.
   

  

 Today, DeLaval has approximately 4,500 passionate professionals operating in more than 100 markets around the world. DeLaval is part of the Tetra Laval Group.
   

  

 See more at corporate.delaval.com

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description:
*At Lendo, we’re driven by a clear mission: to empower people to make smarter financial decisions. Our work directly impacts how users understand and navigate complex financial journeys, and we take that responsibility seriously.* 




*We’re looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer who wants real ownership, meaningful technical influence, and the opportunity to shape business critical user experiences used daily.* 




  





**THE ROLE** 




 You’ll join a cross-functional product team responsible for building and evolving Lendo’s core digital experience. You’ll work on user flows that are central to how our users interact with and benefit from our platform.
 



 You won’t just deliver features. You’ll help shape how we build them and take responsibility for how they evolve over time.
 



  





**As a Senior Frontend Engineer, you will:** 




 • Take end-to-end ownership of components and frontend architecture within your product area
 



 • Drive performance, scalability, and long term maintainability
 



 • Translate complex requirements into intuitive, high quality user experiences
 



 • Build reusable and well structured components
 



 • Contribute to technical standards and frontend best practices
 



 • Collaborate closely with product and design to navigate trade-offs and priorities
 



 • Influence technical decisions and participate in architectural discussions
 



 • Ensure quality through testing, observability, and continuous improvement
 



  





 We value engineers who go beyond their immediate tasks, proactively identify improvements, raise the technical bar, and follow through on outcomes.
 



 Our frontend stack centers around React in a mixed TypeScript/JavaScript codebase, integrated with Go-based backend services via REST API’s in a cloud-native environment using Kubernetes on GCP. We continuously evolve our architecture with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and developer experience.
 



  





**WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR** 




 • 5+ years of professional frontend experience, including building and maintaining production systems
 



 • Strong React and TypeScript skills
 



 • Experience building and maintaining scalable frontend applications
 



 • Solid hands-on experience working with REST APIs, 3rd-party integrations, and CI/CD
 



 • Hands-on experience with Sentry and Playwright
 



 • Familiarity with tools such as GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, and Yarn
 



 • A quality mindset where testing, reviews, and clean code are natural to you
 



 • Pragmatic decision-making, you understand trade-offs
 



 • A strong sense of ownership and accountability
 



 • Comfortable contributing to technical direction and architectural discussions
 



  





**Nice to have:** 




 • React Native
 



 • Next.js
 



 • Experience improving frontend performance
 



 • Experience contributing to design systems
 



 • Experience in A/B testing
 



  





 Like what you see? Welcome with your application!

title: Senior Software Engineer - Frontend Focus
description:
Are you passionate about creating world-class user experiences? NOBA is now seeking for a frontend focused software engineer with a love for modern web solutions to join our team in Stockholm.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a frontend developer at NOBA, you will play a key role in shaping user-friendly and accessible web applications that have a real impact on both our internal teams and external users. You’ll take significant responsibility for driving frontend projects from design and architecture to release, ensuring that every interface is intuitive, responsive, and of the highest quality.
   

  

 Your day-to-day work will involve developing and enhancing web applications using React, building seamless and engaging user experiences, and maintaining high standards of code quality. While you’ll focus on frontend, you’ll also collaborate closely with backend developers to integrate APIs and services, making sure the entire application functions smoothly as a whole. This collaboration is central to our workflow, and at times, you may even contribute to backend tasks to ensure the best possible integration and user experience.
   

  

 You’ll be part of an Agile team, participating in the full development process and working together with UX/UI designers and backend engineers to deliver solutions that truly make a difference.
   

  

 We work from the office 2 days per week.
   

  

**We're Looking For Someone Who**
* Has 5+ years of software development experience, with an emphasis on frontend
* Has driven features end-to-end and contributed to frontend technical decisions
* Has a deep understanding of React fundamentals
* Has strong CSS skills, and a good eye for visual detail
* Has a good understanding of WCAG
* Can write backend APIs when required, ensuring smooth integration with frontend features
* Is a team player who enjoys sharing knowledge
* Is fluent in English, both spoken and written


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience in Next.js and/or building React apps
* Experience in frontend testing using Vitest/Jest and Playwright
* Experience in backend development in .Net


 In addition to this, it is important to us that you recognize yourself in our values:
 **we are wholehearted, we collaborate** 
 and
 **we take the lead.**
**Have you heard of NOBAVERSE?**
 In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra
 *bubbly* 
 ! ✨
   

  

 Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
   

  

**Read more about how our recruitment process works in the** 
**FAQ** 
**.**
 We care for your privacy and, with reference to the GDPR, would like to ask you not to include any sensitive personal data in your application, for examples information about ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs or information about your health.
   

  

**Read more about how we handle your personal data** 
**here** 
**.**
 If you have any questions or concerns about the position, please contact the responsible recruiter.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application! 🙏✨

title: Fullstack Developer to Nordea Life & Pension Sweden
description:
**Job ID: 3685**
 Nordea Life & Pension Sweden is a subsidiary of Nordea Bank with its own internal IT organization. We work closely with our business colleagues as we are responsible for developing modern services and platforms for our external and internal customers.
   

  

 We are looking for a Fullstack Software Developer to help us digitalize the insurance market.
   

  

 We know that our customers' needs are changing, and we have a strong focus on matching them with the pension solutions of the future. We collaborate in finding opportunities and nurture a place of growth, so bring with your ideas, skills, and experiences and let's make a difference together.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 At Nordea Life & Pension developers and testers work in four teams. Together we are responsible for advisory applications, insurance management systems and a large number of integration applications. Nordea follows a hybrid model of working and our offices are in central Stockholm.
   

  

**What you will be doing:**
* Developing new features in close collaboration with business, product owners and testers.
* Develop and maintain modern applications to deliver a great user experience in the complex domain of insurances.
* You will primarily be working with Java, Spring Boot, React.js and Angular running on an in-house Kubernetes platform. You will also come in contact with systems running GraphQL, TRPC, Google Cloud Platform, vitest, nx.


**Who You Are**
 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**This is the right role for you if you:**
* Write well structured, testable and scalable code.
* Have a customer centric, curious mindset and actively seek to contribute to the development of the team and the products.
* Are good at seeing the whole picture and collaborating with different stakeholders such as business and IT units.
* Are an experienced and solution oriented developer.


**Your experience and background:**
* Minimum 2 years of experience of development in Java and Angular/React.js.
* Fluent in both Swedish and English.


**It would be ideal if you also:**
* Have experience from the insurance industry.
* Have an interest in and experience from API test automation.
* Have experience of Kubernetes, GraphQL, TRPC, Google Cloud Platform, vitest, nx.


**What We Offer**
 People are driven by many different factors. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

 A culture that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

 Hybrid working model – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

 Diversity and inclusion are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 26/04/2026. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Head of Development JAVA, Hans F Nilsson at hans.f.nilsson@nordea.se.
   

  

 Please note that we will proceed with potential candidates during the application period. We might include a technical assignment in the recruitment process and background checks will be performed.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact Finansförbundet at finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACO at SacoNordea@nordea.com.

title: Senior Quality & Regulatory Specialist
description:
**About This Role**
 TFS HealthScience is a leading global mid-size Contract Research Organization (CRO) that partners with biotechnology and pharmaceutical companies throughout their entire clinical development journey. Our expertise includes full-service capabilities, resourcing, and Functional Service (FSP) solutions.
   

  

 We are now looking for
 **Senior QA/RA Experts – MedTech Software (MDR / SaMD)** 
 to join an exciting and high-impact engagement in Stockholm.
   

  

 In this role, you will support a large public healthcare organization in establishing, adapting, and implementing a quality management system (QMS) and technical documentation in line with NMI (HSLF-FS 2022:42), MDR 2017/745, and relevant standards such as ISO 13485 and IEC 62304. You will work both strategically and hands-on, ensuring regulatory compliance, quality assurance, and long-term sustainability of processes and systems.
   

  

 As part of our SRS/FSP team, you will be dedicated to one client within a complex healthcare environment, working closely with cross-functional stakeholders including technical teams, product owners, and regulatory functions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Contribute to the completion and implementation of an existing Quality Management System (QMS) aligned with ISO 13485, NMI, and MDR
* Perform gap analyses, classifications, and assessments of systems, services, and products against applicable regulatory frameworks
* Review, update, and develop technical documentation for medical device software (SaMD)
* Support the development and execution of a regulatory compliance roadmap, including processes, documentation, and governance structures
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define roles, responsibilities, and organizational setup for quality and regulatory functions (including PRRC considerations)
* Evaluate and define requirements for electronic QMS (eQMS) solutions
* Provide hands-on support within areas such as risk management, usability, labeling, clinical evaluation, and post-market surveillance
* Act as a subject matter expert, supporting interpretation and application of relevant regulations and standards


**Qualifications**
* Minimum 5 years of experience within QA/RA in the medical device or medtech software domain
* Strong hands-on experience with QMS implementation and technical documentation under MDR and/or NMI
* Experience working with ISO 13485 and IEC 62304 (SaMD)
* Proven ability to work both operationally and strategically within complex regulatory environments
* Experience collaborating with cross-functional teams in technical and business settings
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken


**Meritorious**
* Experience from public healthcare organizations or large, complex environments
* Experience supporting certification processes with notified bodies
* Experience with eQMS evaluation and implementation
* Experience working with both NMI and MDR frameworks


**What We Offer**
 We provide opportunities for personal and professional growth in a rewarding environment. You will join a team that values collaboration, quality, and making a difference in the healthcare landscape.
   

  

 Our core values of Trust, Quality, Passion, Flexibility, and Sustainability guide our decisions and shape our culture. By aligning on these values, we foster collaboration, innovation, and a shared commitment to excellence. Together, we make a difference.
   

  

**A Bit More About Us**
 Our journey began over 30 years ago in Sweden, in the city of Lund. As a full-service global CRO, we build solution-driven teams working toward a healthier future. Bringing together over 600 professionals, TFS delivers tailored clinical research services in more than 50 countries, offering flexible clinical development and strategic resourcing solutions across key therapeutic areas including Dermatology, Neuroscience, Oncology, and Ophthalmology.
   

  

**TFS HealthScience** 
 is a global, mid-sized contract research organization (CRO) partnering with biotechnology and pharmaceutical companies across the full clinical development lifecycle. Our expertise spans full-service clinical development, project-based support, strategic resourcing, and Functional Service Provider (FSP) solutions, matching experienced professionals to roles where they deliver the greatest impact.

title: Senior Client Platform Developer
description:
**About Us**
 Hacksaw Studios is a Stockholm-based game studio focused on creating innovative, high-quality gaming experiences. With a strong emphasis on performance, reliability, and precision, we bring ideas to life through deep technical expertise and close creative collaboration. We have wide distribution, and our games are played by millions of people every month by players all over the world.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Senior Client Platform Developer to join our growing Stockholm team. In this role, you will take a leading technical responsibility for our client-facing platforms and tools, helping shape architecture, drive best practices, and ensure a high-quality experience for players and internal teams.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Include**
 Technical Ownership & Architecture
   

  

* Own and evolve core client-side platform components, including in-game UI systems and client-communication layers.
* Contribute to architectural decisions around scalability, maintainability, and long-term platform strategy.
* Identify technical debt and proactively drive improvements and refactors.


 Platform Integration & Cross-Team Collaboration
   

  

* Lead and design client-side integrations between our games, external platforms, and third-party studios using our OpenRGS platform.
* Act as a technical partner to backend teams, ensuring coherent end-to-end platform architecture.
* Provide guidance and best practices for external studios integrating with our platform.


 Tooling, Automation & Developer Experience
   

  

* Design, build, and maintain internal tooling (e.g. mock clients, launchers, automation scripts, CI helpers) to improve developer productivity and reliability.
* Advocate for better workflows and testing strategies.


 Technical Leadership & Support
   

  

* Serve as a go-to expert for complex platform-related issues, supporting developers, QA, and tech support.
* Drive root-cause analysis of production issues and help define preventative measures.
* Mentor less-experienced developers through code reviews, technical discussions, and knowledge sharing.


 UX & Quality Focus
   

  

* Ensure high-quality user experiences by balancing technical constraints with UX and visual polish.
* Collaborate with designers and product stakeholders to ensure robust and user-friendly client solutions.


**What We’re Looking For**
 Senior-Level Experience
   

  

* Several years of professional experience developing complex web or client-side applications in production environments.
* Proven ability to take ownership of systems and make sound technical decisions with long-term impact.


 Strong Technical Foundation
   

  

* Deep proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript or similar languages.
* Solid understanding of modern web technologies, including browser APIs, cross-origin communication (postMessage, CORS), WebSockets, and real-time client-server communication.


 Problem Solving & Debugging
   

  

* Advanced debugging skills using browser DevTools, network inspection, and API tools (Postman or equivalent).
* Ability to reason about complex distributed systems and client-server interactions.


 Communication & Collaboration
   

  

* Comfortable explaining technical concepts and trade-offs to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Experience working cross-functionally and influencing decisions beyond your immediate team.


 Ownership Mindset
   

  

* Proactive, service-minded, and comfortable driving initiatives independently.
* Willing to challenge existing solutions and suggest improvements when appropriate.


**Nice To Have**
* Experience with Haxe.
* Experience with Git, TypeScript, React, Linux, Bash, npm, Bun, Docker, Cucumber, GitLab CI, and AWS.
* Experience working with web-facing C# systems.
* Previous experience in platform teams, SDK development, or supporting external developers.


 What We Offer
   

  

* A modern office in central Stockholm.
* Work with experienced, passionate colleagues in the gaming industry.
* The opportunity to create games with a global audience.
* Real influence, ownership, and personal growth opportunities.
* Wellbeing perks including wellness allowance and regular in-office massage.


 Practical Details
   

  

* This is an on-site position in Stockholm.
* Unfortunately, we cannot assist with relocation or visa sponsorship.


 Ready to Join the Game Makers?
   

  

 Apply now! We review applications on a rolling basis.

title: Entrévärd
description:
Cube of Art söker en entrévärd på deltid. Arbetstiden inkluderar både vardagar och helger.
  
Tycker du om att arbeta med varierande arbetsuppgifter? Älskar du att förbättra upplevelsen för alla? Då är du rätt person för tjänsten som entrévärd på Cube of Art i Uppsala.
  
Om oss
  
Cube of Art är ett museum för interaktiv konst. Museet ger besökarna möjlighet att upptäcka digital och interaktiv konst. Visionen är att förena människor i interaktion med konst, och väcka nyfikenhet kring hur teknik och konst kan samverka.
  
Museet är beläget i centrala Uppsala och består av en svart kub med 7 meter i takhöjd. Kuben är installerad med den senaste laser- och lidartekniken som gör att besökarna kan interagera med konsten på ett helt nytt sätt.
  
Om dig
  
Vi söker dig som trivs med att möta människor, ta initiativ och skapa en välkomnande atmosfär. Du har lätt för att ta kontakt, leda samtal och arbeta i ett högt tempo där snabba beslut kan behövas. Det viktigaste för oss är din positiva inställning och ditt engagemang för att ge varje besökare en minnesvärd upplevelse.
  
Vi söker dig som är redo att vara med och bidra till spännande konst! Du är stresstålig och gillar nya utmaningar. Du är en skicklig värd och är ansvarsfull, strukturerad och ser till att arbetet flyter på smidigt.
  
I gengäld erbjuder vi dig stora utvecklingsmöjligheter i en innovativ miljö. Det kommer bli en lärorik resa med stimulerande möjligheter till personliga framsteg och ny kunskap. Vi kommer garanterat att utmana dig!
  
Mertierande
  
Erfarenhet från kundtjänst eller försäljning. Utbildning inom teknik, data/IT och matematik är meriterande.

title: Chef till sektionen kammar- och utskottssystem
description:
Riksdagsförvaltningen är en myndighet som har till uppgift att underlätta riksdagens arbete. Cirka 750 partipolitiskt neutrala medarbetare arbetar vid Riksdagsförvaltningen med många olika typer av arbetsuppgifter. Nu söker vi en sektionschef med teamkänsla och flerårig erfarenhet av systemutveckling till den nya sektionen kammar- och utskottssystem inom it-avdelningen. Hos oss får du chansen att arbeta i en miljö där teknik och samhällsuppdrag möts och där ditt arbete skapar nytta för människor varje dag.
  
  

Dina arbetsuppgifter
  
Som sektionschef har du det övergripande personalansvaret för 16 medarbetare och konsulter. Du leder sektionens arbete och säkerställer uppföljning inom samtliga verksamhetsområden.
  
  

Du förväntas bidra aktivt till både sektionens och enhetens fortsatta utveckling. Du kommer att svara för sektionens arbete med bland annat verksamhetsplaner och stötta enhetschefen när det gäller budgetar och prognoser samt avrop av konsulter.
  
  

I arbetet ingår nära samarbete med förvaltningsledare och beställare såsom systemförvaltare och systemägare. I din roll som sektionschef är du aktiv i samverkan med övriga delar av it-avdelningen och deltar i flera olika uppdrag.
  
  

Dina kvalifikationer
  
Vi söker dig som har en eftergymnasial examen inom it, teknik eller något annat relevant område. Flerårig relevant arbetslivserfarenhet kan ersätta kravet på utbildning.
  
  

Du ska också ha flerårig erfarenhet av
  
  

* personalansvar och chefskap för medarbetare inom systemutveckling
* systemförvaltning och utveckling samt agila arbetssätt
* verksamhetsplanering samt analys och uppföljning av leveranskapacitet
* avrop och uppföljning av konsulter och licenser samt leverantörssamverkan
* en teknisk roll inom systemutveckling.


Det är meriterande med erfarenhet av
  
  

* arbete med it- och informationssäkerhet
* förändringsledning
* utveckling av arbetssätt inom systemutveckling samt leveransmodeller
* arbete inom myndigheter.


Som person har du god förståelse för teknik och är en driven och organiserad lagspelare. Du har en positiv inställning och en förmåga att hantera komplexa uppgifter.
  
  

Som chef inom Riksdagsförvaltningen ska du ha överblick och kunna förstå helheten, agera utifrån ett arbetsgivarperspektiv, stimulera medarbetare till delaktighet och utveckling samt sätta realistiska mål som kan nås inom givna ramar. Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid dina personliga egenskaper, särskilt din förmåga att kommunicera och samarbeta.
  
  

Riksdagsförvaltningen tillämpar tidsbegränsade chefsförordnanden, och anställningen inleds med en provanställning.
  
  

Anställningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass, vilket i detta fall ställer krav på svenskt medborgarskap och godkänd säkerhetsprövning. Vi välkomnar sökande med olika erfarenheter och bakgrunder.
  
  

* Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning
* Omfattning: Heltid


Vi erbjuder dig
  
I Riksdagsförvaltningen får du jobba med stimulerande, utvecklande och samhällsnyttiga arbetsuppgifter nära demokratins kärna. Här får du yrkesmässiga utmaningar och bra villkor kring semester, tjänstepension, föräldraledighet och kompetensutveckling. I riksdagens lokaler finns gym och träningslokal med olika träningspass varje dag. Vi strävar efter att våra medarbetare ska ha en bra balans mellan jobb och fritid och erbjuder möjlighet till distansarbete i viss utsträckning.
  
  

Ansökan
  
Ansök via www.riksdagen.se, senast den 17 april 2026.
  
**Referensnummer:** 1585-2025/26
  
  

Vi jobbar kompetensbaserat i hela processen och är måna om att erbjuda en inkluderande, rättvis, objektiv och kandidatvänlig process.
  
Därför ber vi dig att besvara ett antal urvalsfrågor i stället för att skriva ett personligt brev.
  
  

Övrigt
  
Riksdagsförvaltningen har gjort sitt medieval för rekrytering och undanber sig alla erbjudanden om annonserings- och rekryteringshjälp i samband med denna annons.
  
  

Kontakta oss
  
Sonja Almgren, enhetschef, 08-786 58 59
  
Martina Brännvall, HR-specialist, 08-786 57 32
  
  

Fackliga representanter
  
Anna Nyströmer (Saco-S),
  
Anneli Löfling (ST)
  
Lars Vestberg (Seko), 08-786 40 00
  
  

Riksdagen är hjärtat i den svenska demokratin. Riksdagsförvaltningens uppgift är att skapa bästa möjliga förutsättningar för riksdagen och dess ledamöter. Det är ett unikt uppdrag vi är stolta över. Vi har spännande arbetsuppgifter där vi utmanas yrkesmässigt. Samtidigt har vi god balans mellan arbete och fritid. Våra värdeord kvalitet, kompetens och engagemang ger oss en gemensam riktning. Tillsammans ser vi till att demokratin fungerar.

title: Junior konsult IT-drift/infrastruktur Försvarsverksamhet
description:
Jobbeskrivning


**Nu storsatsar AFRY och startar ett nytt segment som heter Defense! Känner du ansvar för det svenska försvaret, vill vara del av denna satsning och bidra med din IT-kompetens? Hos oss kan du göra just det.**

AFRY har bland annat fått tilldelning på ett flerårigt ramavtal med Försvarsmakten där vi kommer att leverera deras konsulttjänster inom IT. Det här är en jobbmöjlighet för dig som vill bidra till att stärka det svenska försvaret och samtidigt ha roligt på jobbet, samarbeta med andra, bidra med din kompetens, ha schyssta ledare och vara del av ett riktigt härligt team.

**Vi söker just ju en junior konsult inom IT-drift/infrastruktur** som vill vara med och utveckla framtidens försvarssystem.


Som IT-konsult inom försvarsverksamhet kommer du att arbeta med avancerade tekniska lösningar och vara en del av ett team som säkerställer att våra system är robusta, säkra och effektiva. Du kommer att ha möjlighet att arbeta med spännande projekt som har stor betydelse för Sveriges – för vår – försvarsförmåga.

**Som konsult ingår resor som en naturlig del i arbetet.**


Kvalifikationer


Dina professionella färdigheter är förstås viktiga men vad du har att bidra med som person är minst lika viktigt. I den här rollen behöver du t.ex. trivas med att samarbeta i team och dela ut och ta emot feedback, tycka att det är intressant när omständigheter förändras, ha en vilja att bidra och hjälpa andra och du drar dig inte för att själv ta hjälp om du kör fast.


Vi tror att du har god säkerhetsmedvetenhet och hög integritet och behärskar mycket god svenska i tal och skrift, då svenska krävs i kontakt med kollegor och kunder.

 **Skallkrav** – du har:

* Minst två (2) års arbetslivserfarenhet av Linux i drift i servermiljö.
* Minst ett (1) års arbetserfarenhet av LAN/WAN avseende installation, konfiguration och drift av routrar och switchar.
* Svenskt medborgarskap. För kunden och uppdragen i fråga krävs svenskt medborgarskap och *godkänd säkerhetsprövning* innan anställning.

 **Börkrav** – du bör ha:

* Arbetserfarenhet av Microsoft Windows Server, version 2016 eller högre, erhållen i drift- och/eller förvaltnings- och/eller utvecklingsuppdrag.
* Arbetserfarenhet av virtualisering, erhållen i drift- och/eller förvaltnings- och/eller utvecklingsuppdrag.
* Arbetserfarenhet av IT-relaterat arbete i serverhallar och tillhörande teknikutrymmen.
* Arbetserfarenhet av installation, konfiguration och drift av brandväggar.
* Arbetserfarenhet av att arbeta med att ta fram och vidmakthålla teknisk dokumentation.
* Arbetserfarenhet från arbete i IT-utvecklingsprojekt.
* B-körkort.


Företagsbeskrivning


AFRY erbjuder tjänster inom teknik, design, digitalisering och rådgivning. Vi är dedikerade experter inom industri, energi och infrastruktur och skapar värde för kommande generationer. AFRY har nordiska rötter med global räckvidd. Våra gemensamma principer – Result driven, Client centric, Empowering och Accountable – vägleder oss i hur vi arbetar, utvecklas och lyckas tillsammans. Var med och accelerera övergången till ett hållbart samhälle.


Ytterligare information


**Välkommen med din ansökan, sista ansökningsdag är 2026-04-28.** Urval görs löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag.

**KONTAKTPERSONER:**  

Jens Andersson, Director and Head of Defense Digital  

jens.andersson@afry.com


Rebecka Gravås, Group Manager  

rebecka.gravas@afry.com

**REKRYTERINGSPROCESSEN:**  

Följande steg ingår i den här processen:

* Telefonavstämning
* Teknisk intervju
* Chefsintervju
* Referenstagning
* Erbjudande

  

För samtliga rekryteringar på AFRY genomförs som grund alltid en ID-kontroll, referenstagning samt verifiering av utbildning.


Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
