Du förväntas bidra med ditt perspektiv och din kompetens samt vara öppen för andras. Du kommer med idéer och nya angreppssätt för att förbättra och utveckla verksamheten och din egen kompetens. Du är inriktad på resultat i ditt agerande och anpassar dig när behov och inriktning ändras.
   

  

 Som person är du analytisk, strukturerad och har ett gott omdöme, vilket gör att du arbetar metodiskt även i situationer med höga krav på precision och säkerhet. Du håller dig uppdaterad om relevant teknikutveckling och tar initiativ till förbättringar där du ser ett behov. Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Läs mer på Medarbetarskap och ledarskap i Regeringskansliet - Regeringen.se
   

  

 Övrigt
   

  

 Annonsen avser en tillsvidareanställning som inleds med sex månaders provanställning.
   

 Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

 Beredskapsarbete utanför ordinarie arbetstid kan förekomma.
   

 Befattningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas. Du måste vara svensk medborgare, men får gärna ha utländsk bakgrund.
   

  

**Är du intresserad?**
 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder, kontakta Edward Miller som är sektionschef, på 076-135 68 23. Du är också välkommen att kontakta Rekryteringsspecialist Filip RIstov på 070-316 86 34. Fackliga kontaktpersoner är Johan Strokirk för Saco och Jan Wahlström för ST. Du når samtliga via Regeringskansliets växel, 08-405 10 00. Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan
 **senast den 21 april 2026.**

title: Junior Content Marketing Associate
description:
**TL;DR** 




**We are looking for a creative, ambitious, and AI-curious Junior Content Marketing Associate who knows how to turn product value into compelling stories across video, text, and visual content. You will work closely with both the Product team and the Go-to-Market team to help shape how Agaton is understood, remembered, and bought, and play an important role in our next phase of growth.** 




  





**Ready to Shape the Future of B2B Marketing?** 





 Join Agaton, where advanced AI transforms how sales and customer service teams perform.
 





 We are not building yet another analytics tool. We are building the intelligence layer that helps companies understand conversations, coach people, automate workflows, and fundamentally improve how they sell and serve customers.
 





 If you love storytelling, enjoy creating content across different formats, and want to be part of building a category-defining company from Europe, this role is for you.
 




  





**The Opportunity** 





 As a Junior Content Marketing Associate at Agaton, you will help bring our product, value proposition, and market narrative to life across multiple formats and channels. You will work closely with Product and Go-to-Market to turn real product capabilities, customer pain points, and commercial insights into clear, engaging, and high-quality content.
 





 This is not a traditional junior marketing role. You will be expected to move fast, create across formats, stay on top of the latest AI tools, and use them naturally as part of how you research, produce, test, and improve your work.
 




  





**What You’ll Be Doing** 



* Create high-quality content across video, text, and visual formats
* Turn product updates, launches, and capabilities into clear and compelling stories
* Help explain Agaton’s value in a way that is easy to understand, remember, and buy into
* Work closely with the Product team to understand what we are building and how to communicate it to the market
* Work closely with the Go-to-Market team to support campaigns, sales enablement, outreach, and positioning
* Create content for channels such as LinkedIn, website, email, presentations, one-pagers, product marketing assets, and short-form video
* Use the latest AI tools to accelerate research, content production, editing, repurposing, and experimentation
* Test new content formats, hooks, workflows, and creative ideas continuously
* Help shape how Agaton looks, sounds, and shows up in the market as we scale internationally



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* Strong ability to create content across multiple formats, especially video, text, and visuals
* A natural feel for storytelling, messaging, and how to communicate product value clearly
* Strong curiosity about the latest AI tools and how they can be applied in practical, high-quality ways
* Comfortable working closely with both Product and commercial teams
* Fast, proactive, and able to turn loose ideas into polished output
* Strong sense of quality, clarity, and audience relevance
* Commercial instinct and interest in what drives engagement, understanding, and pipeline
* Comfortable working in a fast-moving, founder-led growth environment
* Strong written and spoken English
* Swedish is a strong plus



  





**Bonus Points** 



* Experience creating content in SaaS, AI, startup, or technology environments
* Experience with video editing, visual storytelling, and content repurposing
* Familiarity with tools such as Figma, Canva, CapCut, Adobe, or similar
* Experience supporting product marketing, GTM initiatives, or sales enablement
* Good understanding of how modern sales and marketing teams work together
* Strong instinct for what makes content feel current, sharp, and high-signal



  





**What We Offer** 



* Competitive salary with attractive long-term upside
* Above-market stock option package
* Six weeks annual paid vacation
* Wellness budget to invest in your health and wellbeing
* Learning and development budget
* Stockholm-based role with flexibility and a modern office environment
* A rare opportunity to help define how a category-defining AI company is presented to the market
* Direct impact on how a high-growth company builds awareness, understanding, and demand



  





**About Agaton** 





 At Agaton, we're building the intelligence layer behind every customer conversation, going beyond transcripts to understand sales at a granular level: not just what's said, but how it's said. We analyze language, silence, and vocal tone to coach human agents in real time and power autonomous AI voice agents that compound in performance the more they're used.
 





 Our technology understands context, adapts in real time, and helps companies move from reactive customer interactions to intelligent, value-driven communication. We believe sales should be helpful, intelligent, and genuinely valuable, not pushy or scripted.
 





 We are a high-growth, talent-dense team based in Stockholm, backed by leading angels and operators from companies like Spotify, Klarna, Shopify, Sana, and more. We are expanding rapidly across Europe and preparing for global scale.
 




  





**Ready to Drive the Future?** 





 We are looking for someone who wants more than just a traditional junior marketing role. If you want to work closely with product, founders, and go-to-market teams, create content that genuinely shapes how a company is understood, and help build a category-defining brand from the inside, we would love to hear from you.
 





 This is more than a job. It is a chance to be part of building something generation-defining.
 




  





**Apply now. You only need to submit your CV. No cover letter required.** 




  






 This position is based in Stockholm, Sweden. Please submit your application in English, as it is our company language.

title: Solutions Architect
description:
Lead Data Engineer / Solutions Architect
 



**Stockholm (Hybrid)** 




  





**Permanent | Senior Level | Product & Consulting Hybrid** 




*Build the data foundations that make AI actually work* 




  





 Everyone talks about AI.
 



 Few organisations have the data foundations to support it.
 



  





 We’re a Stockholm-based product company operating at the intersection of data platforms, analytics, and modern consultancy. Our mission is simple but ambitious: make advanced analytics and AI achievable, sustainable, and efficient - without the endless manual work that slows most data initiatives down.
 



  





 We’re now looking for a
 **Lead Data Engineer / Solutions Architect** 
 to help us scale both our product and our customer impact.
 



  





 This is a role for someone who wants real technical ownership, enjoys working close to customers, and believes that great architecture beats brute-force delivery.
 



  





 Why this role exists?
 



 We’re growing quickly. Our platform is in production with customers, our consultants are fully booked, and demand is increasing.
 



  





 By bringing in a senior lead, you will:
 


* Step directly into active projects
* Take architectural ownership alongside founders and senior engineers
* Free up time for deeper product innovation
* Help shape how we scale - technically and culturally



  





 This is not a “keep-the-lights-on” role.
 



  





 It’s about building the foundation others depend on.
 



  





 What you’ll work on:
 



 End-to-end data architecture
 



 You’ll design and implement modern, cloud-native data platforms that support:
 


* Business intelligence
* Advanced analytics
* Machine learning and AI use cases



  





 Your solutions must be robust, semantic, and machine-readable - not just visually appealing dashboards.
 



  





 AI-ready data foundations
 



 You’ll apply proven modelling approaches (Kimball, Inmon, Data Vault) and modern architectural patterns (e.g. medallion layers) to ensure:
 


* High data quality
* Strong governance
* Long-term adaptability



  





 Because “garbage in” doesn’t just mean bad reports - it means unreliable AI.
 



  





 Automation first
 



 We believe manual work is a design failure.
 



 You’ll build pipelines and orchestration with automation as the default:
 


* Minimal manual intervention
* High observability
* Reliable, repeatable deployments



  





 Technical leadership
 



 You’ll:
 


* Set standards for architecture, quality, and documentation
* Mentor less experienced engineers
* Act as a bridge between business needs and technical execution



  





 Advisory and trust
 



 You’ll work closely with customers, helping them move from legacy setups to modern platforms - not by selling hours, but by making them faster and more independent.
 



  





 The environment you’ll join
 


* A product company, not a body-shop
* A small, senior, highly collaborative team
* Flat structure, low ego, high trust
* Decisions made close to the code
* Long-term thinking over short-term billing



  





 We combine product development with consulting partnerships because we believe the fastest way to improve analytics is to build better tools - not to maximise hours spent.
 



 This also means you’ll see your ideas:
 


* Shipped
* Used
* Iterated on
* And improved based on real customer feedback



  





 Tech & experience
 



 We care more about capability and judgement than ticking every box, but you’ll likely have:
 



  





 Experience
 


* 5+ years in data engineering, analytics engineering, or data architecture
* Experience designing solutions end-to-end, not just building parts of them



  





 Strong foundations in
 


* Advanced SQL (T-SQL / PL-SQL, optimisation, performance)
* Cloud platforms (Azure preferred, but AWS / Snowflake experience is equally valued)
* Modern BI tools (Power BI, Qlik, Tableau)
* Data warehouse automation and modern architecture patterns



  





 Mindset
 


* You take pride in enabling others through solid foundations
* You care deeply about data quality, lineage, and governance
* You enjoy learning - whether that’s new cloud services, AI integrations, or better architectural patterns
* You prefer elegant systems over quick fixes



  





 Ways of working
 


* Hybrid setup - Stockholm-based, flexible office presence
* Swedish work culture: trust, balance, autonomy, and responsibility
* Six weeks of vacation
* Flexible compensation model (fixed salary available if preferred)
* Guaranteed paid baseline even between assignments
* Opportunity for ownership/shares for long-term engagement



  





 Fluent Swedish is strongly preferred due to customer interaction, but exceptional candidates may be considered even if Swedish isn’t yet perfect.
 



  





 Who thrives here?
 



 This role is ideal if you:
 


* Are tired of over-engineered bureaucracy or under-engineered shortcuts
* Want to influence both product direction and customer outcomes
* Enjoy working in a Nordic, collaborative environment where people help each other
* Want stability
 *and* 
 the energy of a scale-up



  





 Build foundations. Enable intelligence. Ship things that matter.
 



  





 If you believe great AI starts with great data - and that great data starts with thoughtful architecture - this could be the most rewarding role you’ve had in years.

title: Sweden CRM Executive (Maternity Cover)
description:
Are you creative and detail-oriented with a passion for the iGaming industry?
   

  

 This is a key role within the Sweden CRM team where the Sweden CRM Executive is responsible for the day-to-day execution of operational tasks as planned and agreed together with the Sweden CRM Manager, according to the brand vision and strategy. You will also be assisting with creating the monthly CRM campaign plan as well as following up on campaign results.
   

  

 As a real doer, in this role, you will be writing copy, requesting creatives, ensuring the content of the market's sites are up-to-date as well as executing and delivering customer communications through all targeted marketing channels (primarily email, SMS, inbox & pop-up).
   

  

 Following the brand values, tone of voice and long-term strategy in all communication is of the essence in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
* Assisting the Sweden CRM team with creating the monthly Sweden CRM campaign plan as well as following up on results independently and together with the BI team
* Coordinating campaign briefs and requests within the team and/or to central teams according to agreed timelines
* Creating and publishing engaging copy according to the brand's tone of voice. The copy will be used for customer communication (onsite content, emails, banners etc) to encourage new and existing players to engage with the site and take part in promotions
* Updating content such as text and resources on the brand site
* Utilizing internal and third-party provider platforms to create campaign-specific pages and promotions. Ensure correct groups/segments/offers are used, that correct sections of the website are updated and that items are published/unpublished as per plans
* Managing and executing the brands' communication delivery, accurately and as per given timelines. Responsibilities will include setting up, testing, sending, tracking and reporting on email, SMS, inbox & pop-ups
* Setting up and execution of automated activities (all lifecycle stages)
* Assisting in the planning of upcoming campaigns
* Establishing solid communication channels to central operations to inform them about planned campaigns to ensure synergy


 While the chosen candidate needs to be fluent in Swedish, please send in your CV in English.
   

  

 At ComeOn, we have adapted a Hybrid Work model which means that we offer our employees an option to pick their workstation for the day. Want to work from the office a few days a week and some days from home? That's totally fine with us! ComeOn is known for their inviting and vibrant offices that offer creative areas for collaboration and desk set-ups designed for a Hybrid Work model. When you visit one of our offices you will always be welcomed by a friendly face that will take good care of you. It's our curiosity that drives our innovative business forward and we work hard in a run together spirit and we always make sure to top it up by having fun! You will not regret picking ComeOn as your next place of work.
   

  

 At ComeOn Group we value diversity, and we take concrete action to ensure fairness in our recruitment process. We are committed to assess candidates on their merit without discriminating against any applicant for whatever reason that is protected by law. We truly value you, as you are. Want to know more about us just visit our website or any of our social media channels to take a deep dive into our culture!
   

  

 Want to know more about us just visit our website www.comeon-group.com or any of our social media channels to take a deep dive into our culture!
   

  

**Requirements**
* Fluent in Sweden, both written and spoken
* Excellent knowledge of English
* Marketing mindset and analytical traits
* Methodical and structured
* Social and loves working in multi-cultural environment
* Like sport, casino, live casino or other type of games
* Experience in gaming industry is good, but not a must


**Benefits**
 So what can you expect from ComeOn as a place of work?
   

  

* A competitive remuneration package inc. a company bonus scheme! 💰
* Fantastic quarterly team events and weekly company events 😎
* A one-time Hybrid Allowance of €250 to help you set up a comfortable workstation at home (we're truly Hybrid!)
* On top of our Hybrid work arrangement, up to 40 days a year to work fully remote from anywhere
* A comprehensive, International private Health Insurance
* And more benefits offered based on office location 🥳

title: Administratör till samhällsbyggnadsförvaltningen
description:
Vi har bestämt oss! Vi ska bli en kommun i framkant – och har allt som krävs för att lyckas. Korta beslutsvägar, samarbete över verksamhetsgränser och viljan att våga mer. Våra höga ambitioner ger dig med eget driv möjligheter att växa och skapa positiv förändring för medborgarna. Som medarbetare i Ekerö kommun får du en värdefull roll i vår unika övärld – och vi ser fram emot din ansökan.
   

  

**Samhällsbyggnadsförvaltningens stab** 
 upprätthåller ett gemensamt, robust och effektivt administrativt stöd inom förvaltningen. På staben arbetar vi för en rättssäker ärendehantering samt utveckling och förvaltning av arbetssätt, rutiner och verktyg. Vi samordnar, kvalitetssäkrar och följer upp förvaltningens verksamhet och arbetar på uppdrag av fyra nämnder.
   

  

 Jobba i Ekerö kommun
   

  

**Arbetsbeskrivning**
 Vi tror på dig och din förmåga – därför ger vi dig stort utrymme i din roll. Många som jobbar hos oss uppskattar förtroendet och ansvaret de får i vår kommun, eftersom det bidrar till mycket lärande och utveckling i vardagen. För att lyckas är du trygg i dig själv, ditt yrke och har förmågan att både ta för dig – och sätta gränser.
   

  

 Du kommer att ingå i staben som är en arbetsgrupp om 8 medarbetare med verksamhetsutveckling och administration som två huvudsakliga inriktningar. Du ingår i administratörsteamet som bland annat ansvarar för diarieföring av inkommande handlingar, utlämnande av allmänna handlingar, arkivering med stöd av informationshanteringsplan, kvalitetssäkring av arbetssätt samt service till allmänheten. I uppdraget kan ansvar för kund-och leverantörsfakturor samt kravhantering komma att bli aktuellt.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker dig med arkiv- eller registratorsutbildning, eller annan utbildning som vi bedömer som likvärdig och som har erfarenhet av liknande arbetsuppgifter. Du har kunskap om lagar som tryckfrihetsförordningen, offentlighets- och sekretesslagen, GDPR och arkivlagen. Det är meriterande om du har arbetat med liknande arbetsuppgifter samt har erfarenhet av arbete i en politiskt styrdorganisation. Eftersom samhällsbyggnadsförvaltningen utvecklar, och strävar efter, ökad digitalhantering kräver rollen hög digitalmognad och intresse samt viss IT-kompetens.
   

  

 För att lyckas med arbetet som administratör hos oss krävs att du kan hantera många olika arbetsuppgifter samtidigt och att du trivs med uppgiften att vara spindeln i nätet. Du är ordningsam, noggrann och kan arbeta strukturerat och metodiskt även vid hög arbetsbelastning. Du tycker om att kommunicera med allmänheten och har ett serviceinriktat förhållningssätt. Som person är du utåtriktad och duktig på att samarbeta med andra. Du trivs med ett arbete i högt tempo med många kontakter och kontinuerlig utveckling. Vi lägger stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper som är viktiga för tjänsten. Du är van vid att koordinera, administrera och dokumentera uppgifter. Du har förmåga att se helhet samtidigt som du kan se detaljerna.
   

  

* flerårig erfarenhet inom uppdraget.
* Erfarenhet av digitalt dokument- och ärendehanteringssystem är nödvändigt, meriterande är kunskaper i Nova, Ecos och/eller Evolution.
* Kunskaper i förvaltningslag, kommunallag, offentlighet- och sekretesslagen, tryckfrihetsförordningen, GDPR och arkivlagen


 Vi ser gärna att du också uppfyller följande kvalifikationer:
   

  

* kunskaper i ekonomisystemet Raindance för hantering av kund- och leverantörsfakturor samt kravhantering.


 Utbildning
   

  

* arkiv- eller registratorsutbildning, eller annan utbildning som vi bedömer som likvärdig och som har erfarenhet av liknande arbetsuppgifter


**Tillträde:** 
 2026-05-04 eller enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Visstid till och med december 2026
   

  

 Så tar du dig till Ekerö kommun
   

  

**Om Ekerö kommun**
 Vi är en mängd olika verksamheter som tillsammans skapar en unik kommun – där vi alla hjälps åt över enhets- och verksamhetsgränser.
   

  

 Vi lever vår värdegrund som innebär ett stort engagemang, god kommunikation med öppen dialog och ett professionellt förhållningssätt. Som en mindre kommun i stockholmsregionen kan vi både erbjuda närhet till varandra och en ambitiös utvecklingsresa. För att bli en kommun i framkant behöver vi fylla på med nya perspektiv, och vi hoppas att du vill vara med och bidra med dina.
   

  

 Ekerö kommun vill vara en attraktiv arbetsgivare och strävar efter ett tydligt fokus på hållbarhet. Under förutsättning att verksamhetens möjlighet att uppfylla sina mål kvarstår, har kommunen en positiv inställning till distansarbete när så är möjligt.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder t.ex. friskvårdsbidrag, löneväxling till pension, växling av semesterdagstillägg till lediga dagar och rökfri arbetstid.
   

  

 För att kvalitetssäkra vår rekryteringsprocess ber vi dig att skicka in ansökan digitalt, och inte via e-post eller post.
   

  

 Vi har redan tagit ställning till rekryteringskanaler och marknadsföring och vill inte ha kontakt med mediasäljare, rekryteringssajter och liknande.

title: Projektledare digitalisering - hälso- och sjukvård
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
 Hos Sopra Steria är du mer än en projektledare – du är en nyckelperson i utvecklingen av framtidens digitala hälso- och sjukvård. I denna roll arbetar du i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och IT, med fokus på att stödja våra kunder i deras digitaliseringsresa inom vård och omsorg.
   

  

 Du leder och driver uppdrag kopplade till införande, utveckling och förbättring av IT-stöd i komplexa vårdmiljöer. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med vårdverksamhet, IT-organisationer, leverantörer och andra intressenter, där din förmåga att skapa struktur, engagemang och framdrift är avgörande.
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett starkt team av konsulter med djup kompetens inom digitalisering av vård och omsorg, i en miljö som präglas av kunskapsdelning, kvalitet och samhällsnytta.
   

  

**Dina ansvarsområden**
* Leda och driva projekt och uppdrag inom digitalisering av hälso- och sjukvård
* Stötta kunder vid införande, uppgraderingar och förändringsarbete kopplat till IT-stöd
* Fungera som brygga mellan vårdverksamhet, IT och systemleverantörer
* Säkerställa att lösningar möter både verksamhetskrav och tekniska förutsättningar
* Planera, följa upp och rapportera leveranser enligt etablerade modeller
* Bidra med din erfarenhet i förbättrings- och utvecklingsinitiativ inom vårddigitalisering


**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av att arbeta inom hälso- och sjukvård och som trivs i en rådgivande och ledande roll nära kund, t.ex. som projektledare, applikationsspecialist, förvaltningsledare eller verksamhetsnära expert.
   

  

**Du Har Sannolikt**
* Deltagit i eller drivit förändrings- och/eller utvecklingsprojekt inom hälso- och sjukvården.
* God förståelse för vårdprocesser och informationsflöden
* Vana att arbeta i komplexa organisationer med många intressenter
* Förmåga att kommunicera tydligt och skapa förtroende på alla nivåer
* Relevant högskole- eller universitetsutbildning
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av arbete som konsult
* Kunskap i Cambios produktportfölj
* Erfarenhet av införande av systemstöd i större organisationer, t.ex. Cambios journalsystem Cosmic.
* Erfarenhet av förändringsledning eller agila arbetssätt
* Certifiering inom projektledning (t.ex. PMI, Prince2 eller motsvarande)


**Varför välja Sopra Steria?**
* En plats där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad – Vi bygger smarta och hållbara lösningar som förbättrar samhälle och verksamheter med användarupplevelsen i centrum.
* Stark företagskultur med Power of Sharing – Vi tror på kraften i kunskapsdelning, transparens och samarbete. Hos oss når vi längre tillsammans.
* Toppbetyg som arbetsplats – Great Place to Work har rankat oss år efter år som en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser och vi har mottagit utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad.
* Del av en europeisk ledare inom digital transformation – Med över 50 000 experter i många länder kan vi både påverka stora projekt och ge dig möjligheter att växa globalt.
* Värderingar som genomsyrar allt vi gör – Vi sätter kundens behov i fokus, prioriterar respekt, professionalitet, nyfikenhet och en kollektiv förmåga att agera positivt och skapa hållbara resultat tillsammans.


**Ansökan**
 Nu vill vi gärna höra lite om dig! Ansök enkelt genom att antingen ladda upp ditt CV eller länka direkt till ditt LinkedIn-konto via annonsen. Om det fortfarande finns något du funderar över är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Marie Berg, marie.berg@soprasteria.com eller Talent Acquisition Partner Svante Larsson, svante.larsson2@soprasteria.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att få höra ifrån dig!
   

  

 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.

title: System manager
description:
**Att jobba som system manager**
 Som system manager kommer du ha en central roll i att säkerställa att våra verksamhetsnära system fungerar stabilt, säkert och är långsiktigt hållbara. Du ansvarar för ett antal systemportföljer inom områden som juridik, finance, treasury, SRC, inköp, HR och IT-administration. Ditt nära samarbete med verksamheten bidrar till att systemen utvecklas i linje med organisationens behov och skapar verklig kundnytta.
   

  

 Tillsammans med funktionsansvarig arbetar ni med portföljstyrning, uppföljning och avtalshantering kopplat till systemfloran. Du har också ett övergripande systemansvar där dokumentation, uppdateringar och regelbundna hälsocheckar av applikationerna ingår. I rollen stöttar du även avtalshantering och avtalsdialog kopplade till systemportföljerna. Det innebär att du arbetar aktivt med att följa upp, förvalta och utveckla avtalen så att de fortsätter stödja verksamhetens behov. I arbetet har du nära dialog med IT-säkerhet för att säkerställa att våra system uppfyller kraven på säkerhet och förvaltningsbarhet.
   

  

 Teamet består idag av tre systemansvariga som arbetar tätt tillsammans från kontoret på Lindhagensgatan 86 i Stockholm. Arbetet präglas av samarbete och kunskapsdelning där ni stöttar varandra och vid behov hjälper till att balansera arbetsbelastningen mellan de olika portföljerna. Rollen innebär många kontaktytor inom Skandia och ger dig möjlighet att arbeta nära flera olika verksamhetsområden där din IT-kompetens gör verklig skillnad.
   

  

 Teamet arbetar med verksamhetsnära system, där majoriteten av lösningarna ligger i molnet. Arbetet sker därför utanför den traditionella SAFe-strukturen och fokuserar mer på ett nära samarbete med verksamheten. Arbetsytorna finns främst i Azure DevOps och teamet arbetar med dagliga stand-ups för att skapa transparens, framdrift och ett effektivt samarbete.
   

  

 Genom rollen bidrar du till att Skandia kan fortsätta ha en stark ekonomisk stabilitet, god förvaltningsbarhet och hög applikationssäkerhet. Samtidigt får du möjlighet att arbeta brett inom organisationen och utveckla både din tekniska och verksamhetsnära kompetens.
   

  

 Vi arbetar hybrid vilket innebär arbete på kontoret varvat med distansarbete. I rollen kommer du att rapportera till gruppchef inom IT koncern & dokumentation.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Vi ser att du har erfarenhet av att arbeta med IT-system och trivs i en roll där du samarbetar nära både tekniska team och verksamheten. Du har en god kommunikativ förmåga och känner dig bekväm i dialog med olika intressenter inom Skandia.
   

  

 Du arbetar strukturerat i ditt dagliga arbete och har förmågan att ta initiativ och driva ditt eget arbete framåt. Rollen kräver också att du kan skapa överblick över flera system och prioritera mellan olika aktiviteter på ett effektivt sätt.
   

  

 Meriterande för rollen är om du har erfarenhet av molnbaserade system och arbete i verktyg som Azure DevOps, likaså en utbildning inom IT eller cloud.
   

  

 Du behöver kunna kommunicera obehindrat på svenska, både i tal och skrift
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi jobbar med löpande urval så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. I ansökan kommer vi att ställa ett antal urvalsfrågor som ligger till grund för första urvalet.
   

  

 Läs mer om hela vår rekryteringsprocess här.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen vänligen kontakta rekryterande chef Rina Rosengren på Rina.Rosengren.Bouius@skandia.se.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rekryteringsprocessen vänligen kontakta Talent Acquisition Partner Harald Brehmer på harald.brehmer@skandia.se.
   

  

 Vi kommer att återkoppla till alla som söker oavsett om du går vidare eller inte.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Service Manager
description:
Be a part of the change!
   

  

 We’ve chosen to do something incredible. We’re totally transforming our business and building our future with one clear purpose – to deliver a smoke-free future. Swedish Match is an affiliate of PMI and has been a leader in the industry for more than 200 years.
   

  

 In the Nordic region, we are 1,800 employees based in Sweden, Denmark, Finland and Norway working in various functions and teams and together we are collaborating to deliver a smoke-free Nordics.
   

  

**In this role** 
 you’ll join our
 **Regional (Europe) Service Management** 
 team and collaborate with colleagues and partners across countries and time zones to keep business-critical services stable, secure, and continuously improving.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As IT Service Manager, you’ll lead delivery and operations for IT services of various criticalities. You’ll ensure services meet agreed service levels, follow IT service management practices, and continuously improve performance and user experience. You’ll also contribute to budgeting, vendor oversight, and compliance with IT policies and regulations.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Own the service lifecycle: Manage services from requirements through deployment and ongoing operations, ensuring performance, availability, and security/compliance.
* Monitor performance and report on outcomes: Track service/application health, handle issue resolution, ensure SLA/target alignment, and produce regular performance updates for collaborators.
* Run ITSM processes: Execute ITIL-aligned incident, problem, and change management, and support smooth transition of new solutions into operations.
* Manage the budget: Own the budget for service/application maintenance and related roadmap investments.
* Ensure service continuity: Define, maintain, and test continuity and disaster recovery plans.
* Drive security and compliance: Ensure roadmaps and operations meet security standards (including patching) and comply with policies and regulations.
* Build durable documentation: Maintain clear service documentation and ensure knowledge is captured and reusable.
* Continuously improve: Use performance data to reduce incidents, strengthen problem management, and improve user satisfaction.
* Own stakeholder experience: Measure customer satisfaction and address concerns quickly and transparently.
* Collaborate across teams: Partner with product and traditional IT teams to resolve critical issues and manage dependencies and new requirements.
* Manage vendors and partners: Oversee operational service providers, manage escalations, and coordinate contract adjustments with vendor management.


**What You Bring**
* Strong IT background (or relevant education) with 5+ years of experience in an IT function.
* 3+ years of experience in service management, primarily in operational services.
* Solid understanding of IT service management frameworks, principles, and practices.
* Customer-first mindset and a track record of improving service quality and user satisfaction.
* Familiarity with ITIL, Agile, and IT Risk & Controls.
* Strong organization and communication skills to manage delivery across multiple collaborators and vendors.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities/projects and work through dependencies in complex environments.
* Analytical problem-solver with a continuous-improvement mindset.
* End-to-end ownership mentality: you take accountability for outcomes, not just tasks.


 Please note that relocation support is not available for this role.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 Our success depends on our dedicated employees who come to work here every single day with a sense of purpose and an appetite for progress. Join Swedish Match and you too can:
   

  

* Seize the freedom to define your future and ours. We’ll empower you to take risks, experiment and explore.
* Be part of an inclusive, diverse culture, where everyone’s contribution is respected; collaborate with some of the world’s best people and feel like you belong.
* Pursue your ambitions and develop your skills with a global business – our staggering size and scale provides endless opportunities to progress.
* Enjoy flexibility of hybrid way of working - split your time between working from our office or the comfort of your home, where it works best for you in line with business needs.
* Take pride in delivering our promise to society: to deliver a smoke-free future.


**24579**

title: AI Solution Lead
description:
AI Solutions Lead - Financial Services
 



  





 A well-established and highly respected financial services organisation is looking for an AI Solutions Lead to define and drive its artificial intelligence strategy.
 



  





 With strong financial performance and an organisation-wide digital transformation underway, this is a rare opportunity to shape how AI is adopted across a growing financial institution.
 



  





 The organisation is investing heavily in its data and cloud platform within a Microsoft Azure environment, creating the foundation for modern AI and machine learning capabilities. This role will take ownership of how those capabilities evolve - identifying opportunities, designing solutions, and leading the development of intelligent systems that deliver real value to the business.
 



  





 This is a role suited to someone who enjoys working at the intersection of strategy, engineering, and applied AI.
 



  





**The Role:** 




 As the AI Solutions Lead, you will be responsible for defining and delivering the organisation’s AI vision.
 



  





 You will work closely with technology, data, and business stakeholders to identify where AI can have the greatest impact - and then design and implement solutions to support those opportunities.
 



  





 The role is intentionally broad and can suit candidates coming from data science, machine learning engineering, or AI software engineering backgrounds.
 



  





**Responsibilities include:** 



* Defining and owning the organisation’s AI strategy and roadmap
* Identifying high-value AI and automation opportunities across the business
* Designing and developing AI-driven solutions, from early prototypes through to production systems
* Building and deploying machine learning models, AI services, or intelligent applications
* Exploring and implementing Generative AI and LLM-based solutions where appropriate
* Working with data and engineering teams to integrate AI into existing data platforms and applications
* Establishing best practices for ML development, experimentation, and deployment
* Acting as the organisation’s internal AI expert, advising leadership on emerging technologies and opportunities
* Helping build a culture of data-driven decision making and AI adoption



  





 Because of the organisation’s size and structure, this role offers a high degree of ownership and autonomy. You will play a key role in shaping how AI evolves within the business.
 



  





**What They’re Looking For** 




 The company is open to candidates from a variety of AI-related backgrounds, including Data Science, Machine Learning Engineering, or AI/Software Engineering, as long as you bring both strong technical capability and the ability to translate AI into real business value.
 



  





 You may have experience with:
 


* Machine learning and applied AI
* Developing and deploying ML models or AI-powered systems
* Building AI-driven applications or services
* Working with cloud environments (Azure preferred)
* Python and modern ML / AI frameworks
* Data platforms, APIs, and scalable systems
* Generative AI, LLMs, or AI copilots
* MLOps or model deployment workflows



  





 Equally important is the ability to:
 


* Understand business problems and translate them into technical AI solutions
* Communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Take ownership of projects and drive initiatives forward



  





 Experience within financial services or other regulated industries is beneficial but not required.
 



  





**Why This Opportunity?** 




 This is an exciting moment to join the organisation as it accelerates its data, cloud, and AI transformation.
 



  




* Define the AI strategy: You will have the opportunity to shape how AI is used across the organisation.
* Work across the full AI lifecycle: From identifying opportunities and building prototypes to deploying real production systems.
* High-impact environment: The organisation is large enough to deliver meaningful projects but small enough that decisions happen quickly.
* Modern technology journey: Significant investment is being made in cloud, data platforms, and advanced analytics, creating the right environment for AI innovation.
* Autonomy and ownership: Individuals are trusted to take responsibility and drive change.



  





 Additional Information
 


* Location: Stockholm
* Employment type: Permanent
* Environment: Microsoft Azure-based data platform
* Benefits: Competitive package including pension, insurance, and generous holiday allowance

title: Senior Technology Management Consultant
description:
The key word is
 **change** 
 . In a world where technology and business are merging, we are seeking a Senior Technology Management Consultant to act as the client's strategic advisor in complex transformation journeys. Your focus will be on defining and evaluating IT-strategy, and leading implementation initiatives within the next generation of business applications and technical platforms.
   

  

**Who is Umain?**
 We were founded with a
 **heritage in digital product development and engineering** 
 . This background gives us a unique perspective, ensuring that our strategic advice is always grounded in
 **technical feasibility and execution excellence** 
 . We are now expanding our focus to help clients at the C-level, linking core technology strategy directly to business outcomes.
   

  

 Umain is proudly part of
 **Eidra** 
 , a consultancy collective driven by the conviction that business transformation requires a combination of management consulting and best-in-breed expertise in creativity, engineering, and data. This partnership means that while you focus on strategic IT-Management and enterprise architecture, you have full access to orchestrate common capabilities from the best specialized companies within the collective.
   

  

 Our team consists of individuals with experience from the largest consulting firms, but with the flexibility, speed, and entrepreneurial drive that characterize a modern, flat organization. At Umain, we highly value
 **collaboration** 
 and
 **entrepreneurial spirit** 
 . Here, you are not only expected to lead demanding client assignments; you are also expected to actively contribute to our internal development, whether it involves shaping new service offerings in AI/Data or mentoring our junior talent. We reward those who take ownership and drive us forward.
   

  

**The Role: What will you do?**
 As a Senior Technology Management Consultant Within Tech Advisory & IT Management, You Are The Client's Trusted Advisor And The Driving Force Behind Strategic IT Initiatives. Your Assignments Will Involve
   

  

* IT Strategy & Enterprise Architecture: Advising clients on technology direction, investment priorities, and portfolio decisions. Ensuring that future-state architecture for business-critical applications is in line with business goals & strategy.
* Governance, Operating Model & Sourcing: Helping clients design the structures that make technology delivery work. From IT governance frameworks and risk management to operating model redesign, team topology, vendor strategy, and FinOps.
* CxO-Level Program & Project Management: Leading large-scale, complex IT transformation programs. Engaging with C-suite, ensuring strategic intent translates into delivery reality.
* Internal Leadership: Actively contributing to Umain’s business development, mentoring junior colleagues, and developing our competency pool.


**Who are you?**
**We Are Looking For Someone Who**
* Has 7+ years of relevant experience, preferably within a consultancy setting, across IT strategy or technology transformation, in roles such as CIO, CTO, Technology leadership, IT Management Consultant, Program Manager.
* Is driven by a deep passion for transforming technology strategy into measurable business outcomes.
* Has a documented ability to lead and execute large-scale IT change initiatives across various industries.
* Is a natural leader who creates an inclusive and results-focused team environment.
* Has an exceptional ability to structure and communicate complex technical and architectural concepts to both engineering teams and executive stakeholders.


**Required Competencies**
* IT Domain Knowledge: Deep expertise across at least two of Eidra's five IT management domains: IT Strategy & Portfolio, Enterprise Architecture & Data, Operating Model & Workforce, Governance Risk & Trust, or Sourcing & FinOps.
* System & Architecture Experience: Hands-on experience with enterprise platforms and business-critical systems (e.g. ERP, CRM, modern data stacks, proprietary and custom-built solutions), combined with an understanding of integration patterns, platform design, and cloud architecture.
* Strategic AI: Solid understanding of how to utilize and integrate AI tools and technologies in core business processes and systems to reap the benefits of modern technological innovations.
* Collaborative Mindset: A collaborative and open approach, with a genuine commitment to continuous development, team building, and long-term client relationships.
* Analytical Drive: A critical-thinking mindset with the ability to see the bigger picture, quickly identify bottlenecks and opportunities, and translate complexity into clear recommendations.
* Language: Fluency in English, both written and spoken, is essential.


 Do you want to help build the future digital backbone for our clients?
   

  

***Background check***
*Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our internal policies. The check is carried out only with your consent and is ordered by our CISO through our approved screening partner. The scope of the check depends on the role level. This step is performed late in the recruitment process and is used solely to support a secure and fact‑based hiring decision.*
 Umain is a digital product consultancy. We shape, ship and scale digital products at speed. Founded in Stockholm in 2001, we are a growing team of 100+ experts in digital product strategy, design, and technology.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Enterprise Architect Director
description:
**Chief Enterprise Architect**
 Do you want to work in a global company where you can contribute to a more sustainable food production? DeLaval is a leading developer, manufacturer, and supplier of solutions for dairy farmers around the world. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers do more with less.
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
 DeLaval is seeking a senior Chief Enterprise Architect to own, define, and govern the enterprise architecture of the DeLaval Group. The role has end-to-end accountability for ensuring that DeLaval’s business strategy is consistently translated into a coherent, secure, and scalable technology landscape across all business domains and geographies.
   

  

 The Chief Enterprise Architect acts as the company’s architectural authority, balancing long-term strategic direction with near-term execution, and ensuring that digital investments deliver measurable business value while reducing complexity and technical risk.
   

  

 This role provides enterprise-wide leadership through mandate, governance, and influence. It does not initially include direct line management but carries clear functional leadership across a federated architecture community.
   

  

**Scope and Mandate**
 The Chief Enterprise Architect has enterprise-level accountability for enterprise architecture principles, target states, and roadmaps; architecture governance, decision frameworks, and compliance; alignment between business strategy, operating model, and technology; and architectural coherence across ERP, CRM, CPQ, digital, IoT, data, and integration platforms. The Chief Enterprise Architect reports to the CIO.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Enterprise Architecture Strategy
* Define and continuously evolve DeLaval’s enterprise architecture strategy and target architecture.
* Translate business strategy, growth ambitions, and industry trends into actionable architectural roadmaps.
* Ensure architectural decisions support scalability, security, sustainability, and time-to-market.
* Architecture Governance & Decision-Making
* Own and operate DeLaval’s enterprise architecture governance model.
* Define architecture artefacts, principles, standards, and reference architectures.
* Govern solution design and major initiatives.


**Technology & Platform Leadership**
* Set enterprise direction for core business platforms, integration and API strategy, cloud and infrastructure architecture, and digital and IoT platforms.
* Drive simplification, reuse, and reduction of technical debt.


**Information & Data Architecture**
* Own the enterprise information and data architecture.
* Define enterprise information models, data domains, and principles.
* Establish readiness for analytics and AI.


**Business & Stakeholder Collaboration**
* Act as a strategic advisor to the CIO and senior leaders.
* Bridge business and IT.


**Architecture Community Leadership**
* Provide functional leadership to solution and domain architects.
* Establish an enterprise architecture community of practice.


**Success Measures**
* Reduced complexity, faster delivery, increased reuse, stronger business alignment, and improved data quality.


**Strategic Impact**
 This role is central to DeLaval’s evolution into a digitally enabled, data-driven enterprise.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 To be successful in this role we believe that you have:
   

  

* Several years of experience in enterprise or solution architecture.
* Strong ability to translate business strategy into architecture roadmaps.
* Experience with ERP, CRM, digital platforms, IoT, cloud, and data architecture.
* Solid understanding of architecture frameworks and governance (e.g., TOGAF).
* Skilled in driving simplification, standardization, and reducing technical debt.
* Strong stakeholder skills and ability to lead through influence.
* Excellent communicator who can bridge business and IT.
* Proven experience in driving projects and leading transformation.


**Working at DeLaval**
 Our core values Passion, People, Professionals and Partnerships connect individuals across entities and geographies. Success is far more than knowledge – it is strongly related to behaviour. At DeLaval we are all guided by our three behaviours: Set Direction, Make Things Happen and One DeLaval.
   

  

 We Offer You a Workplace Like No Other, Where State-of-the-art Technology Goes Hand In Hand With Animal Welfare. DeLaval Is a Part Of The Tetra Laval Group Together With Tetra Pak And Sidel. In Addition, We Offer
   

  

* Secure employment and benefits from the collective agreement (occupational pension, work-related accident insurance).
* Parental leave compensation (approx. 10 percent of the employee's monthly salary).
* Wellness allowance of SEK 4 000/year.
* Private healthcare insurance.
* Flexible working hours and reduced working hours.


**Additional information**
 This is a full-time permanent position based at DeLaval’s headquarters in Tumba, south of Stockholm. We offer a hybrid workplace model, allowing flexibility to work remotely.
   

  

 We review applications ongoing. We do not accept applications via email, however if you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process don’t hesitate to contact us.
   

  

**Contact**
 Hiring manager: Jesper Särnholm, CIO and Vice President of Information Technology, jesper.sarnholm@delaval.com
   

  

 Recruiter: Mathias Gunnstedt, Mathias.Gunnstedt@delaval.com
   

  

**About DeLaval**
 Our vision is to make sustainable food production possible. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers, dairy farmers, do more with less by providing world-leading milking equipment and solutions.
   

  

 Today, DeLaval has approximately 4,500 passionate professionals operating in more than 100 markets around the world. DeLaval is part of the Tetra Laval Group.  See more at corporate.delaval.com

title: Junior Print Designer, H&M Womanswear -  1 year temporary position
description:
**Job Description**

 Are you passionate about print and ready to make your mark in global fashion?
   

  

 Join our Print team at H&M Womanswear as a Junior Print Designer and be part of creating prints that inspire millions of customers worldwide. This is your chance to bring fresh energy, creativity and a global perspective to collections sold across all H&M markets and channels.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

**What you'll do**




 You will work closely with our Print Designers in cross-functional setups, assisting in developing aspirational commercial fashion prints for a global audience. From repeat patterns to placement prints, you'll contribute to collections that define trends and connect with our customers. We want you to bring your ideas to the table – identifying the latest print trends and translating them into designs that resonate with our target customer.
   

  





 In this role both your creativity and organizational skills matters. You'll be involved in the full design process, assisting in the creation of both commercially viable prints and pushing boundaries with fresh, innovative concepts. Being a quick learner with strong communication skills and a flexible attitude is key, as you'll need to adapt and thrive in our fast-paced environment.
   

  

  

  





**Who you are**




 You have a genuine passion for print trends from both commercial and aspirational perspectives. High energy, independent drive and creativity come naturally to you, along with strong administrative skills to keep everything running smoothly.
   

  





 You're curious, open-minded and ready to learn from our global print team while developing your individual design skills.
   

  





  

  





 We belive you:
   

  




* Minimum BA qualification in Fashion Textile/Print or Graphic Design


* A minimum of 1-2 year’s industry experience as a Junior Fashion Print Designer


* Experience of creating all over repeat, placement prints, checks, stripes, florals, conversationals etc.


* Knowledge of different print techniques, general print technicalities and processes


* Excellent illustration and drawing skills


* Genuine and high-level fashion forward sense for global fashion trends and its print trends


* Strong eye for colors and garment-print connection


* Solid and fast skills in Adobe Creative Suite programs


* 3D CLO work experience is meriting


* Strong communication and organizational skills and flexible approach


* Fluent in English (Swedish is not necessary)


* Experience from Womanswear and/or Womanswear within underwear, nightwear or swimwear is meriting.


**Additional Information**

 This is a one-year temporary position with an amazing opportunity to grow and learn. You'll report to staff responsible for the print team and gain invaluable experience working on global collections.
   

  

  

  

**Does this sound like your next challenge?**
  

 Submit your application as soon as possible, CV in English and relevant fashion print /graphic portfolio work (pdf max 10mb/uploading) or link. Your portfolio should include vision/mood boards, full print design process and final print works/collections. Please ensure to include some work clearly relatable to the H&M Women’s customer. We would like see work that shows your creative aspirational side as well as your commercial fashion sense.
   

  

**Applications must include portfolio and meeting the above criteria to be considered.**




  

  





**WHO WE ARE**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  

  

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
  

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.
   

  




* 25% Staff discount on all our H&M Group brands, both in stores and online (H&M, COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories and ARKET).
* H&M Incentive Program – HIP. Learn more about the program here.
* In addition to our global benefits, our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits.



  

  

**JOIN US**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here. Please apply as soon as possible. Applications will be reviewed on ongoing bases.
   

  





 \*W
 *e are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application*

title: Project Manager till Axfood IT, Stockholm
description:
Välkommen till Axfood IT, en av matbranschens största IT-avdelningar med ungefär 400 medarbetare. Det är vi som ser till att Axfood, och alla våra kedjor, kan ligga i framkant vad gäller digital utveckling. Vi jobbar med att utveckla och förbättra allt ifrån e-handel till logistiklösningar och AI.
   

  

 Hos Axfood IT blir du del av ett sammanhang som utmanar och levererar lösningar som gör skillnad, både för våra kollegor och våra kunder. Här finns det alltid möjlighet att lära sig om ny teknik och växa, både som individ och tillsammans med kollegorna.
   

  

**Ditt nya team**
 Projektkontoret på Axfood IT är en strategisk funktion som stöttar hela IT-organisationen i att driva projekt med struktur, kvalitet och affärsfokus. Här arbetar projektledare med olika bakgrund och kompetensområden, och du kommer att ingå i ett team som har ett nära samarbete med både verksamhet och teknik. Vi driver projekt inom allt från infrastruktur och säkerhet till BI, systemutveckling och digitala tjänster, med målet att skapa värde för våra användare och kunder.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som projektledare hos oss ansvarar du för att planera, leda och följa upp IT-projekt från start till mål. Vi vet att det är få saker som är så viktiga som “rätt person på rätt plats” och du är därför inte begränsad till ett särskilt område, utan kommer få chans att driva projekt med olika skala och natur. Du arbetar nära både verksamhet och teknik, och har ansvar för att projekt levereras enligt överenskomna mål, budget och tidsramar. Du kommer att vara en nyckelperson i att driva förändring och skapa värde genom digitala lösningar.
   

  

 Framöver ser vi stor potential i projekt kopplat till Business Intelligence, IT Operations och säkerhet och det finns därför stora möjligheter för rätt person att jobba mer med detta.
   

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer att inkludera:**
* Leda IT projekt av olika skala och utformning
* Sätta ihop lämpliga projektgrupper
* Arbeta agilt med Jira och Confluence för planering, uppföljning och dokumentation.
* Säkerställa att projekt levereras enligt tidplan, budget och kvalitet.
* Identifiera och hantera risker, beroenden och förändringar.
* Kommunicera med stakeholders på olika nivåer i organisationen.
* Tillsammans med andra projektledare i organisationen bidra till utveckling av projektmetodik och arbetssätt.


**Stämmer detta in på dig?**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du har erfarenhet av att driva IT-projekt i större organisationer. Du är van att arbeta självständigt, har god kommunikationsförmåga och gillar att skapa struktur i komplexa sammanhang.
   

  

**Vi tror att det är viktigt att du:**
* Har flera års erfarenhet av IT-projektledning i större organisationer.
* Är van att arbeta agilt genom exempelvis Jira och Confluence.
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska.


 Vi ser det som positivt om du också är certifierad inom projektledning (t.ex. PPS, PMP, PRINCE2, SAFe).
   

  

 Framåt ser vi att vi har flera spännande satsningar inom IT Operations, Business Intellegence, SAP och retail mer generellt, så har du erfarenhet av dess områden ser vi det som meriterande.
   

  

**Ansökningsprocessen**
 Vi vill att det ska vara enkelt att söka jobb hos oss. Om du inte har ett CV redo räcker det med att du länkar en väl ifylld LinkedIn-profil. I din ansökan får du svara på de frågor vi behöver svar på i den här delen av processen, och personligt brev är därför inte obligatoriskt.
   

  

 Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan därför tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Vår rekryteringsprocess innehåller tester, intervjuer, bakgrundskontroll och ID-kontroll. Observera att vi inte under denna rekryteringsprocess kommer be dig logga in med ditt Bank-id eller scanna någon QR-kod, men vi kommer be dig styrka din identitet i processens slutskede.
   

  

 Vid frågor om rekrytering på Axfood, kontakta Medarbetarsupporten på jobb@axfood.se. Läs mer: Så går det till när du söker jobb inom Axfood. Om du har frågor om tjänsten, kontakta elisabeth.wehlin@axfood.se. Av GDPR-skäl behandlar vi inga ansökningar eller annan personlig information via mail.
   

  

 Lyssna på en pod om att jobba på Axfood IT, på Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/episode/37BDOFjcKLkdyleKXLEKXZ?si=UVhPBFC4T96dy-tHa9uuDw

title: 3D Motion Artist Intern
description:
We're Omoi (omoi.co)— a creative studio in Stockholm working with companies across space, robotics, defense, and deep tech. Our clients are spread all over the world, and that's just the way we like it.
 




  






 We're looking for a 3D motion artist intern to join us for three months, starting as soon as possible. This is an opportunity for someone fresh out of school (or close to it) who wants to learn from the day-to-day of a creative studio — and a chance for us to learn from you.
 




  






 You don't need a CV full of jobs. But you should have an impeccable eye for detail and love building worlds, products, fuel cell membranes, or whatever strange thing a client throws at you. We work in Blender. If you're also comfortable in Unreal Engine or Houdini, even better. You're into compositing and get a kick out of editing in DaVinci Resolve — that's where we finalize everything.
 




  






 This is a stipend-based internship — not a fully paid position, but you won't be working for free. All work happens in our new studio in central Stockholm (non-negotiable unfortunately). You'll be joining a ten-person team, our hypoallergenic office dog, and clients ranging from fusion propulsion startups to the occasional luxury hotel.
 




  






 There is the potential for this to be converted to a full-time role if it seems like a good fit. 
 




  






 If this sounds like you, hit apply, attach your resume with a link to your portfolio, and let's chat. As long as the work is great, we'll figure out the rest.

title: Automotive Engineers | Stockholm
description:
**Are you passionate about technology, electrification and product development within the automotive industry? At Together Tech, we are seeing strong demand across several R&D assignments within electrified powertrain and HV inverter development.**
 We are now looking to connect with driven engineers who want to work close to the technology and contribute to long‑term, high‑impact automotive projects. We work with leading players across passenger cars, heavy‑duty vehicles and e‑mobility, covering the full development cycle of electric drive systems, power electronics and related domains. Based on your technical background and career ambitions, we will match you with assignments where your competence makes an impact — while supporting your long‑term professional growth. We are currently looking for engineers within several engineering disciplines related to HV inverter and electric powertrain development, including:
   

  

 🔧
 **Mechanical Engineering** 
 : Mechanical design of automotive inverters, including detailed component design, 3D modelling and drawing creation in SolidWorks. Responsibilities include design verification, requirement management, test cases and test reports, working closely with electronics, systems and test engineers.
   

  

 🧪
 **Test Engineering:** 
 contribute to system‑ and product‑level testing within automotive development, including electrical and environmental testing, test specification development, execution and reporting, using laboratory equipment such as oscilloscopes, power meters and climate chambers and test automation with Robot Framework(Python) and LabVIEW.
   

  

 ⚡
 **Hardware / Power Electronics Engineering** 
 : Contribute to LV/HV automotive inverter development, including hardware design and verification, power stage and auxiliary circuit design, schematic capture in Cadence, simulation in LTspice, lab testing, troubleshooting and EMC‑aware documentation.
   

  

 📟
 **Application Engineer / SW Design Engineer:** 
 act as a technical interface towards customers, combining customer support and product configuration with embedded software development and and troubleshooting, using C programming and Robot Framework(Python) together with tools such as Jenkins and Jira.
   

  

**Your technical bakgrund**
* A Bachelor's or Master's degree in a relevant field with several years of experience in the automotive industry.
* You have experience in one or more of the following areas: mechanical design within automotive applications, electrical or environmental testing and verification, embedded software development, or hardware and power electronics development.
* Good command of written and spoken English, proficiency in Swedish is considered an advantage.


**Your personal characteristics**
 Being a consultant puts extra light on having a flexible and curious mindset, a self-reliant way of working and your capability to build strong relationships with customers and colleagues, while keeping track of the target picture. You stay current with industry trends and emerging technologies and are motivated to develop together with us.
   

  

**Together Tech for sustainability**
 We provide opportunities for development through a variety of assignments in different industries, whether it be client projects or in one of our exciting in-house projects. At Together Tech, you work together with other engineers who are passionate about the environment and sustainability, all with a desire to create lasting solutions using technology - or as we say: Better World Tech!
   

  

**Your development & our support🌱**
 Your development and well-being are important to us, and Together Tech offers benefits that support you and your career in the best way. We value the importance of secure employment and fixed salary, and we have a collective agreement. We prioritize your health and provide a wellness allowance of 4000 SEK per year. Moreover, we offer health check-ups, contributions to activities, and wellness discounts.
   

  

 We enjoy spending time together through various social activities and team-building activities suitable for everyone! From after-works and sport activities to pentathlons and corporate conferences. Our commitment is to give you great conditions to grow through various assignments and projects as well as individual development plans. We also offer courses in sustainability and other courses within the framework of your role and goals. We take pride in being recognized as one of Sweden's most attractive employers in 2026, 2025 and 2024 by Karriärföretagen! 🌟
   

  

 Learn more about us at www.togethertech.com.
   

  

 For questions regarding the position, please contact Business Unit Manager Anna Öfwerman on +46790 738 026

title: Data Engineer - Platform
description:
⚡️ What We Do
   

  

 Swiftly gaining ground as Sweden’s industry leader in battery storage and expanding rapidly in selected European markets, Flower is on a mission to enable the energy system of tomorrow.
   

  

 With an industry-leading AI-powered platform at its core, our service includes stabilizing the energy system by enhancing predictability and flexibility for both energy producers and consumers. By combining pioneering technology with a portfolio of flexible energy assets, we break new ground towards a fossil-free energy system, allowing clean energy to power society.
   

  

 🌟Who We Are
   

  

 Tech company at heart – purpose in our DNA. Flower consists of a diverse group of innovative individuals with a strong desire to improve the state of the world.
   

  

 At Flower, we believe trust, collaboration and diversity are essential to not only create an inclusive work environment, but also drive career growth. By embracing varying perspectives, we allow creativity and progress to flourish.
   

  

 To accelerate towards our goal of becoming the pioneering force powering the energy system of tomorrow, we are now looking for a passionate and skilled Data Engineer, Platform.
   

  

 👩‍💻
 **About The Role**
 As a Data Engineer on the Platform squad, you will take ownership of the infrastructure that powers our entire data ecosystem. This isn't just about moving data from A to B; it’s about building a scalable, self-service platform that enables our Data Scientists and Product teams to ship at pace. You will work in the intersection of software engineering and data, ensuring our systems are robust, observable, and high-performance.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop and maintain our core data platform (Data Lakehouse, orchestration, and observability) using Databricks, dbt, and Python.
* Implement CI/CD pipelines for data systems and leverage Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) to ensure reliable, reproducible deployments.
* Identify bottlenecks, optimize distributed compute (Spark) jobs, and assist with cost management to keep our platform lean and fast.
* Partner with product teams to design ingestion frameworks and declarative configurations that allow others to scale their own data needs.
* Ensure data quality, lineage, and security standards are embedded into every workflow, not treated as an afterthought.


**Who You Are**
* 2–3 years of professional experience in software engineering, preferably in data engineering with exposure to cloud-based data platforms (Databricks, Snowflake, BigQuery or similar)
* Proficient in Python and SQL, with an understanding of distributed systems and a passion for writing clean, well-tested code.
* Hands-on experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation) and modern orchestration (Airflow, Dagster, or similar).
* Meticulous in your work, with a keen eye for data quality, correctness, and edge-cases; you take pride in delivering bullet-proof solutions that scale.
* Great team player and communicator, ready to share knowledge, solicit feedback, and collaborate effectively within a diverse, agile team.


 📍
 **Location**
 Our beautiful office is located in the heart of Södermalm, just a short walk from Slussen subway station. We encourage in-office collaboration but support a hybrid work model.
   

  

 ✉️ Apply
   

  

 Our corporate language is English, as we have over 20 nationalities in the office. We therefore appreciate it if you could submit your CV in English.
   

  

 Throughout the recruitment process you will meet with the Talent Partner, Head of Platform, the Team and VP of Engineering.
   

  

 We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

*We kindly but firmly decline any engagement in recruitment assistance for our hiring processes. This includes partnership offers or the sale of recruitment tools.*

title: Enhetschef systemutveckling och förvaltning
description:
Är du en erfaren ledare inom it-området med mycket god samarbetsförmåga och förmåga att anpassa dig till nya förutsättningar? Vi söker dig som vill medverka till att utveckla vår it-förvaltning under ett vikariat på tio månader. Var med och bidra till skolans framtid!
   

  





****Om jobbet****




 Som enhetschef för enheten förvaltning och systemutveckling 1, ansvarar du för flera utvecklingsteam som förvaltar och nyutvecklar funktioner i myndighetens applikationer. Du ansvarar även för leveranser av support, utveckling och förvaltning av några it-stöd som externa it-leverantörer tillhandhåller.  
   

  





 Du har en central roll i myndighetens effektiviserings- och moderniseringsarbete, där modern förvaltning såsom agila arbetssätt och flödesoptimering ingår. Enheten ansvarar för applikationsförvaltning och utveckling av system, där vi stödjer från kravanalys, design, utveckling och testning till driftsättning. Skolverkets applikationsutveckling sker agilt.
   

  





 Du ingår i några av styrgrupperna för myndighetens sju förvaltningsobjekt och säkerställer att den it-nära förvaltningen stöttar verksamheten på ett ändamålsenligt sätt. Du har budgetansvar för it-förvaltningen. Du har ansvar för enhetens resurs- och kompetensförsörjning på kort och lång sikt.
   

  





 \* \* \* \* \*
   

  





 ”Här får du vara med och driva it-förvaltning och utveckla dina medarbetare. Häng med på en spännande resa där din insats gör skillnad varje dag.”
   

  





 Eric Markström, tf It-chef
   

  





 \* \* \* \* \*
   

  





 It-avdelningen har fem enheter. I avdelningens ledningsgrupp bidrar du till en god ledning, styrning och samordning av avdelningens uppdrag. Avdelningen genomsyras av tvärfunktionellt arbetssätt där it-utveckling och förvaltning har ett agilt förhållningssätt med scrum som utvecklingsmetodik. Vi har höga ambitioner för vår it-verksamhet och står nu inför stora förflyttningar och satsningar framåt i digitaliseringen. Du arbetar i en dynamisk och framåtblickande organisation med stora möjligheter till personlig och professionell utveckling. 
   

  





 Att vara ledare på Skolverket innebär att leda med helhetsperspektiv, i partnerskap och i relation till omvärlden. Du skapar förutsättningar för utveckling och engagemang samt sätter tydliga ramar och förväntningar på dina medarbetare. Du är en bärare av Skolverkets kultur, värderingar och fattade beslut.
   

  





 Du arbetar på vårt moderna och rymliga kontor i Solna Business Park. Du kan också ha möjlighet att arbeta upp till 50% på distans. 
   

  





****Om dig****




 För att göra ett bra jobb och trivas hos oss behöver du stå för och leva upp till den statliga värdegrunden och till våra kärnvärden för medarbetarskap: förebild, tillit, ansvar, samarbete och utveckling. Läs mer på skolverket.se/jobb
   

  





**I det här jobbet ska du ha** 



* högskoleutbildning inom data- och systemvetenskap alternativt annan utbildning i kombination med arbetslivserfarenhet som Skolverket bedömer som relevant,
* flerårig aktuell ledarerfarenhet inom it,
* aktuell erfarenhet av styrning, planering, budget och uppföljning,
* god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska.



**Det är meriterande** 
**om du** 
 har flerårig erfarenhet av arbete i statlig myndighet eller annan politiskt styrd organisation, erfarenhet av att ha arbetat med förvaltningsstyrningsmodell pm3, erfarenhet av att ha drivit transformationsarbete inom agil utveckling och erfarenhet av scrum. Det är även meriterande med erfarenhet från arbete på Skolverket.
   

  





**Som person behöver du** 



* ha en mycket god samarbetsförmåga,
* vara flexibel och kunna anpassa dig till nya förutsättningar,
* ta egna initiativ, vara drivande i ditt arbete, våga vara proaktiv att leda utveckling och fokusera på resultat,
* ha ett gott omdöme och vara lugn och trygg i rollen som ledare.



****Viktigt att veta****




 Sista ansökningsdag är 6 april. Anställningen är ett vikariat som längst till mars 2027.
   

  





 När du registrerar din ansökan får du svara på några frågor i stället för att bifoga ett personligt brev. Läs gärna igenom ansökningsformuläret och förbered dina svar innan du gör ansökan.
   

  





**Skolverket arbetar för att alla barn och elever ska få en bra och likvärdig utbildning i en trygg miljö. Vi stödjer på olika sätt den svenska förskolan, skolan och komvux. Som medarbetare på Skolverket är du med och bidrar till att skapa goda förutsättningar för barns och elevers utveckling och lärande. Lär känna oss bättre genom att besöka vår webbplats www.skolverket.se/jobb. Vårt uppdrag – skolans framtid.**

title: Fullstack developer to Accenture´s Tech Talent Program
description:
Are you a soon to be graduate who enjoys learning and building technology with curiosity for digital innovation, fullstack development and AI?
   

  

 Accenture’s Tech Talent Program (TTP) is a sixmonth, fulltime, handson program designed to bridge the gap between university and a fulltime technology consultant career.
   

  

 Throughout these six months, you’ll work with real business challenges, collaborate in supportive, multidisciplinary teams, and deliver value to clients.
   

  

 Designed to accelerate your growth as a fullstack developer, the program offers structured learning, mentorship, and access to Accenture’s global community. Upon completion, you’ll earn a formal diploma recognizing your achievements and the skills you’ve developed along the way.
   

  

**Accenture Technology**
 Accenture Technology leverages design thinking, industry insights, and the latest digital and security methodologies to help clients innovate, grow, and improve their businesses. Our expertise, capabilities, and experience mean that our clients (including some of the biggest brands in the world) trust us to find the right solutions for their needs.
   

  

 Together with our inclusive and collaborative international colleagues, we focus on connecting the needs of businesses with the new possibilities that come with technological progress.
   

  

**Technical role as Fullstack Developer**
 Your tasks may include:
   

  

  

- Developing scalable IT solutions across frontend, backend and integrations

- Exploring and contributing to AIenabled solutions

- Working with technologies such as Java, .NET, Python, React, TypeScript and SQL

- Building user interfaces, APIs and backend services

- Working in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP), including containers and serverless solutions

- Contributing to microservices architecture and CI/CD pipelines

- Collaborating with clients to understand requirements and deliver technical solutions

- Applying security best practices

- Supporting cloud transformation initiatives

**What can we offer?**
 When entering TTP, you will be welcomed into a community of recent graduates where learning and support are central.
   

  

  

- From day one, you’ll work as a consultant on projects implementing c omplex, businesscritical IT systems for international clients, with guidance from experienced colleagues.

- You’ll engage in an intensive yet supportive learning process with structured training, as well as the opportunity to obtain relevant certifications.
