- A valuable chance to learn from senior colleagues, contribute to an inclusive workplace culture, and build a strong professional network.

- After completing the program, you’ll receive an Accenture diploma recognizing your achievements, growth, and readiness for fut ure opportunities.

**I’m interested — what’s next?**
 We’re primarily seeking recent graduates from IT and engineering programs who want to work as fullstack developers, with a strong focus on AI. We would love to see th at you have personal or hobby projects in programming, or other relevant experiences — gained through studies, work, or personal interests.
   

  

 We welcome individuals who take ownership, enjoy collaborating in diverse teams, and are motivated by learning, problemsolving, and making an impact together with others.
   

  

**Who are you?**
- You are about to complete your bachelor’s or master’s degree in Computer Science/IT

- You’re excited to join our Stockholm or Gothenburg office in August 2026.

- You have good written and verbal communication skills in both English and Swedish.

- You’re motivated and curious, and interested in beginning your career in a fullstack developer role where your ideas and perspective are valued.

- You’re looking for a place to grow — shaping your own career while contributing to Accenture’s future in an inclusive, supportive environment.

 Accenture welcomes and encourages applications from people with diverse backgrounds related to gender, ethnicity, culture, age, experience, and perspectives. We provide an environment of inclusion and diversity where everyone brings distinct experience, talent, and culture to their work. If you’re excited about the role but don’t meet every requirement, we still encourage you to apply.
   

  

**Application**
 Does this spark your interest? Send your application now!
   

  

 For a complete application, please attach:
   

  

  

- CV

- Cover letter (feel free to highlight projects, learning experiences, or interests you’re proud of)

- University grade/transcript

 You upload all files under “Upload Resume/CV”. Please clarify in the cover letter which office(s) (Stockholm/Göteborg) you would be able to work from. Only complete applications are reviewed. Please note that we are unable to accept applications via email.

title: Senior Analyst - Internal Audit & Risk
description:
Spotify’s Internal Audit & Risk (IAR) team is seeking a Senior Analyst with a technological or engineering background to help implement our audit strategy across the product lifecycle within our agile, international environment. In this role you will be working on a diverse range of projects, from building tools leveraging AI agents to supporting the company's annual SOX compliance program and contributing to assurance and advisory projects across technology and product areas.
   

  

 The ideal candidate has an engineering background, good understanding of software development in microservices architecture, and has some experience in building AI systems and using AI powered coding assistants. You should be passionate about risk management and be keen on learning auditing techniques.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Test technology components within the SOX framework, including planning, executing walkthroughs, reporting, and driving continuous improvements such as control rationalization.
* Design, build, and iterate on internal audit & risk tooling and systems using AI agents, leveraging modern cloud-native architectures and generative AI models to drive execution.
* Champion technology-enabled audit execution by embedding AI directly into core audit processes to deliver deeper, more effective results.
* Develop a deep understanding of the businesses, products, and processes you are auditing, including their strategy, product lifecycle, and associated business processes.
* Participate in complex assurance and advisory projects, covering risk assessment, testing, and reporting across various technical domains.
* Coordinate with co-sourced providers, external auditors, and internal process owners to ensure the timely and effective execution of the SOX testing program and operational/technical audits.
* Provide guidance and support to internal stakeholders as they address control deficiencies or make significant process changes, such as the implementation of new systems or product features.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have at least 3 years of work experience. The majority should come from an engineering role or similar in high performing, cross-functional teams. Experience in technology audit, IT consulting and/or IT risk management is a merit, but not a requirement.
* You effectively use AI agents in your day-to-day work, and you have at least basic experience in building AI systems or using AI powered coding assistants such as Claude Code or Cursor.
* You have a solid understanding of modern software development lifecycles (SDLC), programming languages for AI development (Python) and cloud infrastructure.
* You’re passionate about risk management and audit, and you’re eager to learn and grow your auditing skills under mentorship of our team of experts.
* You possess strong problem-solving skills, demonstrating critical and logical thinking to reach solutions in complex technical environments.
* You care deeply about quality and hold yourself and others to a high standard.
* You hold a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or a related field. Self-taught engineers holding another degree are also welcome to apply. Professional certifications (e.g., CISA, CISSP, CIA) are a merit but not a requirement.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in our New York City or Stockholm office. Remote work may be considered for strong candidates.
* We offer a hybrid work model, typically working 2–3 days per week in the office to foster collaboration with the IAR team and stakeholders.


 The United States base range for this position is $92,171 - $131,673 plus equity. The benefits available for this position include health insurance, six month paid parental leave, 401(k) retirement plan, monthly meal allowance, 23 paid days off, 13 paid flexible holidays, paid sick leave. These ranges may be modified in the future.
   

  

 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: IT-säkerhetsspecialist
description:
**Om oss** 




 På Techrytera AB börjar rekryteringen med dig. Vi är ett bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag med spetskompetens och ett tydligt fokus inom IT och Engineering. Med vår branschkunskap och nära dialog med både kandidater och kunder skapar vi träffsäkra matchningar där rätt kompetens möter rätt behov.
 



 Vi tror att en riktigt bra matchning inte bara handlar om en rollbeskrivning – utan om dina erfarenheter, din potential och vad du faktiskt vill utvecklas inom. Därför utgår vi alltid från individen. Genom att förstå din bakgrund, dina drivkrafter och dina ambitioner kan vi koppla ihop dig med uppdrag och roller hos våra kunder där du får rätt förutsättningar att utvecklas och göra skillnad.
 



 Vårt mål är att bygga långsiktiga och meningsfulla samarbeten – både för dig som kandidat och för våra kunder.
 



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 




 Arbete med administration, förvaltning och utveckling av processer och arbetsmetoder inom IT verksamheten, stöd till utvecklingsprojekt för att säkerställa att IT-säkerhetskraven uppfylls, granskning av IT-system inför driftsättning. I rollen som IT-säkerhetsspecialist är det ditt huvudsakliga ansvar att fördjupa dig i komplexa material genom både teoretiska och praktiska granskningar för att ge informationssäkerhetschefen den information som behövs för att fatta beslut om säkerhets- och drifttillstånd för projekt som syftar till att driva Sverige framåt, bland annat inom energiomställningen. För att lyckas i rollen är det viktigt att hålla sig uppdaterad om aktuella hot och risker inom IT-säkerhet och att kunna formulera och kommunicera väl avvägda IT-säkerhetskrav baserade på detta, samt att ha ett helhetsperspektiv för informationssäkerhet. Du behöver effektivt kunna tillgodogöra dig stora mängder information, analysera och ge svar på vilka informationssäkerhetskrav ett informationssystem bör leva upp till. I rollen kommer du också att samarbeta nära med andra specialister och den mer operativa enheten med inriktning på IT-säkerhet vilket gör att rollen kräver god samarbetsförmåga.
 



**Skallkrav** 




 1. Konsulten ska ha minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet som granskare inom Informations- och/eller IT-säkerhetsområdet
 



 2. Konsulten ska ha minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av att kommunicera säkerhetsrelaterade frågeställningar tillsammans med beslutsfattare
 



 3. Konsulten ska ha minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet av att skriva granskningsrapporter som redogör för säkerhetsbrister och rekommendationer för korrigerande åtgärder
 



 4. Konsulten ska behärska svenska språket och kunna kommunicera obehindrat på svenska i tal och skrift.
 



  





**Merit** 
 :
 



 1. Konsulten har minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet inom säkerhetsarbete inom IT-förvaltning eller ”IT service management"
 



 2. Konsulten har minst 3 års arbetslivserfarenhet inom säkerhetsarbete inom agila arbetssätt vid utveckling och drift av system
 



 3. Konsulten har minst 3 års erfarenhet av arbete med ledningssystem för informationssäkerhet samt att etablera och/eller granska styrande dokument
 



  





  





  





  





  






 Ansökan
 




 När du söker via Techrytera AB söker du inte bara ett jobb – du påbörjar en dialog om din fortsatta karriär. Vi vill lära känna dig, din erfarenhet och dina ambitioner för att kunna matcha dig med rätt möjligheter hos våra kunder.
 



 Låter det intressant? Skicka in din ansökan eller hör av dig till oss så berättar vi mer. Vi ser fram emot att hitta nästa steg i din karriär tillsammans med dig.

title: Business Unit Lead
description:
**Business Unit Lead - Data & Analytics** 




  





 📍 Location: Stockholm
 



 💼 Type: Permanent
 



 🗣️ Language: Swedish required
 



  





**A Rare Opportunity to Lead a Strategic Data & AI Function** 




  





 These roles don’t come up often - and when they do, they define careers.
 



  





 We’re hiring a
 **Business Unit Lead** 
 to head up the Data & Analytics division for a specialised BI client of ours in Sweden. This is a high-impact, senior leadership role with full visibility across the organisation and European operations. You’ll be the driving force behind the company’s data strategy, analytics innovation, and AI transformation.
 



  





 🔧 What You’ll Do
 



 As the Business Unit Lead, you’ll be responsible for shaping and executing a bold vision for data and analytics across the business. Your remit will span strategy, delivery, innovation, and leadership:
 



  





 🧭 Data Strategy & Roadmap
 


* Develop and refine a comprehensive data and AI strategy aligned with business goals.
* Identify opportunities where analytics, machine learning, and generative AI can unlock competitive advantage, drive efficiency, and fuel growth.
* Champion data-driven decision-making across all levels of the organisation.



  





 👥 Leadership & Team Management
 


* Lead a multidisciplinary team of data scientists, engineers, BI analysts, and visualisation experts.
* Foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.
* Set clear goals, inspire passion for data, and coach talent to reach their full potential.



  





 🛠️ Analytics Solution Delivery
 


* Oversee the design and implementation of robust, scalable analytics solutions.
* Guide the architecture of data warehouses/lakes, ensure data quality and governance, and implement modern analytics platforms.
* Leverage experience with large-scale BI deployments to deliver high-impact solutions.



  





 🤝 Business Integration
 


* Partner with business units (finance, operations, marketing, etc.) to embed analytics into decision-making.
* Translate complex data into compelling insights and recommendations for senior stakeholders.
* Use data storytelling and visualisation to communicate clearly and drive action.



  





 🔬 Innovation & AI Oversight
 


* Stay ahead of emerging technologies in data science and AI.
* Evaluate and implement multi-vendor AI solutions tailored to business needs.
* Explore new frontiers like generative AI, balancing innovation with practicality.
* Make strategic decisions on build vs. buy for analytics tools and platforms.



  





 🔐 Governance & Trust
 


* Establish strong data governance and ethical AI guidelines.
* Ensure data integrity, security, and compliance across all analytics activities.
* Champion transparency in AI models to build trust in automated insights.



  





 🔗 Cross-Functional Collaboration
 


* Collaborate with IT, product development, and external partners to enhance data capabilities.
* Act as an internal evangelist for data culture, educating teams on how to leverage data effectively.
* Represent the business in industry forums and strategic partnerships.



  





 📈 Performance Monitoring
 


* Define KPIs for data initiatives and regularly report on their impact.
* Use a results-oriented approach to measure how analytics improves business metrics.
* Continuously refine strategy based on performance outcomes.



  





 🧠 What You’ll Bring
 


* Proven leadership experience in MS BI & Data environments
* Strong track record in selling and delivering data projects
* Deep understanding of data architecture, analytics platforms, and business intelligence tools
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
* Fluency in Swedish and a consultative, client-first mindset
* Experience with or ambition to take on P&L responsibility
* Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands-on execution



  





 🌟 Why This Role?
 



  




* **Strategic Visibility** 
 : Work directly with European leadership and shape one of the most important business units in Sweden.
* **Growth Potential** 
 : This is a long-term leadership role with room to expand into broader responsibilities across the Nordics or Europe.
* **Impact** 
 : Data & Analytics is the second largest team in Sweden - your leadership will directly influence its success and evolution.
* **Culture** 
 : Join a company that values innovation, autonomy, and collaboration.



  





 📩 If you’re a senior data leader ready to take the reins and lead from the front, this is your moment. Apply now or reach out for a confidential chat.

title: Software Engineer, Feature Engineering Platform
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re building a new Feature Engineering Platform that will be the front door to ML development at global scale. As a Software Engineer on this team, you’ll help build a seamless experience for ML practitioners across the company — from experimentation and exploration to deployment and monitoring.
   

  

 Our mission is to make machine learning accessible and intuitive without compromising on power or performance. You’ll work on a layered platform that supports both high-level declarative workflows and lower-level imperative APIs, all integrated into the environments our users already work in (like notebooks and internal sandboxes).
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Build and evolve APIs, SDKs, and platform integrations that power feature engineering workflows.
* Help shape user-facing tools to make the platform approachable for all skill levels.
* Collaborate across the ML lifecycle — from data ingestion to feature serving — and integrate tightly with our central Data Control Plane.
* Contribute to platform reliability, testing, observability, and operational excellence.


**Qualifications**
* Solid engineering background, ideally in platform, data, or ML-adjacent teams.
* Comfortable working with backend systems, APIs, and ideally some exposure to distributed compute (e.g. Spark, Flink).
* Empathy for users and interest in building abstractions that remove friction.
* Curious and collaborative mindset — eager to learn from others and contribute broadly.
* Experience with ML tooling, or data pipelines is a plus.


 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: GIS-specialist inom IT
description:
**Bakgrund och Uppdragsbeskrivning**
 Svenska kraftnät hanterar stora mängder geodata i SQL-server och använder ESRI:s ArcGIS plattform i kombination med FME i uppdraget att förvalta och utveckla transmissionsnätet. Förvaltningsorganisationen kring GIS-systemet behöver stärkas upp med konsulter som har gedigen erfarenhet av ArcGIS-plattformen (ArcGIS Enterprise, ArcGIS pro, ArcGIS online, ArcGIS Server).
   

  

 Upphandlingen avser en GIS-specialist som kan utveckla och stötta Svenska kraftnät i arbetet med förvaltning och vidareutveckling av Svenska kraftnäts GIS-system.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Uppdraget kommer att ledas av Svenska kraftnät. Efter tecknande av kontrakt avser Svenska kraftnät att ha en direkt och kontinuerlig kontakt med konsulten. Konsulten kommer att ingå i det agila GISteam som utvecklar behov och förvaltar GIS-systemet.
   

  

 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter och ansvar:
   

  

* Delaktig i förvaltning av befintliga applikationer.
* Vidareutveckla systemet/lösningen genom att medverka vid teknisk kravspecificering och ta
* fram nya lösningar
* Konfigurera applikationer och tjänster i ESRI:s plattform.
* Ge stöd och support till interna och externa parter.
* Samarbeta med andra IT-förvaltningar, driftsorganisationer och intern personal vid behov.
* Samordna och genomföra olika typer av tester vid framtagning av applikationer.
* Hantera IT-incidenter och delta i felsökning och samordning av insatser.
* Uppdatera dokumentation för systemen t.ex. drift- och förvaltningsanvisningar respektive systemberoenden.


 Arbetet kommer att kräva samarbete med andra projekt och förvaltningar. Det är därför viktigt att ha
   

  

 kommunikativ förmåga, samarbetsförmåga och vilja arbeta i grupp.

title: Client Solutions Manager Nordic Global Brands
description:
Meta's Global Business Group (GBG) is seeking a Client Solutions Manager to help lead our strategic partnership with one of the world's most iconic fashion retailers. This is a unique opportunity to sit at the intersection of fashion, technology, and brand expression — shaping the future of retail by co-creating social-first strategies that drives growth globally.The Client Solutions Manager is a strategic solution-driver with a focus on developing ROI-driven marketing strategies, driving growth by constantly improving performance for advertisers and implementing measurement & attribution solutions. This role is responsible for optimizing complex opportunities and using data and analytics to build consultative and technical solutions for our customers, providing business insights, driving revenue, advertiser education, and satisfaction through a consultative, data-driven approach. Success in this position requires consultative sales and analytical skills, a focus on client service and commercial acumen, and the drive to thrive in a dynamic, team-focused environment.
   

  

 Client Solutions Manager Nordic Global Brands Responsibilities:
   

  

* Strategic Leadership: In close partnership with Client Partner, Cross Functional Partner and CSMs, develop and execute a long-term vision for the partnership, driving transformational growth and solidifying the client's position as a fashion retail leader
* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with Marketing Science, Product, Creative Shop, and Partnerships teams to pilot and scale emerging products and business messaging (WhatsApp) solutions
* Omnichannel leader: Design and implement measurement frameworks to prove the value of Meta's platforms in driving both online and in-store sales, leveraging Incremental Attribution and Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns
* Data-Driven Storytelling: Leverage data, analytics and AI to build compelling, insight-led presentations that showcase performance, justify strategic pivots, and inspire investment in cutting-edge advertising solutions
* Multi-Market Execution: Manage complex, multi-market campaign structures and project-manage work streams across regional and global stakeholders
* Creative Leadership: Extend creative best practices and strategic frameworks across global client teams and regions
* Build and manage relationships with key stakeholders
* Analyze data and insights to guide strategy and implementation of Meta solutions


 Minimum Qualifications:
   

  

* 8+ years of experience in ad sales, marketing, media, and/or consulting
* Demonstrated knowledge of digital media platforms, advertising success metrics, and industry trends (Direct Response marketing, brand building, data and technology solutions, ad-tech, partnerships, CRM)
* Experience working with global fashion retail brands in a client-facing, consultative capacity, navigating complex global stakeholder environments
* Understanding and experience of omnichannel retail dynamics — including how digital advertising drives both online and in-store business outcomes and solutions that can accelerate this
* Experience of managing campaigns or marketing programs across multiple markets or regions
* Experience of guiding media and creative strategy, planning, and implementation of campaigns to deliver against KPIs
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with experience advising C-suite executives
* Familiarity with advanced measurement methodologies (Conversion Lift, Incrementality testing, MMM, Incremental Attribution)
* Experience in applying AI solutions to drive operational efficiency and performance outcomes
* Effective and creative problem solving and decision making skills, and the love to learn in an ambiguous environment
* Experience of analyzing large datasets and delivering actionable insights
* Professional working proficiency in English due to the need to partner with external clients globally


 Preferred Qualifications:
   

  

* A cross-section of experiences covering both creative and media agencies
* Experience of utilizing AI to analyze data and market research to inform creative and strategic decision-making, and to present insights compellingly to executive leaders
* Direct hands-on experience with Instagram and/or creator marketing — including campaign design, content strategy, creator briefing, and audience development
* A portfolio or track record in developing and executing successful, creator-led social media campaigns for major brands
* Previous experience at Meta or a major social platform, particularly in content strategy, creator partnerships, or product marketing for short form content
* Experience of business messaging (WhatsApp for Business) and paid messaging solutions for businesses and brands
* Experience working across global markets and/or an international background that informs a global perspective


 About Meta:
   

  

 Meta builds technologies that help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology. People who choose to build their careers by building with us at Meta help shape a future that will take us beyond what digital connection makes possible today—beyond the constraints of screens, the limits of distance, and even the rules of physics.
   

  

 Individual compensation is determined by skills, qualifications, experience, and location. Compensation details listed in this posting reflect the base hourly rate, monthly rate, or annual salary only, and do not include bonus, equity or sales incentives, if applicable. In addition to base compensation, Meta offers benefits. Learn more about benefits at Meta.

title: Workshop Technician
location: Upplands Väsby och Sollentuna, Stockholm County, Sweden
description:
**Want to shape the future of waterborne transport and join a world-class team?**
 Candela is the
 **global leader in electric hydrofoil vessels** 
 . Since 2014, we’ve gone from building our first premium electric speedboat in a small Stockholm workshop to delivering game-changing vessels around the globe.
 **The Candela P-12** 
 is our latest innovation - the world’s first electric hydrofoil ferry is not just operating in Stockholm, but now attracting orders from around the world.
   

  

 Our boats “fly” thanks to
 **computer-guided** 
 underwater wings under the hull made out of
 **lightweight carbon fiber.** 
 The wings lift the vessel above the water, which results in cutting energy use by up to 80%, while offering zero emissions and a far better passenger experience than traditional diesel vessels.
   

  

 And that’s exactly why we do this. Our mission is clear: to
 **speed up the transition to fossil fuel–free lakes and oceans** 
 .
   

  

 You can be part of the amazing team in Candela now! We are looking for a
 **Workshop Technician** 
 to support Candela’s future growth ambitions.
   

  

**Your core responsibilities will include:**
* Develop clear and accurate work instructions based on input from Manufacturing Engineering and R&D/Design.
* Train operators to ensure adherence to instructions and compliance with safety, quality, and productivity standards.
* Ensure availability of necessary equipment by selecting, purchasing, or restocking standard tools and supporting sourcing of specialized equipment.
* Lead continuous improvement initiatives, including 5S activities.
* Support prototyping, new product introductions, and implementation of design or process changes.
* Assist in troubleshooting quality deviations and drive corrective actions.
* Contribute to quality improvement efforts through data collection and checks.
* Train new employees in safe use of PPE, machinery, and production procedures.
* Perform production tasks when required.


**What are we looking for?** 
 We are looking for a proactive and hands-on team player with a positive attitude who thrives in a fast-moving production environment and enjoys problem-solving, learning, and contributing to continuous improvement. Someone who has the eagerness to learn and develop.
   

  

**Requirements:**
* Minimum 5+ years of relevant work experience
* High School Diploma or other relevant education
* Experience working in manufacturing and production environments
* Self‑motivated with strong problem‑solving skills
* Strong get‑things‑done mindset
* Good verbal and written English; basic Swedish and other languages are a plus
* Analytical mindset
* Proficiency in MS Office


**It would be preferred if you:**
* Have previous experience in continuous improvement, 5S, lean, or production optimization
* Have experience working with MES/ERP systems such as ODOO
* Have hands‑on experience with workshop tools or manufacturing equipment
* Have experience collaborating with engineering teams in a production environment


**Form of employment** 
 : Full-time with initial 6 month probation period
   

  

**Start date:** 
 ASAP
   

  

**Location/base** 
 : Rotebro
   

  

**Team** 
 : Assembly
   

  

**Reporting to** 
 : Workshop Manager - Assembly
   

  

**Why people love working at Candela?**
 At Candela, we’re not just building electric vessels - we’re creating a whole new category of clean, efficient waterborne transport. You get the chance to work with
 **cutting-edge technology** 
 , solving complex challenges, and seeing the results in action - sometimes literally, when we organize test rides for our newcomers! We’re a diverse and ambitious team of over 50 nationalities, united by a
 **revolutionary spirit and kindness** 
 . That means we work hard, but always with humility and while having fun - whether it’s solving a manufacturing challenge, improving processes, or cheering each other on during
 **Candela Months** 
 , our year-round calendar of bonding activities and events.
   

  

 We’re
 **office-first but not office-only** 
 . We believe collaboration is most powerful when we build together, in person - but we also trust our team to work in ways that fit their life. At Candela, you’ll find a place where bold ideas are welcomed, great people are celebrated, and the ride is just as important as the destination.
   

  

**Recruitment process:**
 We aim to keep our recruitment process as straightforward and efficient as possible. As an international company with English as our corporate language, the entire process is conducted in English. Therefore, please submit your application in our corporate language as well. Kindly note that we cannot process applications sent via email due to GDPR so please use our career website for you application.
   

  

**We welcome the opportunity to meet you!**

title: SDR
description:
**TL;DR** 




**We are looking for an ambitious, business-driven Sales Development Representative who knows how to open doors, create real interest, and build pipeline through smart, high-quality outbound. You will help introduce Agaton’s advanced AI platform to mid-market and enterprise companies, primarily in the Nordic markets, and play an important role in our next phase of growth.** 




  





**Ready to Shape the Future of B2B Sales?** 





 Join Agaton, where advanced AI transforms how sales and customer service teams perform.
 





 We are not building yet another analytics tool. We are building the intelligence layer that helps companies understand conversations, coach people, automate workflows, and fundamentally improve how they sell and serve customers.
 





 If you are energized by outbound sales, enjoy combining creativity with structure, and want to be part of building a category-defining company from Europe, this role is for you.
 




  





**The Opportunity** 





 As a Sales Development Representative at Agaton, you will be the engine behind our pipeline generation. You will connect with decision-makers across mid-market and enterprise companies, helping them understand how Agaton’s AI platform can improve sales performance, customer experience, and operational efficiency.
 





 This is not traditional cold calling. You will use thoughtful outbound, personalized messaging, and AI-powered tools to open meaningful conversations with some of the most ambitious customer-facing organizations in the Nordics.
 




  





**What You’ll Be Doing** 



* Generate qualified opportunities through targeted outreach across email, LinkedIn, phone, and other relevant channels
* Research key accounts and identify high-value prospects with strong potential fit
* Craft personalized messaging that resonates with leaders in Sales, Customer Service, CX, and Operations
* Use Agaton’s internal tools and AI workflows to optimize prospecting, sequencing, and outreach quality
* Collaborate closely with Account Executives and leadership to qualify and hand off strong opportunities
* Maintain a high level of activity, ownership, and consistency in your day-to-day work
* Test, analyze, and improve outreach strategies continuously across campaigns and segments
* Contribute to shaping our outbound playbook as we scale internationally


- 


**What We’re Looking For** 



* Ambitious, proactive, and comfortable taking initiative
* A strong communicator who can build trust quickly and ask thoughtful questions
* Curious about AI, technology, and human communication
* Structured in your way of working and motivated by measurable results
* Resilient, coachable, and excited by the pace of a high-growth environment
* Comfortable speaking with senior stakeholders and representing the company professionally
* Fluent in both Swedish and English, spoken and written
* Experience in B2B sales, SaaS, prospecting, or outbound is a plus, but not required


- 


**Bonus Points** 



* Experience with outbound sales, lead generation, or booking meetings in a B2B environment
* Familiarity with modern sales tools such as HubSpot, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, sequencing tools, or enrichment platforms
* Interest in AI, sales technology, customer experience, or voice technology
* Experience working in a startup or scaleup environment
* Strong writing ability and an eye for personalized outreach that actually gets replies


- 


**What We Offer** 



* Competitive salary with an attractive commission and incentive structure
* Above-market stock option package
* Six weeks annual paid vacation
* Wellness budget to invest in your health and wellbeing
* Learning and development budget
* Stockholm-based role with flexibility and a modern office environment
* A rare opportunity to learn AI-first outbound at a company with real market traction
* Direct impact on how a category-defining company grows and scales


- 


**About Agaton** 





 At Agaton, we're building the intelligence layer behind every customer conversation, going beyond transcripts to understand sales at a granular level: not just what's said, but how it's said. We analyze language, silence, and vocal tone to coach human agents in real time and power autonomous AI voice agents that compound in performance the more they're used.
 





 Our technology understands context, adapts in real time, and helps companies move from reactive customer interactions to intelligent, value-driven communication. We believe sales should be helpful, intelligent, and genuinely valuable, not pushy or scripted.
 





 We are a high-growth, talent-dense team based in Stockholm, backed by leading angels and operators from companies like Spotify, Klarna, Shopify, Sana, and more. We are expanding rapidly across Europe and preparing for global scale.
 




  





**Ready to Drive the Future?** 





 We are looking for the next generation of SDR talent, people who want more than just a list and a quota. If you want to learn fast, work closely with experienced founders and commercial leaders, and help build pipeline for a product that is genuinely changing how companies operate, we would love to hear from you.
 





 This is more than a job. It is a chance to be part of building something generation-defining.
 




  





**Apply now. You only need to submit your CV. No cover letter required.** 




  






 This position is based in Stockholm, Sweden. Please submit your application in English, as it is our company language.

title: Process Manager
description:
*Vill du arbeta i en central roll där du driver och utvecklar arbetssätt som påverkar hela organisationens IT-leverans? Vi söker nu en Process Manager till vårt team inom Digital & IT.*
*I rollen får du möjlighet att koordinera och utveckla våra ITIL-processer och bidra till att våra tjänster fungerar stabilt och effektivt för både kunder och medarbetare. Du blir en viktig del av arbetet med att minska störningar, förbättra arbetssätt och säkerställa att våra IT-processer är rustade för framtiden.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som Process Manager ansvarar du för att koordinera, driva och följa upp arbetet inom våra ITIL-processer – Incident, Problem och Change. Initialt ligger fokus främst på Incident-processen.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära många delar av organisationen och fungerar som en viktig kontaktyta för frågor kopplade till våra processer. I rollen ingår att säkerställa att processerna fungerar i praktiken, utvecklas över tid och att organisationen har rätt kunskap och förståelse för hur de ska användas.
   

  

 Rollen rapporterar till Head of MSI & Service Desk och innebär många kontaktytor inom Digital & IT, Länsförsäkringar AB, våra dotterbolag och länsbolag. Du kommer även att samarbeta med externa leverantörer, bland annat vår driftleverantör.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat vara att:
   

  

* Koordinera och driva arbetet inom våra ITIL-processer (Incident, Problem och Change)
* Säkerställa att processerna fungerar effektivt och bidrar till stabila IT-tjänster
* Följa upp, analysera och förbättra arbetssätt för att minska påverkan på kunder och handläggare
* Vara kontaktyta mot intressenter i organisationen i frågor kopplade till processerna
* Sprida kunskap om processerna genom information och utbildning
* Identifiera förbättringsområden och driva utveckling av våra processer och arbetssätt


 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med eller nära ITIL-processer
* Grundläggande IT-kompetens och förmåga att delta i tekniska diskussioner
* Erfarenhet av driftsrelaterade processer eller IT-operations
* Förmåga att koordinera arbete mellan olika intressenter i en organisation
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Det är meriterande om du även har:
   

  

* Certifiering inom ITIL Foundation eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i ServiceNow
* Erfarenhet av monitoreringsverktyg som exempelvis Splunk eller Dynatrace
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt


 Som person är du strukturerad och målinriktad och har ett naturligt helhetsperspektiv. Du är en tydlig och pedagogisk kommunikatör som kan förklara arbetssätt och processer på ett enkelt och engagerande sätt.
   

  

 Du är också initiativtagande och framåtlutad – du vågar ta plats, driver frågor framåt och ser möjligheter att förbättra arbetssätt och processer. Samtidigt är du samarbetsorienterad och trivs i en roll med många kontaktytor.
   

  

**Om oss**
 Du blir en del av team MSI & Service Desk inom Digital & IT på Länsförsäkringar AB. Teamet består av 13 personer som tillsammans ansvarar för att utveckla och förvalta centrala IT-processer och arbetssätt.
   

  

 Gruppen präglas av ett öppet klimat, stor variation i bakgrund och erfarenhet samt en vilja att utvecklas tillsammans. Här finns goda möjligheter att växa – både inom teamet och vidare inom Länsförsäkringsgruppen.
   

  

 Vi arbetar nära många delar av organisationen och har en viktig roll i att säkerställa stabila och effektiva IT-leveranser för hela verksamheten. Välkommen till oss!
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: andreas.eriksson@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: lisa-maria.carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.
   

  

 Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.

title: Enterprise Architect
description:
The key word is
 **change** 
 . Technology is no longer a support function. Agents are becoming active participants in workflows. New entrants are reshaping the SaaS landscape and turning multi-year contracts into strategic liabilities. Governance demands around data sovereignty, security, and responsible use of AI are expanding. And velocity mismatches between strategy, architecture, and governance remain the largest source of wasted IT investment today.
   

  

 We are seeking an
 **Enterprise Architect** 
 to design and govern the holistic blueprint that connects business strategy, applications, data, and technology across our clients’ organisations. Someone who can see the whole picture and make it coherent.
   

  

**Who is Umain?**
 We were founded with a
 **heritage in digital product development and engineering** 
 . This background gives us a unique perspective, ensuring that our strategic advice is always grounded in
 **technical feasibility and execution excellence** 
 . We are now expanding our focus to help clients at the C-level, linking core technology strategy directly to business outcomes.
   

  

 Umain is proudly part of
 **Eidra** 
 , a consultancy collective driven by the conviction that business transformation requires a combination of management consulting and best-in-breed expertise in creativity, engineering, and data. This partnership means that while you focus on strategic IT-Management and enterprise architecture, you have full access to orchestrate common capabilities from the best specialized companies within the collective.
   

  

 Our team consists of individuals with experience from the largest consulting firms, but with the flexibility, speed, and entrepreneurial drive that characterize a modern, flat organization. At Umain, we highly value
 **collaboration** 
 and
 **entrepreneurial spirit** 
 . Here, you are not only expected to lead demanding client assignments; you are also expected to actively contribute to our internal development, whether it involves shaping new service offerings in AI/Data or mentoring our junior talent. We reward those who take ownership and drive us forward.
   

  

**The Role: What will you do?**
 As An Enterprise Architect Within Eidra’s Tech Advisory & IT Management Practice, You Are The Structural Backbone Of Our Client Engagements. You Work Across Assessment, Design, And Transformation, Ensuring That Architectural Decisions Hold Up From Boardroom To Codebase. Your Assignments Will Involve
   

  

* Architecture Assessment & Scoring: Evaluating client technology estates for maturity, composability, technical debt, and swap-readiness. Producing actionable findings that connect directly to business outcomes and sourcing decisions.
* Enterprise Architecture Design: Designing composable, API-first architectures that replace rigid target-state blueprints with modular, swap-ready designs. Guiding major technology decisions on platforms, integration patterns, and cloud strategy.
* AI Readiness & Data Architecture: Assessing and designing the data and platform foundations needed for AI adoption. Designing model-agnostic AI layers that enable provider flexibility and reduce lock-in.
* Strategic Communication: Translating architecture decisions into business impact language for CIOs and boards. Connecting architecture findings to investment priorities, sourcing strategy, and risk posture.
* Internal Leadership: Actively contributing to Eidra’s business development, mentoring colleagues, and developing our architecture competency pool.


**Who are you?**
**We Are Looking For Someone Who**
* Has 7+ years of relevant experience in enterprise architecture, technology strategy, or IT transformation. Typical backgrounds include Enterprise Architect, Solution Architect, CTO, or Technology Advisor.
* Is driven by a deep passion for making complex technology landscapes coherent, composable, and aligned with business strategy.
* Has a documented ability to assess, design, and govern enterprise architecture across diverse industries and technology estates.
* Has a natural ability to structure and communicate complex architectural concepts to both engineering teams and C-suite stakeholders.


**Required Competencies**
* Enterprise Architecture Practice: Deep expertise in enterprise architecture frameworks adapted for modern, AI-era contexts. Experience maintaining architectural principles as standing policies and governing technology decisions across the enterprise.
* Platform & Integration Design: Hands-on experience with enterprise platforms and business-critical systems (e.g. ERP, CRM, modern data stacks), combined with strong expertise in integration architecture, API strategy, and cloud architecture.
* Composable Architecture: Ability to design modular, API-first architectures and assess technology components for swap-readiness, lock-in risk, and technical debt.
* Strategic AI: Solid understanding of how to design AI-ready platforms, including model-agnostic AI layers, data architecture for AI/ML workloads, and the implications of AI on enterprise architecture.
* Business-Technology Alignment: A proven ability to connect architecture decisions to business outcomes, investment cases, and sourcing strategy.
* Collaborative Mindset: A collaborative and open approach, with a genuine commitment to continuous development, team building, and long-term client relationships.
* Language: Fluency in English, both written and spoken, is essential.


 Do you want to help build the future digital backbone for our clients?
   

  

***Background check***
*Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our internal policies. The check is carried out only with your consent and is ordered by our CISO through our approved screening partner. The scope of the check depends on the role level. This step is performed late in the recruitment process and is used solely to support a secure and fact‑based hiring decision.*
 Umain is a digital product consultancy. We shape, ship and scale digital products at speed. Founded in Stockholm in 2001, we are a growing team of 100+ experts in digital product strategy, design, and technology.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Sales Coordinator
description:
**ABOUT PRINTWORKS** 




  
 
 PRINTWORKS was founded in Stockholm in 2017 by Annette and Patrik, who left careers in advertising after noticing a shift in how we live our lives. As the world sped up, time together seemed to slip away – replaced by screens and the constant hum of digital noise. From that longing, PRINTWORKS was born.
 




  
 




 We are a fast-growing Swedish design brand built on nostalgia and the joy of the analog. Our product range, photo albums, board games, puzzles, stationery, kitchen essentials, and more, combines beautiful Scandinavian aesthetics with everyday function. We call it “Functional Decoration”: objects so well-designed you will want to put them on display, not tuck them away.
 




  
 




 Today our products are sold through over 5 000 retailers across 30+ markets, stocked by prestigious department stores such as Selfridges and Liberty in London, Le Bon Marché and Galeries Lafayette in Paris, and Nordstrom and Macy’s in New York. We sell both directly and through distributors and agents depending on the market, and our own e-commerce platform printworksmarket.com accounts for a significant share of revenue. We are a team of 18 people based in Östermalm, Stockholm – designers, sales, finance, and purchasing – all united by a shared passion for our brand and customers.
 




  
 



**THE ROLE** 




  
 
 As Sales Coordinator you are the operational hub of our sales organisation. You work closely with our sales managers to make sure that every order, invoice, and shipment reaches our retailers, distributors, and agents on time and to the highest standard. This is a key position for someone who thrives on delivering exceptional service, building genuine relationships with wholesale partners around the world, and making sure nothing slips through the cracks.
 




  
 




 You will have daily direct contact with our global network of distributors, agents, and key accounts, as well as with our third-party warehouses and logistics partners. You will also represent PRINTWORKS at trade fairs in Europe and the US. The role touches every part of the business and offers real scope to grow with us.
 




  
 



**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 
  
 



 –    
 
 Support two sales managers across all customer accounts, contracts, and orders.
 




 –    
 
 Own end-to-end order and invoice management in our ERP system Traede – ensuring every order flows correctly from placement through delivery and invoicing.
 




 –    
 
 Act as the first point of contact for customer and partner enquiries relating to orders, deliveries, and logistics.
 




 –    
 
 Coordinate with our warehouses to ensure correct packing, labelling, shipping methods, and on-time dispatch.
 




 –    
 
 Ensure all customers and partners have the right digital assets at hand – images, product copy, price lists – so that PRINTWORKS is presented consistently and correctly across all markets.
 




 –    
 
 Attend trade fairs in Europe and the US to represent the brand and strengthen partner relationships.
 




 –    
 
 Pull sales reports and statistics and assist with other administrative tasks as needed.
 




  
 



**EXPERIENCE & BACKGROUND** 




 –    
 
 1–2 years of experience in order management and customer service working with international retailers, ideally in the US, Europe, and/or Asia.
 




 –    
 
 Outstanding English communication skills, both written and spoken. French or Spanish is a plus.
 




 –    
 
 Solid Excel skills.
 




 –    
 
 Experience working with customer portals is a plus.
 




 –    
 
 A background in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or Logistics is an advantage. Experience with ERP systems is a plus; familiarity with Traede is a bonus.
 




  
 



**WHO YOU ARE** 




 –    
 
 Service-minded with strong communication skills — you enjoy building long-term relationships and are not afraid to have a tough conversation when needed.
 




 –    
 
 A positive problem-solver who stays calm under pressure and finds solutions.
 




 –    
 
 Highly structured with a strong sense of responsibility — you keep all balls in the air and make sure everything and everyone delivers on time.
 




 –    
 
 Comfortable with change and energised by new challenges in a fast-moving environment.
 




 –    
 
 A genuine team player with real drive for the business.
 




  
 



**WHAT WE OFFER** 





 This is an excellent opportunity for the right person to learn what it takes to build a global brand, and to grow with it. Our workplace is creative, open, and supportive, and our leadership is committed to a healthy work-life balance.
 




  





 –    
 
 A place in an international company in strong and profitable growth.
 




 –    
 
 Significant autonomy and ownership from day one.
 




 –    
 
 Real opportunities for personal and professional development.
 




 –    
 
 Flexible working hours and the possibility to work remotely part of the week.
 




 –    
 
 A small, positive, and ambitious team that believes anything is possible.
 




  





**Apply by sending your CV and a personal letter to teodor@printworksmarket.com** 




  





*Permanent full-time role based in Stockholm. Reporting to Sales Support & Customer Team Leader. · printworksmarket.com*

We have an exciting opportunity for you to join our team of Couriers.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 FedEx is the largest express transportation company in the world, connecting more than 220 countries and territories. We work every moment to deliver the most important package of someone’s day. Our team of passionate people know their day-to-day work is invaluable in delivering outstanding experience to our customers. 530,000 team members strong, we are as diverse as the world we serve. We love what we do, and we do it well. Our reach is big, and so are our dreams. Join us and let's write our next chapter together.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Representing FedEx in front of our customers, courteously picking up and delivering their packages
* Driving vehicles in FedEx fleet on defined routes in various postcodes, making sure customers’ packages get to the right place, on time
* Making sure vehicles are always operated safely and legally
* Following all FedEx Health and Safety and other company policies and procedures


**What Do You Bring With You**
* Be a reliable team player
* Be energetic and enthusiastic
* Have a strong customer focus
* Have good communication skills
* Have an eye for detail to make sure paperwork is correct
* Holding a valid driving license for type of vehicle assigned is essential and held for 2+ years would be an advantage.
* Adaptability to external driving conditions and circumstances is required
* Commercial driving experience would be an advantage
* Basic geographical knowledge


**What Do We Offer**
* Attractive compensation package
* Training to get you started and on-the-job learning opportunities
* Extensive learning resources to further develop your skills and knowledge
* Tuition Assistance Program (\*applicable for FedEx positions with a permanent contract)
* Employee Assistance Program for you and your family in difficult life situations
* Employee reduced-rate shipping
* Great career opportunities
* FedEx is one of the worlds most admired companies and trusted brands year after year


 Bring your ideas, individuality, and dreams to our global community. Feel good about where you work. Choose your career path - we’re ready to invest in your development. Join FedEx.
   

  

 FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity employer and we are committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce in which we provide growth opportunities for all
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

 FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
   

  

 Our Philosophy
   

  

 The People-Service-Profit philosophy (P-S-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People-Service-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P-S-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well-being, and value their contributions to the company.
   

  

 Our Culture
   

  

 Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

title: Product Owner med teknisk kompetens & Scrum-erfarenhet
description:
Nu letar vi efter en Product Owner med teknisk kompetens & Scrum-erfarenhet till ESSIQ Stockholm!
   

  

 ESSIQ är arbetsgivaren som anstränger sig lite extra för att du ska må bra. Vad är medarbetarfokus för dig? På ESSIQ handlar det om att sätta medarbetaren i centrum. Genom ett lyhört ledarskap och en öppen företagskultur vill vi ge varje medarbetare möjligheten att forma sin karriär och sin vardag.
   

  

 Till den här rollen söker vi dig som har erfarenhet av relevanta uppgifter och som är redo för nya utmaningar. Ser du fördelarna med att få variation och erfarenhet från olika kunder och branscher men att utvecklas med en och samma arbetsgivare? Som medarbetare på ESSIQ får du det bästa av två världar.
   

  

**ROLLBESKRIVNING**
 I rollen kommer du att fungera som Product Owner och ta ansvar för krav, backlog och prioriteringar tillsammans med utvecklingsteamet. Du kommer också att coacha och stötta teamet i agila metoder såsom Scrum och Kanban, delta i systemutveckling och kravanalys, bidra till tekniska lösningar samt säkerställa hög kvalitet i leveranser. Rollen innebär dessutom att kommunicera och koordinera mellan olika intressenter, både internt och externt, samt driva förbättringar i arbetssätt, processer och teamets effektivitet.
   

  

 Vi ser att du har ett användarcentrerat och lösningsorienterat arbetssätt och att du är öppen, nytänkande och professionell. Här får du frihet att påverka både din karriär och din arbetsmiljö, samtidigt som du får stöd att utvecklas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor.
   

  

**KVALIFIKATIONER**
 Vi letar inte efter anställda, vi letar efter medarbetare – efter ESSIQ:are! Nedanstående är de grundläggande kvalifikationerna för tjänsten, men vi kommer även lägga stor vikt vid din personlighet.
   

  

**Grundläggande kvalifikationer**
* Civil- eller högskoleingenjör
* Erfarenhet av Product Owner, Product Manager eller liknande roll.
* Erfarenhet av frontend- eller systemutveckling, gärna med webb, e-handel eller interna system.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt, Scrum och kravhantering.
* Stark analytisk förmåga och erfarenhet av att omsätta kundbehov till lösningar.
* God kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska.


**Personlighet och engagemang**
* Du är ansvarstagande – kommer i mål, i medvind likväl som i motvind.
* Du är social och kommunikativ – öppen och tydlig gentemot dina kollegor, och är en produktiv problemlösare. Du är bra på att föra samtal om dig, arbetsteamet och leveransen inför en eller flera åhörare.
* Du är lyhörd och hjälpsam – tar in kunskap från omvärld och kollegor, och delar gärna med dig av din egen. Du är generös med tips, hjälp och stöd.


**OM TJÄNSTEN**
* Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning på heltid. 6 månaders provanställning tillämpas.
* Tillträde: Juni.
* Lön och förmåner: Konkurrenskraftig fast eller rörlig lön. Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter och generösa förmåner. Tjänstepension, omfattande försäkringar.
* Placering: ESSIQ Stockholm.


**OM ESSIQ**
 ESSIQ är teknikkonsultföretaget där allt börjar med dig. Med fokus på individen, flexibla lösningar och en modern lönepolicy attraherar vi de skarpaste, mest professionella och engagerade personerna i branschen. Med denna vision grundades ESSIQ år 2005, sedan dess har vi utvecklats till ett framgångsrikt företag med kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö. Vi består idag av över 250 medarbetare med olika bakgrund, personlighet och nationalitet, med en god fördelning av kvinnor och män.
   

  

 Vi har över 80 aktiva kunder i spännande branscher – allt från de stora aktörerna till de små innovationsföretagen. ESSIQ:s medarbetare arbetar med användarcentrerad tjänste- och produktutveckling inom följande tjänsteområden: UX & Service Design, Connected & Embedded Systems, IT & Cloud Services, Green Technology & Electromobility, Test & Quality Engineering, Agile Management, Mechanical Engineering samt Simulation & Visualization. Kompetensen levererar vi på plats hos uppdragsgivaren, inhouse och i satellit. Våra medarbetares intressen och ambitioner leder vägen – vårt mål är att göra den perfekta matchningen av individ och uppdrag.
   

  

 ESSIQ är ett familjärt och socialt företag med visionen att vara Sveriges bästa arbetsgivare för alla medarbetare, oavsett roll i organisationen. Vi lägger stor vikt vid gemenskap och har ett uppskattat utbud av professionella och sociala aktiviteter. Vår kommunikationsplattform genomsyras av öppenhet, och främjar nätverkande och kompetensutbyte såväl som fritidsaktiviteter och relationsbyggande.
   

  

**ANSÖKAN**
**Urval sker löpande**
**KONTAKT**
 Frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta: Malin Meyer, malin.meyer@essiq.se
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om ESSIQ?
   

  

 Besök http://essiq.se och följ oss på våra sociala medier!

title: Principal Product Manager - AI/LLM
description:
**Mission**
 Neko Health exists to shift healthcare from treating illness to preventing it, using advanced, non‑invasive technology and clinical expertise to deliver early, actionable health insights.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 As Principal Product Manager for AI & LLM, you will define and lead the product vision for building the world’s best consumer interface for health. You will own the development of AI-powered experiences - from LLM chat interfaces to medical reasoning, diagnostics, summaries, and care workflows - ensuring they are safe, trustworthy, and delightful.
   

  

 You will set the quality bar and 10x opportunities for intelligence across more than 20 Neko products spanning software and hardware, shaping how members and clinicians interact with health data at scale.
   

  

**What You’ll Deliver in the First 6–12 Months**
* Ship end-to-end AI products, including LLM chat experiences, medical reasoning systems, diagnostic tools, member summaries, doctor pre-briefs, and workflow automation.
* Establish Neko’s intelligence quality bar and define the 10x opportunities for AI capabilities across 20+ integrated product surfaces.
* Build LLM-powered features that feel simple, safe, and clinically trustworthy - meeting or exceeding medical and regulatory standards.
* Translate complex sensor and medical data into clear, intuitive user experiences with exceptional taste and attention to detail.
* Collaborate tightly with engineering, design, medical, and data science teams to deliver high-velocity, high-quality product outcomes.
* Reduce clinical workload and improve care quality through workflow automation and improved data clarity.
* Use insights from members, clinicians, clinics, and data science to guide strategy and prioritization.
* Build trust and alignment across teams around a shared product vision for AI at Neko.


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Minimum Qualifications / Preferred Experience**
* 10+ years of product management experience, including deep, hands-on work with AI, ML, or LLM-powered products.
* Demonstrated ability to transform complex technical systems into simple, intuitive, high-taste user experiences.
* Proven track record of collaborating with cross-functional teams (engineering, design, medical, data science) through ambiguous, high-impact initiatives.
* Experience shipping AI or LLM features at high velocity while maintaining safety, privacy, and clinical-grade trust.
* Exceptional communication and alignment skills across diverse technical and clinical stakeholders.
* Motivation aligned with Neko’s mission: shifting healthcare from reactive to proactive.


**Preferred Experience**
* Prior experience in AI‑enabled healthcare, medical technology, or clinically adjacent environments.
* Experience shaping AI strategy or intelligence quality bars across multiple product surfaces.
* Background in building consumer interfaces, health summaries, diagnostic reasoning tools, or operational automation.
* Product strategy & leadership roles in top‑tier AI, healthcare, or consumer companies.


**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.

title: Digital Media Business Analyst
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 Haypp Group is scaling its Retail Media offering, and we’re now looking for a Digital Media Business Analyst to join our Partnership Analytics team. You will be part of the Global Partnership organisation, working closely with the commercial, media, product and data teams to unlock the full value of our rapidly growing retail media ecosystem.
   

  

 Retail media at Haypp is performancedriven and sits at the intersection of media, ecommerce, and revenue operations. In this role, you will own all media reporting and deepdive analysis of consumer behaviour related to our media products - transforming raw data into insights that drive strategic decisions for both Haypp and our suppliers.
   

  

 We’re looking for a datadriven, commercially minded analyst who understands how media performance connects to ecommerce behaviour, can translate findings into actionable recommendations, and enjoys collaborating across multiple markets and functions. If you bring a proactive, curious mindset and love turning complex data into clear stories, you’ll thrive here.
   

  

 As a Digital Media Business Analyst, you’ll be a key link between media performance and business strategy - building best practices, defining frameworks, and helping shape how retail media insights are used across the organisation. Since this is a newly established role, you will have significant influence over how our analytics processes are defined, scaled, and continuously improved.
   

  

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:**
* Market & Media Analysis: Assess and evaluate campaign performance across retail media and off‑site channels. Analyse engagement, reach, and ROI to uncover trends and optimization opportunities
* Business Insights & Storytelling: Translate media data into strategic recommendations that guide commercial decisions for Haypp and our suppliers
* Cross‑Functional Collaboration: Partner with commercial, product, data, and marketing teams to identify opportunities and shape media‑driven strategies
* Dashboarding & Reporting: Improve and maintain dashboards, reports, and visualizations that track key metrics across markets and suppliers
* Advanced Data Analysis: Collect, clean, and interpret large multi‑source datasets to identify patterns, anomalies, and business‑critical insights
* Process Optimization: Lead continuous improvement initiatives by identifying inefficiencies and proposing scalable solutions
* Competitor & Industry Benchmarking: Conduct industry and competitor analysis to help shape the evolution of our retail media offering


**What We Want From You**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Finance, Economics, or related field
* 7+ years of experience in analytical roles, preferably in a media setting or online retail environment
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate complex data into actionable insights
* Experience with Google analytics and media ad-serving tools as well as data visualization tools such as Qlik Sense, Tableau, Looker or similar platforms is a preferred
* Experience with SQL or comparable data‑querying tools (e.g., BigQuery, Snowflake, Presto) is plus
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills with the ability to effectively interact with stakeholders at all levels
* Ability to thrive in a dynamic and fast-paced environment with changing priorities


**What We Offer**
 We are a value driven company with our values
 *We team up* 
 ,
 *Innovation Drives Us* 
 ,
 *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* 
 and
 *Going the Extra Mile* 
 at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.
   

  

 Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:
   

  

* Premium ITP1 occupational pension savings plan
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!
   

  

 Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Financal Systems Engineer
description:
**TL;DR:** 
 We're looking for an experienced engineer to build and own Lovable's financial systems infrastructure - the systems that power our payment flows, usage metering, monetization, and billing infrastructure.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**Why this role?**
 As we scale globally, our financial systems need to match. We're building a dedicated Financial Systems Engineering team to own everything that connects product usage to revenue — subscription billing, a credit-based usage model, pass-through service billing, and the infrastructure to support new monetization models as we grow.
   

  

 This is a senior role with outsized impact. You won't be stuck maintaining legacy systems. You'll be rebuilding and rearchitecting while we're still small enough to do it right, shaping the architecture that will support our scale-up journey for years to come.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
 Must Have
   

  

* 8+ years building production financial systems (payments, billing, metering, or fintech infrastructure)
* Deep expertise with payment platforms—subscription billing, international payments, payment lifecycle management
* Strong backend engineering skills with systems handling real money at scale
* Experience with usage-based or consumption billing models
* Track record working in mature environments where you've seen "what good looks like"
* Experience in financial compliance environments—tax, audit standards, or regulated fintech
* Comfortable with ambiguity—you can take a business problem and architect a technical solution


 Technical Skills
   

  

* Understanding of financial data accuracy requirements (reconciliation, audit trails, idempotency)
* Proficiency in backend languages (TypeScript, Python, Go, or similar)
* Experience with PostgreSQL or similar relational databases
* Familiarity with event-driven architectures and real-time data processing
* Cloud platform experience (GCP preferred)


 Nice to Have
   

  

* Experience with cloud cost management tools (FinOps)
* Background in revenue recognition (ASC 606) or financial compliance
* Previous work at a company with usage-based pricing
* Experience with workflow engines like Temporal


**What You’ll Do**
 Front-Office Systems
   

  

* Own the billing system of record—from Stripe integration through to the metering ledger
* Build and scale metering infrastructure for our credit-based economy
* Architect billing pipelines for pass-through services with cost attribution and margin tracking
* Design monetization systems that support new pricing models
* Implement fraud detection and payment failure recovery workflows
* Handle multi-currency pricing and settlement for global customers


 Back-Office Systems
   

  

* Build cloud/LLM cost management systems—tracking, allocation, and optimization
* Develop internal tooling for discounts, credits, and promotional mechanics
* Create financial reconciliation pipelines between multiple systems
* Support ASC 606 revenue recognition requirements
* Work with tax engines and compliance tooling


 Cross-Functional
   

  

* Partner with Finance, BizOps, and Product to translate business requirements into technical solutions
* Collaborate with Data Engineering on financial data pipelines
* Define technical standards and best practices for financial systems


**What Success Looks Like**
 First 30 Days
   

  

* Ship quick wins—we move fast and learn by doing
* Understand our current payment and billing architecture
* Build relationships with Finance, BizOps, and Product stakeholders


 First 90 Days
   

  

* Own a critical piece of our payment or metering infrastructure
* Ship improvements that directly impact revenue reliability or cost efficiency


 First 180 Days
   

  

* The systems you've built are powering significant revenue
* Financial systems are no longer a bottleneck for product growth


**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.

title: Fraud Operations Specialist
description:
**What You Will Do**
 As a Fraud Operations Specialist, you will be a key contributor to Klarna’s fraud operations, combining hands-on casework with continuous improvement of how fraud is managed across the organization. You will work across consumer and partner fraud, handling cases with accuracy and consistency while maintaining deep operational expertise that supports the team as an internal centre of excellence. In this position, you will identify inefficiencies, escalate risks, and contribute to improving processes, tooling, and ways of working. You will collaborate with internal teams and vendor partners, validate operational changes through hands-on casework, and share insights that strengthen fraud prevention, detection, and investigation strategies.
   

  

**Who You Are**
* At least 3 years of experience in fraud operations within fintech, payments, or a similar environment
* Strong understanding of fraud typologies across consumer and/or partner fraud
