* Experience handling cases end-to-end with a high level of accuracy and consistency
* Ability to identify operational gaps, inconsistencies, and risks, and proactively raise them
* Experience working with fraud tooling and case management systems across automated and manual workflows
* Analytical mindset, with the ability to identify patterns and translate them into actionable insights
* Clear communicator, able to document processes, decision rationale, and share insights with stakeholders
* Self-directed and reliable, with the ability to manage workload and adapt in a fast-changing environment


**Awesome to have**
* Experience working with outsourced vendor operations, including quality monitoring and feedback loops
* Experience contributing to SOP creation, maintenance, and operational documentation
* Experience participating in calibrations, quality checks, or training initiatives
* Exposure to cross-functional collaboration with product, compliance, or risk teams
* Relevant certification such as CFE (Certified Fraud Examiner) or equivalent


 Please include a CV in English
   

  

 Curious to learn more about Klarna and what it’s like to work here? Explore our career site!

title: Service Delivery Manager
description:
***Var 660:e person som går till arbetet i Sverige är en ISS-medarbetare - nu har du chansen att bli en av dom!***




***ISS söker nu en Service Delivery Manager med ansvar för* 
 IT‑leverans och systemförvaltning inom People & Culture (HR).** 




  





 Som ett av Nordens största tjänsteföretag med över 450 000 medarbetare globalt, har ISS ett tydligt syfte: Connecting people and places to make the world work better. På ISS Facility Services skapas platser och miljöer som gör vardagen enklare, mer effektiv och inspirerande – alltid med kvalitet och omtanke.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som IT Service Delivery Manager ansvarar du för att förvalta, utveckla och säkerställa stabil drift av applikationer inom ditt ansvarsområde. Rollen är både operativ och strategisk och innebär ett nära samarbete med verksamheten, IT-leverantörer och interna IT-funktioner.
 



 Du har ett helhetsansvar för serviceleveransen och arbetar kontinuerligt med förbättringar, prioriteringar och kvalitetssäkring. Rollen innebär också att säkerställa att applikationerna inom ditt ansvarsområde uppfyller ISS krav på IT‑säkerhet, datakvalitet och efterlevnad av regelverk såsom GDPR.
 



  





 I rollen ingår bland annat att:
 


* Säkerställa stabilt och ändamålsenligt systemstöd inom People & Culture/HR
* Driva analys, planering och kontinuerliga förbättringar i samarbete med verksamheten
* Ansvara för styrning av IT-leverantörer avseende avtal, kostnader, releaser, incidenter och applikationsutveckling
* Planera och leda testaktiviteter vid förändringar och nya releaser
* Delta i och bidra till prioriteringar och roadmaps, inklusive i globala ISS-forum
* Agera second line vid incidenter samt genomföra och dokumentera rotorsaksanalyser
* Säkerställa att applikationer och integrationer följer ISS krav
* Ansvara för dokumentation samt årlig revidering av Business Continuity- och Disaster Recovery-planer
* Fatta operativa och taktiska beslut inom fastställd budget



 Du arbetar proaktivt med leverantörsstyrning och bidrar till att IT-tjänster levereras i linje med ISS servicekultur och övergripande strategi.
 



  





**Vem är du** 




 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:
 


* Relevant akademisk utbildning inom IT, systemvetenskap eller motsvarande
* Minst tre års erfarenhet av systemförvaltning eller IT Service Delivery
* Bred erfarenhet och god förståelse för IT Service Management
* God förståelse för applikationer, infrastruktur, molntjänster och arkitektur
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift
* Driven och nyfiken



 Meriterande är om du har:
 


* Tidigare erfarenhet av HR‑domänen (processer och system) och arbete i större organisationer
* Erfarenhet av arbete i projektform
* Vana av leverantörsstyrning och kontraktshantering



**Personliga egenskaper** 




 Men viktigaste av allt så tror vi att du är:
 


* Strukturerad och ansvarstagande
* Kvalitetsmedveten och analytisk
* Kommunikativ och har en god samarbetsförmåga



  





**Om ISS** 




 ISS vision är People Make Places. Det innebär att skapa platser där människor trivs, känner sig trygga och kan prestera sitt bästa. Som medarbetare på ISS blir du en del av en värderingsstyrd organisation där engagemang, ansvar och samarbete är centrala delar av kulturen.
 



  





 Låter detta som något för dig? Sök idag då urvalet sker löpande!
 



  





**Övrig information** 




 Anställningsform: Detta är en direktanställning hos ISS
 



 Start: Enligt överenskommelse med hänsyn till uppsägningstid
 



 Omfattning: Heltid, måndag-fredag, 8-17 med flextid/förtroendearbetstid
 



 Lönespann: runt 45-50
 



 Plats: Stockholm

title: Control Center Team Manager | SEB, Solna
description:
Since SEB was founded in 1856, we have focused on long-term relationships and innovating based on customer needs. We embrace the rapid evolution of our industry, driving towards a sustainable future. As a leader, we want you to be a champion for creating value, long-term thinking, holistic development, and inclusivity. Since our inception, we have aimed for continuous improvement, and we hope you will take up the challenge to make your mark. Welcome to SEB.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
 Control Center is a first line support function, with continuous monitoring and operation services 24 hours per day, 7 days of the week and 365 days per year. The team consists of 21 experienced people of those 18 operators working shifts and 3 working normal office hours. They all contribute to ensuring a robust and stable technological environment for the whole of SEB. We support applications and IT platforms throughout the bank; we also provide internal Service Desk support on weekday evenings. Control Center is part of Technology, specifically Infrastructure & Security Operations (ISO). We are now looking for a Team Manager to lead the team both as people and Product Manager.
   

  

 As people leader, you’ll listen actively, understand experiences without absorbing emotions, create clarity, consistency, and spaces where individuals feel safe to speak up, challenge ideas, and share concerns—essential during everyday operations.
   

  

 As product leader, you’ll identify needs and make use of the ideas for improvements from the team and its surroundings.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Accountable for the team’s performance, delivery, and KPIs. Remove impediments and provide
* guidance while empowering teams to make their own decisions.
* Accountable for daily operations for the team
* Shift planning, performance management, and competence development
* Be part of the development of proactive monitoring to identify issues before they affect customers.
* Continuous development and change ensuring relevance to business and IT needs
* Ensure that Control Center services and processes always have efficient supporting tools (e.g., dashboards, observability tools, knowledge mgmt.)
* Follow up on statistics, define and monitor SLOs and KPIs. Identify improvement opportunities.
* Provide leadership during and after major incidents, escalations, and follow up.
* Present operational status, risks, trends and recommendations to other stakeholders within the bank
* Be an active part of the management team for the department


**Qualifications**
* Proficiency in the Technology domain is required
* Proven strong leadership experience as a manager, beneficial if in IT operations or similar
* Excellent analytical, communication, and decision-making skills
* Agile leadership skills
* Strong understanding of large and complex IT environments with applications and technical platforms
* Experience/knowledge of 24/7 operations and time critical environments
* Experience in driving changes: Modernize tooling and way of working
* Experience in risk management and compliance
* Knowledge of ITIL processes (e.g. incident and event management)
* Strong interest in monitoring and observability platforms, automation tools and AI technologies
* Fluent in both Swedish and English, spoken and written


**Who We Are Looking For**
* A confident, inspiring and experienced leader
* Passionate about IT quality and what needed to achieve it (e.g. proactivity)
* Motivated by developing people and modernizing operational environments
* Curious, forward thinking, and comfortable driving change


**What We Offer**
* A key role where you help shape the future of our Control Center while implementing a modern, AI enabled operational environment.
* A collaborative culture that values innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement
* Opportunity for career growth in leadership, automation, and “NextGen” operations


**Do you want to be a part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 10 of April. If you have questions about the position, please contact Petri Penttinen, department manager at petri.penttinen@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Daytime Operator
description:
Arbeta Som Dagtidsoperatör På Crane Currency i TUMBA Och Gör Skillnad Där Människor Verkligen Betyder Något. Vilka Vi Är
   

  

 Crane Currency är ett ledande industriteknikföretag och en pionjär inom valutatillverkning och avancerad mikrooptisk teknik för att säkra fysiska produkter. Ja, chansen är stor att du har vår produkt i din plånbok just nu! Vår sofistikerade utrustning och programvara utnyttjar egenutvecklade kärnfunktioner med detekterings- och avkänningsteknik. Runt om i världen litar våra kunder på att vi förutser deras behov med innovativa, pålitliga och högkvalitativa lösningar och tjänster för valuta och autentisering – precis som de har gjort i generationer. Läs mer på
   

  

 Som operatör i Pappersmaskinsavdelningen säkerställer du en smidig och effektiv produktion av högkvalitativt papper, vilket är avgörande för företagets framgång. Din expertis i att driva och underhålla pappersmaskinerna minimerar stillestånd och maximerar produktiviteten. Genom att noggrant övervaka produktionsprocessen säkerställer du att pappret uppfyller stränga kvalitetsstandarder, vilket förbättrar företagets rykte. Din proaktiva inställning till felsökning och problemlösning förhindrar kostsamma störningar. Slutligen är din roll avgörande för att leverera en pålitlig produkt som uppfyller kundens och myndigheternas förväntningar.
   

  

 I rollen som dagtidsoperatör på Pappersmaskinen arbetar du för närvarande
 **dagtid** 
 i ett team med andra operatörer och maskinförare.
   

  

 Du kommer i din roll ha ett operativt ansvar där du stöttar avdelningen i att nå uppsatta mål inom både kvalitet och kvantitet. Du förbereder inför kommande produktioner och fungerar som en länk mellan produktionsledning och produktion genom att utbilda, implementera och driva förbättringsarbete – med särskilt fokus på operativt stöd till produktionen
   

  

 OBS:
 *I rollen ingår att vid behov med kortare varsel än 14 dagar ändra skift för att fylla ut vid sjukdom, utbildning eller andra oförutsedda händelser.*
****I din roll som operatör kommer du att bland annat ansvara för:****
* Samverka för enhetligt arbetssätt och att framtagna standarder följs
* Coacha och säkerställa att medarbetarna utvecklas och gör rätt enligt arbetssätt och standarder
* Arbeta operativt i produktionen för att säkerställa att nya rutiner och förbättringsarbeten når samtliga operatörer
* Arbeta med ständiga förbättringar och delta aktivt i arbete med Continous Improvment, medverka i Kaizen samt driva JDI event.
* Säkerställa att interna och externa krav följs enligt Cranes policies och Cranes Business System (CBS) för SQDCG områdena – Säkerhet, Kvalitet, Leverans, Kostnad, Tillväxt för de processer som berör befattningen
* Nära samarbete med andra berörda avdelningar


****Kunskap och expertis som betyder mest för den här rollen:****
****Din profil:****
* 3-årig gymnasieutbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet.
* Truckkort.
* Minst 5 års arbetslivserfarenhet ifrån processindustri.
* Maskinförare och Mälderist samt ytterligare minst en roll till (Rullare eller Torkare)
* Superuser för Boulder samt PulpEye
* God muntlig och skriftlig färdighet i svenska.
* Goda IT-kunskaper.


****Övrigt:****
* Driven och modig ledare
* Mycket god samarbetsförmåga
* Förmåga att lära ut på ett pedagogiskt sätt
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga
* Initiativtagande
* Helhetssyn med god förmåga att kunna prioritera
* Erfarenhet av arbete med LEAN och ständiga förbättringar


****Förmåner:****
****Så här tar vi hand om dig:****
 Vi erbjuder förstklassiga medicinska förmåner, inklusive friskvårdsbidrag och ersättning för mediciner och medicinsk vård, möjligheter till personlig utveckling, samhällsengagemang, konkurrenskraftig ersättning, semester, föräldraledighet och flera nivåer av pensionsplaner. Läs mer om våra förmåner här
   

  

**Vad Som Driver Vårt Team**
 Vi är ett passionerat team med 1 200 kreatörer och problemlösare, förenade av vårt syfte, vi ger människor förtroende varje dag i ögonblick som betyder något. Detta kommer till liv genom våra gemensamma värderingar:
   

  

* People Matter
* Do the Right Thing
* Trusted Partner
* Innovate for Growth
* Always Improving


 Läs mer om våra värderingar och vår kultur:
   

  

 Du kan också läsa mer om oss på:
   

  

**Här Finns Vi**
 Din roll är i Tumba, Stockholm, beläget i det anrika området Tumba Bruk, ca 10 - minuters promenad från tågstationen, 30 km söder om Stockholm, och cirka 20 minuter från Stockholms Centralstation.
   

  

**Läs Mer Om Oss Här**
 Crane Currency är en drogfri arbetsplats.
   

  

 Crane NXT är en arbetsgivare med lika möjligheter. Kvalificerade sökande kommer att övervägas för anställning utan hänsyn till ras, hudfärg, religion, kön, ålder, funktionshinder eller nationellt ursprung eller någon annan egenskap som skyddas enligt tillämplig lokal lagstiftning.
   

  

**#CCY**
**#ONSITE**
 #cranecurrency, #opentowork, #jobsearch, #hireme, #jobhunt, #jobseeker, #hiring, #recruitment, #jobsearching, #employment, #careers, #nowhiring #TUMBA

title: IT Product Owner / Senior Product Owner, People and Culture, Sustainability and Communications
description:
We are rapidly developing the business of Tokmanni Group and making significant investments in the development of IT operations. Sustainability is becoming an increasingly important part of our business strategy. We want to help Mr. Tokmanni and his colleagues meet future needs by supporting our business in the areas of HR, Sustainability, and Communication from an IT systems perspective.
 


  


 We are now looking for an IT professional to strengthen our application services team, which consists of skilled and nice colleagues. In your role, you will work as a Product Owner and IT partner for People and Culture and sustainability teams as well as communication experts throughout the Tokmanni Group.
 


  





  


**Main responsibilities** 



  


 You will work closely with various internal stakeholders and multiple service providers. Within the Tokmanni Group, you will collaborate with People and Culture and Sustainability teams, Communication, IT colleagues, and other business development teams.
 


  


 An important part of your job is to work closely with these functions to understand their needs, use your IT expertise to translate business requirements into clear technical specifications, and guide our service providers to deliver solutions that meet both technical and business expectations. You will also play a key role in ensuring that IT projects follow our processes and that technical requirements, vendor capabilities and contractual obligations meet our quality standards.
 


  


 The requirements brought by sustainability reporting and directives will bring significant changes to our systems, and you will play a key role in coordinating and enabling these changes from an IT perspective. You will participate in strategic projects as a representative of your area of responsibility and act as a project manager in smaller projects.
 


  


 You will be responsible for an important role within Tokmanni’s IT function, where your decisions and expertise significantly influence the success of our IT projects and help ensure that our systems support the long‑term success of the whole Group.
 


  





  


**What we expect from you?** 



  


 - At least 3 years of experience in IT roles involving IT product ownership and acting as a technical IT partner for business or support functions (e.g., People and Culture, Sustainability, or Communications)
 


  


 ·Experience in IT development tasks and project work including cross-functional projects
 


  


 ·Ability to align product goals with Business Strategy
 


  


 ·Ability to listen and understand diverse stakeholder needs and to translate business needs into technical requirements
 


  


 ·Demand Management experience in the defined responsibility area
 


  


 ·Experience in managing budgets for digital products or IT initiatives
 


  


 ·Willingness to make trade-offs and prioritize features based on value
 


  


 ·Ability to forecast, track, and optimize costs across projects and vendors
 


  


 ·Basic knowledge of information security and data protection
 


  


 ·ITIL process know-how (especially IM, CM and PM)
 


  


 ·Familiarity with modern IT development models and ability to work effectively with our suppliers and support our department in implementing modern development models
 


  


 ·Backlog Management experience and familiarity with tools like Effecte (MS Office365)
 


  


 ·Familiarity with internal communication platforms (SharePoint, MS TEAMS, internet tools, etc)
 


  


 ·Basic understanding of data privacy and compliance (e.g. GDPR)
 


  


 ·Ability to fluently engage in technical discussions with suppliers and IT colleagues as well as to communicate clearly and practically with communications, HR and sustainability teams and other business units across the company
 


  


 ·Willingness to develop and maintain documentation for your area of responsibility
 


  


 ·Excellent verbal and written communication skills
 


  


 ·Fluent oral and written in English and Finnish and/or Swedish.
 


  





  


**We also value:** 



  


 ·Skills in facilitating workshops
 


  


 ·Collaborative team-player mindset and development-oriented approach
 


  


 ·Openness to learn new domains and technologies
 


  


 ·Ability to work in a fast-paced, evolving environment
 


  


 ·Can-Do attitude and positive solution-oriented mindset
 


  


 ·Experience in HR and sustainability matters is considered an advantage
 


  


 ·Experience with system integrations and APIs is a plus
 


  


 ·Awareness of sustainability reporting standards (ESG metrics, etc) is a plus
 


  





  


**We offer you:** 



  


 • A group-level role in a growing and international publicly listed company, which is one of the leading discount retail chains in the Nordic countries
 


  


 • A responsible and business-critical role where you can utilize and share your expertise and actively participate in the development of organizational practices
 


  


 • The opportunity to work in a workplace where the company's values genuinely reflect daily work
 


  


 • The opportunity to bring forth your views and leave your mark on projects and systems as part of the continuous development of Tokmanni Group's IT
 


  


 • Rewarding collaboration with friendly, encouraging, and supportive colleagues
 


  


 • Hybrid work model (2 days in the office / 3 days remote work)
 


  


 • The opportunity to develop in your job
 


  


 • Benefits such as staff discounts in stores for yourself and your family members, staff store, exercise and culture vouchers (ePassi), staff restaurant at the headquarters, incentive bonus system, employee benefit program, and Eduhouse online courses
 


  


 • Your own mentor who will support you in your new job
 


  





  


**Application instructions and additional information** 



  


 The position is permanent and full-time (37.5 hours/week). On office days, we work at our Tokmanni headquarters in Mäntsälä, Finland or Dollarstore headquarters in Kista, Sweden.
 


  


 For more information, please contact Merituuli Toivio, Service Area Lead, Applications, (+358 400 382 909), preferably on Tuesdays and Thursdays between 4-5 PM (on vacation between April 20 and May 3rd) or via email at merituuli.toivio@tokmanni.fi.
 


  


 Apply for the position as soon as possible or no later than
 **April 20th** 
 by filling out the application form. We will start processing applications during the application period. Please note that we only accept applications submitted through the application form.

title: Lead Security Engineer – Core Technology Team
description:
**Tech Innovation at Apotea**
 Apotea is Sweden’s largest online pharmacy, committed to making healthcare products accessible and efficient for everyone. Our Tech department aims to redefine how AI and automation drive modern businesses — not by forcing AI into traditional workflows, but by creating AI-driven systems that give humans control, insight, and the ability to apply their expertise where it matters most.
   

  

 The Core Technology team builds the architectural foundation supporting e-commerce, logistics, data, AI/ML, and customer experience. We ensure all development aligns with our long-term vision and contributes to Apotea’s growth.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Lead Security Engineer to take full ownership of Apotea’s security strategy, ensure compliance, and enable teams to build and innovate securely at scale.
   

  

**The Role**
 As Lead Security Engineer, you will define, implement, and evolve security practices across AWS (serverless-first), e-commerce, logistics, and data platforms. The role combines strategic leadership with hands-on engineering — you will implement security yourself while empowering others to do so.
   

  

 You will act as the first-line technical security lead, defining guardrails, monitoring risks, and leading incident response. You will develop secure practices for coding with AI assistants, ensuring generated code meets security standards, avoids data leakage, and aligns with regulations. You will also communicate complex security concepts clearly across the organization.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Sveavägen 168, Stockholm, Sweden (On-site)
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Security Leadership
   

  

* Own and evolve Apotea’s security strategy across cloud, applications, and infrastructure.
* Translate business and regulatory requirements into sustainable security practices.
* Define guardrails, best practices, and reference implementations for teams.


 Hands-On Security Engineering
   

  

* Design and implement secure AWS serverless and data-driven systems.
* Lead IAM practices, enforcing least-privilege and zero-trust.
* Oversee vulnerability management, penetration testing, and patching.
* Ensure secure DevSecOps pipelines and IaC security.


 Monitoring & Incident Response
   

  

* Build and operate monitoring, detection, and alerting systems (SIEM, EDR, GuardDuty, Security Hub).
* Lead incident response: investigate, contain, and recover from security events.
* Maintain and test playbooks for emerging threats.


 Governance & Compliance
   

  

* Ensure GDPR, healthcare regulations, and industry standards compliance.
* Embed security and privacy by design across development.
* Partner with legal, compliance, and business units for regulatory readiness.
* Provide training and frameworks for safe AI usage without compromising security.


 Collaboration & Culture
   

  

* Work closely with engineers, architects, and product teams to integrate security early.
* Mentor engineers in secure coding and infrastructure practices.
* Advocate for a strong security culture.


**Qualifications**
* Extensive experience as a security engineer and organization’s main security expert.
* Proven expertise in securing AWS (IAM, networking, serverless, encryption, monitoring).
* Strong background in designing secure, scalable, cloud-native systems.
* Hands-on experience with SIEM, EDR, vulnerability scanners, secrets management.
* Deep knowledge in DevSecOps and IaC (CDK, Terraform, CloudFormation).
* Programming/scripting skills: Go, TypeScript, .NET, Python, or similar.


 Nice to Have: experience in regulated industries, compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, PCI-DSS), or red/blue team operations.
   

  

**Why Join Apotea?**
* Stable company with a meaningful mission: improving healthcare accessibility.
* Work on cutting-edge AI, ML, and automation impacting millions of customers.
* Modern cloud-native technologies (serverless, AI, event-driven).
* Flat, agile organization with minimal bureaucracy.
* Career growth through training, mentorship, and conferences.
* End-to-end project ownership from concept to deployment.
* Culture of experimentation, collaboration, and innovation.


**About Apotea**
 Apotea.se is Sweden’s largest online pharmacy, with the country’s broadest range of over 32,000 non-prescription items and nearly 19,000 prescription drugs for humans and animals. Recognized as Sweden’s most sustainable e-commerce company (Sustainable Brand Index 2021), we simplify everyday life for our customers with fast deliveries and expert advice. In 2024, Apotea reached a turnover of SEK 6.5 billion and currently employs about 1,000 people across Stockholm, Lidingö, and Morgongåva.
   

  

 Apotea is an inclusive employer that values diversity. We welcome all applicants and strive to create a work environment where people, regardless of background, gender, age, religion, or disability, can thrive and grow.
   

  

**Recruitment Process**
* Apply
* Interview: Screening
* Interview: Technical Capabilities
* Interview: Culture Fit
* Background Check: As a pharmacy, we always conduct a background check.
* Offer Presented


**Application**
 Do not hesitate to send in your application already today. For more information or questions, visit our career page or contact us at jobb@apotea.se. We do not accept applications via email.
   

  

 LinkedIn
   

  

 Instagram
   

  

**Join Us and Make a Difference - We hope you want to be a part of our team!**
 Submit your application today—interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis, and the position may be filled immediately. Start date by agreement.
   

  

 Welcome to Apotea – where technology meets health and creates magic!
   

  

 Apotea är Sveriges största nätapotek med fokus på hållbarhet och snabba leveranser. Vår logistik är hjärtat i verksamheten, och vi har som mål att bli Nordens största apotek och Sveriges mest hållbara företag. Tillsammans med våra kunder har vi samlat in över 100 miljoner kronor till välgörenhet, och vi fortsätter att växa varje år – med våra medarbetare som den drivande kraften bakom framgången.

title: Senior IT-arkitekt till CGI
description:
Position Description
   

  

 Vill du arbeta i teknikens framkant och bidra till en mer hållbar framtid? CGI söker nu en senior IT-arkitekt som vill vara med och leverera lösningar till några av Sveriges mest samhällskritiska aktörer inom energi- och försörjningssektorn.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i uppdrag hos våra kunder inom elnät, fjärrvärme, elhandel, vatten och avlopp där digitaliseringen är central för en säker och effektiv energiförsörjning.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 I denna roll kommer du att verka som ledande IT-arkitekt i uppdrag och projekt hos CGI:s kunder inom energibranschen. Du blir en nyckelperson i att ta fram arkitekturlösningar som är hållbara, skalbara och anpassade efter kundens affärs- och verksamhetsmål. Du kommer att samarbeta med både kundens verksamhet och tekniska team i tätt samspel med CGI:s egna konsulter för att säkra en leverans i världsklass.
   

  

 Vi letar efter dig med erfarenhet som:
   

  

* Lösningsarkitekt
* Informationsarkitekt
* Infrastrukturarkitekt
* Integrationsarkitekt


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
 Vi tror att du har:
   

  

* Minst 7 års erfarenhet som IT-arkitekt inom något av ovan nämnda områden
* Tidigare erfarenhet från den svenska energibranschen
* Förmåga att driva tekniska vägval och omvandla affärsbehov till lösningar
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga och trivs i konsultrollen
* Flytande svenska och mycket god engelska i tal och skrift


 Meriterande är:
   

  

* Certifieringar inom TOGAF, ArchiMate, Azure, AWS eller liknande
* Förståelse för branschspecifika regelverk (t.ex. EI, GDPR, NIS2)
* Tidigare erfarenhet av leverans i konsultroll eller större transformationsprogram


**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 På CGI blir du delägare i företaget genom vårt aktieprogram, vilket speglar vår kultur av långsiktighet och engagemang. Du blir del av ett erfaret arkitektnätverk där du har möjlighet att utvecklas, utmanas och bidra till arkitekturens riktning både inom CGI och hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Du får:
   

  

* Leverera lösningar i teknikens framkant till ledande energibolag
* Vara del av ett av Sveriges mest erfarna IT-arkitektteam
* Flexibilitet i var och hur du arbetar
* Möjlighet till personlig utveckling och certifieringar


 Plats: Stockholm - hybridarbete möjligt i viss omfattning
   

  

**Vill du veta mer?**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan i dag! Om du har frågor om rollen, hör gärna av dig till rekryterande ledare Jakob Elkert, Director Consulting Services/ Konsultchef, på jakob.elkert@cgi.com
   

  

 Välkommen till CGI där du får vara med och bygga framtidens hållbara samhälle!
   

  

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.
   

  

 Senior IT-arkitekt till CGI
   

  

**Job Description**
 Vill du arbeta i teknikens framkant och bidra till en mer hållbar framtid? CGI söker nu en senior IT-arkitekt som vill vara med och leverera lösningar till några av Sveriges mest samhällskritiska aktörer inom energi- och försörjningssektorn.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i uppdrag hos våra kunder inom elnät, fjärrvärme, elhandel, vatten och avlopp där digitaliseringen är central för en säker och effektiv energiförsörjning.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 I denna roll kommer du att verka som ledande IT-arkitekt i uppdrag och projekt hos CGI:s kunder inom energibranschen. Du blir en nyckelperson i att ta fram arkitekturlösningar som är hållbara, skalbara och anpassade efter kundens affärs- och verksamhetsmål. Du kommer att samarbeta med både kundens verksamhet och tekniska team i tätt samspel med CGI:s egna konsulter för att säkra en leverans i världsklass.
   

  

 Vi letar efter dig med erfarenhet som:
   

  

* Lösningsarkitekt
* Informationsarkitekt
* Infrastrukturarkitekt
* Integrationsarkitekt


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
 Vi tror att du har:
   

  

* Minst 7 års erfarenhet som IT-arkitekt inom något av ovan nämnda områden
* Tidigare erfarenhet från den svenska energibranschen
* Förmåga att driva tekniska vägval och omvandla affärsbehov till lösningar
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga och trivs i konsultrollen
* Flytande svenska och mycket god engelska i tal och skrift


 Meriterande är:
   

  

* Certifieringar inom TOGAF, ArchiMate, Azure, AWS eller liknande
* Förståelse för branschspecifika regelverk (t.ex. EI, GDPR, NIS2)
* Tidigare erfarenhet av leverans i konsultroll eller större transformationsprogram


**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 På CGI blir du delägare i företaget genom vårt aktieprogram, vilket speglar vår kultur av långsiktighet och engagemang. Du blir del av ett erfaret arkitektnätverk där du har möjlighet att utvecklas, utmanas och bidra till arkitekturens riktning både inom CGI och hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Du får:
   

  

* Leverera lösningar i teknikens framkant till ledande energibolag
* Vara del av ett av Sveriges mest erfarna IT-arkitektteam
* Flexibilitet i var och hur du arbetar
* Möjlighet till personlig utveckling och certifieringar


 Plats: Stockholm - hybridarbete möjligt i viss omfattning
   

  

**Vill du veta mer?**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan i dag! Om du har frågor om rollen, hör gärna av dig till rekryterande ledare Jakob Elkert, Director Consulting Services/ Konsultchef, på jakob.elkert@cgi.com
   

  

 Välkommen till CGI där du får vara med och bygga framtidens hållbara samhälle!
   

  

**Ensemble, en tant que propriétaires, mettons notre savoir-faire à l’œuvre.**
 La vie chez CGI est ancrée dans l’actionnariat, le travail d’équipe, le respect et un sentiment d’appartenance. Chez nous, vous pourrez exploiter votre plein potentiel parce que…
   

  

 Nous vous invitons à devenir propriétaire dès le jour 1 alors que nous travaillons ensemble à faire de notre rêve une réalité. C’est pourquoi nous nous désignons comme associés de CGI, plutôt que comme employés. Nous tirons profit des retombées de notre succès collectif et contribuons activement à l’orientation et à la stratégie de notre entreprise.
   

  

 Votre travail crée de la valeur. Vous élaborerez des solutions novatrices et développerez des relations durables avec vos collègues et clients, tout en ayant accès à des capacités mondiales pour concrétiser vos idées, saisir de nouvelles opportunités, et bénéficier d’une expertise sectorielle et technologique de pointe.
   

  

 Vous ferez évoluer votre carrière en vous joignant à une entreprise bâtie pour croître et durer. Vous serez soutenus par des leaders qui ont votre santé et bien-être à cœur et qui vous permettront de saisir des occasions afin de parfaire vos compétences et élargir les horizons.
   

  

 Joignez-vous à nous, l’une des plus importantes entreprises de conseil en technologie de l’information (TI) et en management au monde.

title: Fraud Operations Lead
description:
As Fraud Operations Lead, you sit at the intersection of operational execution and fraud intelligence, shaping how fraud operations evolve as Klarna scales. You are responsible for improving how teams, processes, and tools work together to deliver efficient, high-quality outcomes across consumer and partner fraud. This position combines leadership with hands-on expertise, ensuring strong ownership of operational quality while continuously advancing how work is performed.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 You will own and evolve Klarna’s fraud operations framework, leading a team of specialists while maintaining hands-on involvement to ensure strong process understanding and quality. You will work closely with external vendors while retaining internal expertise, enabling the team to validate workflows, support during operational peaks, and continuously improve performance. By identifying inefficiencies and optimizing processes, you will increase consistency and effectiveness across operations. You will act as the bridge between fraud operations and the broader fraud function, including prevention, detection, and investigation, ensuring that operational insights inform strategy and that evolving priorities are translated into scalable processes.
   

  

**Who You Are**
* 5+ years of experience in fraud operations within fintech, payments, or a similar environment
* Proven experience managing teams while contributing to hands-on operational work
* Strong experience in process improvement, with the ability to identify inefficiencies and implement scalable solutions
* Familiarity with fraud tooling, case management systems, and both manual and automated workflows
* Data-driven mindset with experience defining KPIs and using insights to guide decisions
* Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional stakeholders including Product, Tech, Risk, and Compliance
* Experience working with external vendors, including performance monitoring and relationship management
* Strong communication skills with the ability to engage stakeholders at different levels


**Awesome to have**
* Certification such as Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE) or equivalent
* Experience in outsourcing or vendor-managed operations environments
* Exposure to fraud prevention, detection, or investigation functions
* Experience influencing tooling or automation improvements
* Background in scaling operations in a high-growth environment


 Please include a CV in English
   

  

 Curious to learn more about Klarna and what it’s like to work here? Explore our career site!

title: Network and Client Management – UK
description:
**Are you a relationship builder with a passion for driving growth?**
 Do you thrive in conversations with senior decision-makers and know how to turn them into lasting partnerships?
   

  

 Are you motivated by achieving tangible results while expanding a powerful international business network?
   

  

 If that sounds like you, keep reading.
   

  

**Your Misison**
 Management Events is seeking
 **Key Client Managers and Network Growth Managers** 
 to join our team. You will play a pivotal role in expanding our network of high-level decision-makers. How do these roles contribute to the company's growth?
   

  

 As a
 **Key Client Manager** 
 , you will focus on building and maintaining strong relationships with existing C-suite clients.
   

  

 As a
 **Network Growth Manager** 
 , you will identify and cultivate new relationships with C-suite executives.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
* Identify and engage with high-level decision-makers in your target market market.
* Initiate contact with C-level Executives by phone and on LinkedIn to excite them about our concept.
* Demonstrate the value of our service and convince them to become part of our exclusive business network in personal scheduled videocall meetings.
* Build strong, long-term relationships with C-level executives.
* Learn more about their interests, investments plans and upcoming projects.
* Develop and execute strategies to expand our network and build valuable relationships, by knowing your customers key challenges and focus areas.
* Contribute to the overall growth and success of Management Events.


****What We’re Looking For****
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
* Strong business acumen and a results-oriented mindset.
* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.
* Have a passion for connecting with key industry players and driving business growth.
* Proactive approach and eagerness towards connecting with new clients and overcoming challenges.
* Ideally experience in a commercial and/or client-facing role (e.g. hospitality, sales, customer service, etc.).
* Fluency in English.


**What We Offer**
* Performance rewarded: You’ll receive an attractive compensation package with base salary, commission, and an additional starter bonus to support you as you ramp up and build your sales pipeline.
* Growth and learning: From day one, you’ll benefit from a four-week onboarding program and continuous coaching through our international ME Academy, ensuring you’re always developing and moving forward in your career.
* Career opportunities across Europe: As we continue to grow, you’ll have the chance to explore international opportunities. With offices in Helsinki, Amsterdam, Antwerp, Copenhagen, Berlin, Stockholm, Kuala Lumpur, and Barcelona, your career can take you anywhere.
* Recharge & Thrive: We care about your well-being and want you to stay energized both inside and outside of work. That’s why you can earn up to 12 extra vacation days each year and enjoy local perks such as gym and massage discounts, along with other wellness benefits. Curious about the details in your location? Ask your recruiter to learn more.
* We win together: Collaboration is our driving force, and every success is shared. That’s why we love bringing people together through company trips, international events, and local office celebrations — whether it’s hitting the slopes in Levi, running the Berlin Marathon together, or celebrating milestones across our offices in Europe.
* Annual company trip: Every summer, all employees from our different offices come together in Finland for an exciting company trip — a mix of team building, knowledge exchange, and celebrations.
* Global Community & Diversity: Diversity is part of our DNA. With colleagues from over 50 nationalities, you’ll join an international community where every culture, perspective, and background fuels innovation and success.


**Recruitment Process**
* Screening video call with our Recruitment Team
* First interview with the Hiring Manager
* Second interview with a team member
* Reference check and/or short personal assessment


 Please submit your
 **CV in English**
**About Management Events**
 Aurora Live by Management Events is the
 **leading B2B partner** 
 for technology and management service providers — connecting them directly with top decision-makers from the largest and most influential companies.
   

  

 Through our
 **exclusive matchmaking platform** 
 , we help commercial teams
 **shorten sales cycles, accelerate business conversations, and build lasting customer relationships** 
 .
   

  

 Trusted by
 **over 10,000 senior IT decision-makers** 
 and
 **900 solution providers** 
 across 11 countries, we create
 **strategic meetings that deliver** 
 real business results.
   

  

 We’re proud to be the trusted partner of some of the most
 **innovative companies in the technology and management space** 
 .
   

  

 At
 **Aurora Live** 
 , we’re transforming the way leaders connect, collaborate, and grow.
   

  

 Working with us means being part of an
 **international, fast-paced, and purpose-driven company** 
 , where ambition meets action and every idea can make an impact.
   

  

 Our teams bring together smart, curious, and driven individuals who love what they do — connecting visionary leaders, shaping industries, and celebrating success along the way.
   

  

**Ready to be part of something extraordinary?** 
 Join us and help shape the future of business connections.

title: IAM Specialist
description:
Egmont IT is looking for an IAM Specialist to join our Digital Trust team, in Copenhagen, Stockholm, Oslo or Malmö.
 



  





**About the role** 




 Egmont IT is looking for an IAM Specialist to join our Digital Trust team, the team responsible for Identity, Access Management, and foundational security services across Egmont IT. In this role, you’ll strengthen a small, close‑knit team by taking on a highly hands‑on IAM role, working day‑to‑day with cloud identity platforms, access controls, and providing input to future designs.
 



 This role is ideal for someone who enjoys doing the work, not just designing things — you will be configuring, operating, improving, and scaling identity solutions in close collaboration with both security and other platform teams.
 



  





 Egmont is a foundation, meaning all profits are reinvested into developing our media companies and donated to support vulnerable children and young people. Learn more about working at Egmont: https://www.egmont.com/about-working-egmont
 



  





  





**What you’ll do** 




 - Implement, and operate cloud identity and access management solutions, primarily within Microsoft Entra ID
 



 - Help us evolve our IAM foundations such as authentication methods, MFA, Conditional Access, PIM/PAM, role design, and lifecycle processes
 



 - Work hands‑on with federations, SAML, OAuth/OIDC, and any other Single Sign‑On (SSO) integrations
 



 - Support and improve our multi‑tenant identity setups, including cross‑tenant access, governance, and security boundaries
 



 - Contribute to internal IAM standards, patterns, and guardrails, enabling other teams to build securely by default
 



 - Take part in operational IAM work such as troubleshooting, access reviews, and continuous improvements
 



 - Contribute to internal policy frameworks and security guidelines to ensure security by design for other departments within Egmont IT.
 



  





  





**What you’ll bring** 




 - Fluency in English and at least one of the Scandinavian languages.
 



 - Strong, proven experience working hands‑on with IAM in cloud environments
 



 - A practical mindset — you enjoy configuring systems, solving real access problems, and improving how things actually work
 



 - The ability to collaborate closely with others while keeping a clear focus on scalable, long‑term identity design
 



 - While the role is primarily Cloud focused, practical knowledge of Active Directory would be valuable
 



**Ideal profile** 




 You don’t need to tick every box, but the strongest candidates are expected to have experience with most of the following:
 



 - Proven experience with cloud identity solutions, such as:
 



 - Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)
 



 - Privileged Identity Management (PIM)
 



 - Privileged Access Management (PAM)
 



 - MFA and authentication methods
 



 - Federations, SAML, OAuth/OIDC, and SSO
 



 - Familiarity with multi‑tenant architectures and their security implications
 



 - A collaborative mindset with a strong focus on pragmatic, scalable change rather than one‑off solutions
 



 - Comfort working across both operational IAM tasks and design‑level discussions
 



 - Experience with Active Directory
 



 - Understanding email security, and topics like DNS, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC
 



  





  





**Logistics & How to Apply** 




 The preferred location for this position is:
 



  





 - Vognmagergade 11, 1148 Copenhagen K
 



  





 However, the role may also be based at one of our main Scandinavian offices:
 



 - Karlavägen 96, 115 26, Stockholm
 



 - Nydalsveien 12, 0484 Oslo
 



 - Studentgatan 4, 205 07 Malmø
 



  





 Application Deadline: April 12th, 2026
 



  





 Interviews: Will be scheduled on an ongoing basis.
 



  





 Other: Must be able to communicate in one of the Scandinavian languages and must be allowed to work in Scandinavia.
 



  





 If you have questions, please contact: Magnus Pettersson (Manager Digital Trust) at magnus.pettersson@egmont.com.
 



  





**Sista ansökningsdag är 12/04/2026, men vi intervjuar löpande. Vänligen använd ”Apply Now” knappen för att ansöka till tjänsten. Vi tar ej emot ansökningar vi e-mail.** 




  





 About Story House Egmont
 



 Story House Egmont är ett av Nordens ledande och mest traditionsrika medieföretag. Vi är passionerade historieberättare och står bakom några av landets populäraste varumärken. Inom våra tre huvudområden – Media, E-commerce och Agencies – utvecklar vi engagerande innehåll, högkvalitativa produkter, innovativa tjänster och personliga mötesplatser. Vår ägare är den nordiska mediekoncernen Egmont tillsammans med Nordisk Film, TV 2 i Norge och det danska bokförlaget Lindhardt og Ringhof. Egmont är en stiftelse som varje år delar ut en stor del av sitt överskott för att stötta utsatta barn och ungdomar.
 



 We bring stories to life.

title: Inside Sales Associate
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 Are you interested in building a career in sales? Do you love talking to new people and see yourself as a true hunter? Do you enjoy working in a fast-paced and competitive environment? Then we’d like to chat!
   

  

 Wolt is a technology company best known for our food delivery platform. To customers on our platform, we now also offer a wide range of other options from groceries to pet food. Today, we serve customers, create new revenue streams for merchants and offer earning for courier partners opportunity across 23 countries and more than 350 cities. In 2022, we joined forces with DoorDash to supercharge our mission to make cities a better place to live in - and we’re only getting started!
   

  

 We are growing our business in Sweden and are looking for a
 **Sales Associate** 
 .
   

  

 This role focuses on retaining existing partners, driving revenue through promotions and advertising, and improving partner performance at scale
   

  

 You will work primarily via phone, email, and digital tools, using data and structured outreach to identify upsell opportunities, reduce churn, and ensure partners get the most value out of Wolt.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
 Day-to-day you will own and manage a large portfolio of
 **mass-managed restaurant and retail partners** 
 on Wolt in Sweden. Additionally, you might help our Account Management teams with their book of business. Previous experience in marketing and sales is preferred, but most important is your motivation and interest to learn sales!
   

  

**Day-to-day in this role you’ll:**
* Manage a large portfolio of mass-managed restaurant and retail partners
* Proactively prevent churn by identifying risk signals and engaging partners early
* Negotiate commercial terms and conditions, and collect documentation
* Sell and upsell promotions, campaigns, and advertising products to drive partner growth
* Run outbound sales and retention campaigns via phone, email, and in-product tools
* Educate partners on best practices to improve visibility, conversion, and sales on Wolt
* Use data to segment partners, prioritize outreach, and tailor recommendations
* Meet or exceed monthly revenue, retention, and activity targets
* Collaborate with Account Management, Sales, Marketing, Partner Support, and Ops to improve partner experience at scale
* Gather partner feedback and surface insights to internal teams


**Our humble expectations**
* 1–3+ years of experience in inside sales, account management, or customer success
* You are motivated by talking to new people every day, and consider yourself as a “Hunter”
* You love to compete and thrive in a result-driven environment where we celebrate success
* You have a can-do attitude and are ready to roll up the sleeves and get to work in a fast-paced startup environment
* You are a strong communicator and have fundamental commercial understanding
* You are fluent in Swedish and English in speaking and writing


**What We Offer**
 At Wolt, we believe great people thrive when given ownership, trust, and the chance to make an impact. As a Sales Associate, you’ll get just that – along with a competitive salary and the opportunity to grow in a fast-moving global tech company with plenty of career paths.
   

  

**Next steps**
 If you are excited about working in a high-growth environment, taking ownership, and being part of an extremely ambitious team, then click below to apply and get the conversation going!
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Manufacturing Technician
description:
Varex Imaging is a global technology leader in X-ray imaging, developing advanced solutions used in medical diagnostics, industrial inspection, and security systems. With a strong international presence and high-tech product portfolio, we’re pushing the boundaries of what's possible in imaging.
 



  





 We are looking for a new team member at our Danderyd location to join our talented and highly motivated Manufacturing Transfer team. This is a great opportunity to broaden your knowledge and skills in X-ray detectors.
 



  





 As a
 **Manufacturing Technician,** 
 your main responsibilities will include prototype manufacturing, assembly and testing. You will be an integral part of our team, taking on challenging and varied tasks. Furthermore, you will be involved in the initial phases of prototype manufacturing and will have the opportunity to develop and optimize manufacturing processes to meet production requirements.
 



  





 To succeed in this role, you should have a good understanding of micro-mechanics and electronics, as well as the capability to perform precise assembly of complex detectors with extremely challenging mechanical tolerance requirements. Basic soldering skills are also essential. We offer opportunities to further develop your knowledge and skills through both internal and external training. We operate both Finnish and English, so it is essential to be able to work in both languages.
 



  





 Varex Careers
 



  





**What we're looking for:** 



* Basic knowledge of mechanics and electronics
* Hands-on experience with precise assembly work in electronics or a comparable industry (e.g., watch or jewelry making)
* Basic soldering skills
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team (don’t be afraid to ask questions!)
* Problem solving and decision-making skills
* An agile approach – the team is part of our R&D department
* Good basic computer usage skills (MS Office).
* Proficiency in both Finnish and English



  





**What you'll be doing:** 



* Processing product, parts and assemblies using hand tools, customized tooling, and/or semi-automated equipment.
* Manufacturing and assembly of prototype detectors
* Testing and repair of field-returned detectors
* Problem-solving, testing, and hardware repair
* role requires on-site working



  





**What we offer:** 



* A unique opportunity to grow as an expert in the X-ray imaging field with a team in which every person makes a difference.
* Individual training
* Competitive salary
* Local benefits and perks (for example sport/culture vouchers, bonus plan and mobile phone benefit)



  





**Next Steps** 




 If you're interested and your background aligns with this role, our Talent Acquisition team will reach out to you. Following confirmation of a match, you'll have an exciting opportunity to meet with the hiring manager. This meeting will provide valuable insights into our company and allow you to ask any questions you may have. Ready to shape the future of X-ray imaging and make an impact in industry?
 



  





 Please submit your application through our recruitment portal on Workday ( Varex Careers ) as soon as possible. We are actively interviewing candidates and will move forward quickly with the best fit for the team.
 



  





 Please note that you must press save before submitting your CV.
 



  





 Read more about us: https://www.vareximaging.com/photon-counting/
 



  





 Varex Imaging, headquartered in Salt Lake City, USA, is a leading innovator, developer, and manufacturer of X-ray imaging component solutions, which includes X-ray tubes, digital flat panel detectors, software, and other key components of X-ray imaging systems. With a 70+ year history of successful innovation, you will find our components in numerous medical, industrial, and security imaging applications worldwide.
 



  





 Across the world, our more than 2,200 employees are committed to support our mission making the invisible visible.
 



  





 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, sex, color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, or on the basis of disability.

title: Financial Controller - Stockholm
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 At Tandem Health, we are building a future where health and technology move seamlessly together — and we are growing fast. As we prepare for significant growth, we are now looking for a
 **Financial Controller** 
 to own and scale our accounting processes.
   

  

 You thrive in a hands-on role where you get to improve processes and make them smarter, more efficient and more reliable so that you can keep a broader focus and not being stuck in fundamentals. You use modern tools and invent smart automations and ways of working. You also work well with many different people from various countries as you will be our main contact for the external accounting firms.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who will be the backbone of financial accuracy and enjoy creating the necessary processes to reach there. If you are excited to hands-on take our accounting through a scaling journey - we’d love to meet you!
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead month-end and year-end closing in the Swedish entity and manage monthly group reporting from external accounting firms in other countries.
* Prepare consolidated group financial statements on a monthly basis
* Manage inter-company transactions and eliminations
* Oversee transfer pricing structures and monthly invoicing
* Manage revenue recognition together with the Finance Associate focusing on billing
* Oversee AP and AR processes across entities
* Be up to date with changing accounting regulations that affect the group
* Manage relationships with external accounting firms, auditors and tax advisors
* Financial statements and Annual report for the group and the Swedish parent company, but oversee statutory filings also in other jurisdictions
* Partner with the Head of Finance around reporting, forecasting and process improvements
* Make sure financial compliance and internal controls are built into the ways of working
* Automate and simplify the accounting function as the company scale in volume and complexity


**What You Bring**
* A good mix of calm and excitement that makes you comfortable in a Finance team in a fast-changing start-up/scale-up environment
* Experience from multi-entity or group environment
* You have strong accounting knowledge and is also comfortable with consolidation and inter-company accounting
* You are comfortable in various ERPs and eager to explore next generation accounting tools, somewhat tech-savvy.
* Demonstrable experience in accounting, preferably in a Finance team
* You will need to understand and read Swedish, preferably also speak it, as you will be in contact with Swedish accountants, auditors, authorities etc.


**Bonus**
* Experience from SaaS companies and/or start/scale up
* Experience from international multi-entity set ups
* Prior experience from audit prep


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of
 **Stockholm** 
 where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Implementation Manager
description:
**About The Role**
 Instabee is seeking a commercially-minded, tech-savvy, and hands-on Implementation Manager to join our international team. This role focuses on leading technical integrations and enhancements that directly impact our commercial offering and strengthen our relationships with merchants and consumers across multiple markets.
   

  

 You will play a key role in owning and continuously improving our international merchant offerings via API integrations, ensuring a smooth and fast go-to-market experience. By collaborating cross-functionally with commercial, product, tech, and operations teams, you'll drive onboarding projects that make it simple and efficient for merchants to launch Instabee's services for their customers.
   

  

 In the highly competitive delivery space, speed and quality matter. As an Implementation Manager, you will lead initiatives to help international merchants go live faster while ensuring that Instabee's solutions deliver maximum value from day one.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Own the full onboarding and integration lifecycle for new international merchants, ensuring an excellent launch experience.
* Drive strategic partnerships with commercial teams to accelerate go-to-market timelines, ensuring merchants can quickly leverage Instabee's solutions.
* Manage cross-functional collaboration with tech, product, and operations to simplify complex integrations and solve challenges in real time.
* Analyze integration and performance data to identify improvement areas and proactively strengthen our international processes.
* Provide strategic input to commercial negotiations with technical and product insights that increase merchant confidence and commitment.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with international merchants that go beyond launch, acting as a trusted long-term partner.


**About You**
 You thrive in fast-moving, international environments and enjoy working where commercial strategy meets technical delivery. You're structured, proactive, and detail-oriented – but also curious and creative enough to challenge the status quo when needed. Most importantly, you know how to turn complex integrations into smooth, fast, and successful launches.
   

  

**More About You**
* University degree in business, engineering, or a related field.
* 4–6 years of experience in e-commerce or logistics, with a proven track record in implementation, technical account management, or commercial excellence.
* Strong understanding of API integrations (hands-on experience with Postman or similar tools required).
* Demonstrated experience working with international merchants or cross-border commercial setups.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills in English; additional European languages are a strong advantage.
* Commercial mindset with a proven track record of shortening time-to-market and improving onboarding processes.
* Experience managing projects and stakeholders in a technical or commercial context.
* Based in Stockholm, with flexibility to travel internationally when required (office-first position).


**What You'll Get**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!
   

  

**Benefits**
 Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

 🌇
 **Sky-High Office:** 
 Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
   

  

 🐶
 **Puppy Friendly:** 
 Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
   

  

 🏓
 **Fun & Games:** 
 Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
   

  

 👶
 **Parental Pay for Six Months:** 
 Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
   

  

 🎂
 **A Day Off on Your Birthday:** 
 We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
   

  

 ⏰
 **Flexible Hours:** 
 Hybrid setup with working hours that adapt to your lifestyle.
   

  

 🥐
 **Tech Breakfast Wednesdays:** 
 Midweek fuel and inspiration.
   

  

 👾
 **Tech Demos:** 
 Stay close to the innovations shaping our future.
   

  

 💻
 **Modern Tech Stack:** 
 Work with cutting-edge tools every day.
   

  

 Diversity and inclusion is very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone's perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
   

  

 This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.

title: Senior Test Engineer to Euroclear Sweden
description:
**Forma framtidens finanssystem som Test Engineer på Euroclear Sverige** 




  





 Är du redo att ta helhetsansvar för kvalitet i komplexa IT-leveranser? Som Test Engineer hos oss leder du testarbetet, utvecklar smarta teststrategier och stärker leveranskvaliteten i nära samarbete med utvecklingsteam, arkitekter och verksamheten, i en global och innovativ miljö där ditt arbete verkligen gör skillnad.
 



  





**Arbetsbeskrivning** 




 Som Test Engineer på Euroclear blir du en nyckelperson i att säkerställa stabila, säkra och högkvalitativa leveranser i en komplex och samhällsviktig IT-miljö. Du arbetar nära kravanalytiker, IT-arkitekter, projektledare, verksamheten och externa leverantörer. Tillsammans beslutar ni vilka tester som ska genomföras, när de ska ske och hur kvaliteten bäst säkerställs genom hela utvecklingsprocessen. Du är delaktig i flera initiativ parallellt och bidrar aktivt till att det som levereras håller högsta kvalitet, både ur ett tekniskt och verksamhetsmässigt perspektiv.
 



 Rollen är bred och varierad. Du rör dig obehindrat mellan helhet och detalj, mellan verksamhet och IT, och har ett tydligt testperspektiv i allt du gör. Du granskar och analyserar krav, planerar och leder testarbetet samt säkerställer att mål, tidplaner och kvalitetskrav uppfylls.
 



  





 Ditt ansvar omfattar att:
 


* Ta fram och underhålla testplaner
* Specificera och designa testfall
* Exekvera tester själv samt stötta andra i deras testarbete
* Leda och koordinera testarbetet
* Prioritera och kommunicera testaktiviteter och beroenden
* Säkerställa kvalitet i samband med releasehantering
* Dokumentera testresultat och avvikelser
* Analysera, utvärdera och rapportera testutfall
* Kommunicera status, risker och rekommenderade åtgärder, både operativt och strategiskt
* Identifiera och driva förbättringar inom kvalitet- och testarbete



  





 En viktig del av rollen är också att kontinuerligt utveckla och effektivisera testprocesser, strategier och verktyg. Du bidrar aktivt till att öka graden av testautomatisering och hittar nya, smartare arbetssätt för att stärka kvaliteten i leveranserna.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som har en relevant akademisk utbildning, exempelvis inom datavetenskap, systemvetenskap eller liknande, samt flerårig erfarenhet av systemtest och minst 5 års erfarenhet i rollen som testledare. Du är trygg i din kompetens och är van att ta ett helhetsansvar för kvalitet i komplexa IT-leveranser.
 



  





 Som testledare har du:
 


* Djup kunskap om testprocessens alla delar samt olika testmetoder och teststrategier
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med testdata, testmiljöer, testtekniker och testautomatisering
* Förmåga att planera, leda och genomföra tester i komplexa integrationslösningar
* Erfarenhet av att utvärdera, vidareutveckla och underhålla testprocesser och tillhörande styrdokumentation
* God förståelse för system med höga krav på säkerhet, stabilitet och prestanda
* Vana att kommunicera med beställare och andra intressenter kring kvalitet, risk och teststatus
* Erfarenhet av defekthantering
* Arbetat med acceptanstest, systemtest, integrationstestning, migreringstest
* Goda kunskaper i verktyg som Azure DevOps, sharepoint
* Erfarenhet från större komplexa projekt, releasehantering eller transformationsinitiativ
* Vana att kravställa och följa upp externa leverantörer



  





 Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på engelska i både tal och skrift. Har du dessutom erfarenhet från bank- och finanssektorn är det meriterande, liksom en ISTQB-certifiering.
 



  





**Personliga egenskaper** 




 Vi söker dig som är strukturerad, tydlig och noggrann, med en stark drivkraft att skapa kvalitet i varje leverans. Du är lösningsorienterad och trivs med att samarbeta för att hitta de bästa vägarna framåt. Genom din kommunikativa förmåga skapar du förtroende och är van att diskutera och förankra lösningar med både tekniska och verksamhetsnära intressenter. Du är självgående och tar ett naturligt ägarskap för ditt arbete. Med energi och engagemang driver du testarbetet framåt och säkerställer att uppsatta mål nås, både genom eget arbete och genom att strukturera, koordinera och motivera andra i teamet. Du har förmågan att arbeta brett, i nära samverkan med såväl verksamheten som IT, och rör dig obehindrat mellan strategisk helhetssyn och detaljfokus. Samtidigt är du pragmatisk och flexibel, med en stark vilja att leverera enligt överenskommelse och skapa resultat som gör skillnad.
 



  





**Euroclear erbjuder** 




 På Euroclear Sverige blir du en del av en kultur som präglas av innovation och kontinuerlig utveckling. Som en del av en global organisation får du goda möjligheter att utvecklas och samarbeta med kollegor från hela världen, samtidigt som du får värdefulla insikter i de globala finansmarknaderna. Euroclear Sverige strävar efter att vara en lärande organisation med mycket goda möjligheter till professionell utveckling. Här får du chansen att växa i din roll och vidareutvecklas inom ditt område. Genom att arbeta på Euroclear Sverige bidrar du dessutom till att stärka och digitalisera den svenska finansmarknaden, något som har en positiv påverkan på samhället. Vår ambition är att bli hjärtat i den nordiska finansmarknaden. Läs mer om Euroclear – www.euroclear.com
 



  





**Övrigt** 




 I denna rekrytering samarbetar Euroclear med Inhouse IT & Tech. Placering är på Euroclears kontor i centrala Stockholm. Vi tar inte emot några ansökningar via mejl, utan du söker enkelt tjänsten via hemsidan; www.inhouse.se. Du behöver inte skicka med något personligt brev då vi är övertygade om att ditt CV räcker gott och väl.
 



  





 Ansök redan idag då urval sker löpande! Därefter kontaktar vi dig för nästa steg. Har du några funderingar så är du välkommen att kontakta rekryteringskonsult Louise Hagen Furugård, louise.furugard@inhouse.se, 0733118726

title: Fullstack Engineer - Billing Platform
description:
**Introducing evroc**
 At evroc, we are building a secure, sovereign, and sustainable hyperscale cloud to reimagine the digital future of Europe. By joining our company, you have an exciting opportunity to contribute to the development of next-generation cloud services. We are seeking intellectually curious and highly motivated team members who are ready to embrace the thrilling challenge of building the first European owned hyperscale cloud.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Job type:** 
 Permanent position
   

  

**Join the Pioneers**
 We’re looking for a Software Engineer to build evroc’s next-generation Billing Platform, a system that processes millions of events and powers usage-based pricing, invoicing, and revenue flows across our cloud.
   

  

 In this role, you will work across the full stack, connecting event-driven backend systems with intuitive, data-heavy user interfaces. You’ll build the tools that people rely on to understand and manage complex billing scenarios with accuracy and confidence.
   

  

 This is a high-impact role where you’ll own features end-to-end and help define how billing is experienced across evroc’s platform.
   

  

**What You’ll Tackle**
* Design and build fullstack features across the billing lifecycle, from backend services to user-facing interfaces.
* Develop billing consoles and dashboards, including usage visualisation, invoice management, and subscription workflows.
* Build tools for managing pricing models, SKUs, and discount structures used by product and commercial teams.
* Design APIs that abstract complex billing logic into clear and reliable contracts for frontend consumption.
* Implement data-heavy interfaces such as cost projections, usage trends, and reconciliation views.
* Establish frontend patterns and components for scalable, high-performance administrative interfaces.
* Work closely with product and design to translate complex billing concepts into intuitive user workflows.
* Integrate billing systems with external services such as payment providers, accounting systems, and CRMs.


**Skills We Value**
* 5+ years of experience in fullstack engineering, ideally building data-intensive web applications.
* Backend experience in Golang or Python, building APIs and handling authentication, versioning, and middleware.
* Strong proficiency in React and TypeScript
* Solid understanding of databases (SQL/NoSQL), including schema design, indexing, and performance considerations.
* Experience working with complex system integrations and external services.
* Familiarity with SaaS billing concepts such as invoicing, usage-based pricing, and subscription management.
* Ability to translate complex data and systems into clear, reliable user experiences.


**Why Join evroc?**
 We offer a competitive salary and an equity package to attract the best. Whether it’s the cosmopolitan allure of London, the vibrant Stockholm, or the Mediterranean charm of Sophia Antipolis, you’re poised for an inspiring work environment and a captivating local culture!
   

  

 At evroc, diversity is our strength. We champion an inclusive environment where every background - ethnicity, age, gender identity, beliefs, and culture - is celebrated.
   

  

 Applicants must possess a valid work permit.

title: Test Engineer Cooling Systems - Bus
description:
Scania is undergoing a transformation from being a leading supplier of trucks, buses, and engines to providing complete and sustainable transport solutions. Together with TRATON and our sister brands MAN, Volkswagen Truck & Bus, and International, we are working to shape the future of mobility with innovative and environmentally conscious solutions.
   

  

 Our values – customer first, respect, team spirit, responsibility, and elimination of waste – are at the heart of everything we do. Together, we are at the forefront of creating a sustainable future.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 The cooling systems in conventional ICE and electrified buses are designed to keep the powertrain, power electronics and batteries at optimal working temperatures. At the same time, they must meet requirements on energy consumption, drivability and acoustics, while balancing product cost and weight. It is a complex system where the performance ultimately determines where and how our vehicles can operate.
   

  

 As a Test Engineer for cooling performance, you are responsible – together with cooling system design engineers – for planning, preparing and carrying out performance tests on our test buses– including defining test methods, setting up instrumentation, building the right test configurations and continuously adapting the setup during testing. You analyze the results and translate them into clear recommendations for how to optimize system performance and influence design decisions.
   

  

 It is a role where you must combine technical expertise with the ability to drive cross-functional collaboration. You will not solve the challenges alone – success depends on working closely with colleagues in software, hardware, workshops and other system and property owners
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Translate cooling system design needs into structured and feasible test plans, including method selection and scope definition
* Prepare and set up test activities, including instrumentation, test configurations and ensuring readiness of all required systems
* Execute tests in climate chambers and on test tracks, securing stable conditions and reliable data by controlling influencing factors
* Analyze test data to build system understanding and identify performance gaps or improvement opportunities
