 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder, sektionschef Linn Duvhammar 08-405 19 66. Fackliga kontaktpersoner är Johan Strokirk för Saco och Jan Wahlström för ST. Du når dem via Regeringskansliets växel, 08-405 10 00. Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Välkommen att registrera din ansökan i vårt rekryteringsverktyg
 **senast den 15 april 2026**
 Regeringskansliets uppdrag är att stödja regeringen i dess arbete med att styra Sverige och förverkliga sin politik. Här arbetar 4 800 personer, varav 600 utomlands. Regeringskansliet välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter. Vi ser jämställdhet och mångfald som en styrka och tillgång och vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering. Förvaltningsavdelningen ansvarar för myndighetsövergripande frågor som förändrings- och förnyelsearbete, ekonomi, arbetsgivarfrågor, kompetensförsörjning, kommunikation, säkerhet, it, bibliotek, arkiv och registratur samt för den gemensamma servicen i Regeringskansliet.

title: Growth Manager
description:
**Why Grasp** 




 The $1.4 trillion financial advisory industry relies heavily on costly and scarce cognitive labor. It’s so inefficient that firms charge millions for junior teams, whose work is 90% manual and repetitive. AI will fundamentally change this by automating large parts of this work and delivering a massive productivity uplift.
 



 Grasp is an agentic AI platform for finance, purpose-built to solve complex company and market research workflows. We work with 250 of the world’s largest financial institutions, including PwC, KPMG, Deloitte, and EY, and are growing 4x year-over-year. We’re backed by leading investors such as Octopus Ventures and Yanno Capital.
 



  





**Role** 




 As our first growth hire, you will drive top-of-funnel growth and position Grasp as the leading AI platform for investors and advisors through content, industry reports, and other demand-generation initiatives.
 



 Leverage AI to scale the function, and own experimentation, distribution, funnel optimisation, and analytics to continuously improve performance. Work closely with founders and the commercial team to turn insights into pipeline.
 



 This is an in-office role based in Stockholm, with relocation support. You’ll have unlimited access to tools like Claude, Codex, and Cursor, and are expected to use them extensively to automate and scale growth.
 



  





**Skills** 




 Analytical self-starter with a strong work ethic, able to operate independently and own execution end-to-end.
 



 3–6 years of growth or marketing experience at a fast-growing B2B SaaS company, with hands-on experience in paid acquisition and channel strategy.
 



 High curiosity and enthusiasm for leveraging AI to scale work and drive performance.
 



  





**What we offer** 




 Unique opportunity to join a fast-growing and AI company, with significant responsibility from day one.
 



 Work alongside an exceptional team with opportunities for rapid professional and personal development.
 



 Competitive compensation package, including stock options.

title: Digital Learning Partner
description:
Var med och utveckla morgondagens lärlösningar !
   

  

**Om rollen som Digital Learning Partner**
 Som Digital Learning Partner är du nyckeln till att säkerställa att digitalt lärande fungerar smidigt i det dagliga arbetet över hela ICA Gruppen. Du stödjer utbildningsskapare, koordinerar tester, ger support och bidrar till utvecklingen av inspirerande och effektiva digitala lärmiljöer.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du att arbeta brett med digitalt lärande och vara en viktig del i utvecklingen av våra utbildningslösningar. Du ansvarar för att koordinera och genomföra tester av ny funktionalitet i våra lärplattformar och andra digitala verktyg, samtidigt som du erbjuder kvalificerad slutanvändarsupport i nära samarbete med Digi‑Tech och andra interna resurser.
   

  

 Du stöttar utbildningsskapare med både tekniska och pedagogiska frågor, hjälper till att formulera kompetensmål och säkerställer en tydlig och effektiv struktur på utbildningsinnehåll. I arbetet ingår även utbildningsadministration och att sätta upp kurser i våra lärplattformar.
   

  

 En viktig del av rollen är att genomföra användarundersökningar och anpassa lösningar efter målgruppens behov, samt att samarbeta med produktägare och utvecklare för att skapa funktionella och estetiskt tilltalande utbildningsmiljöer. Du bidrar också aktivt i forum och nätverk för digitalt lärande och driver utvecklingen framåt genom att följa och implementera nya trender och tekniker inom området.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har**
* Akademisk examen inom pedagogik, HR, organisationsutveckling, digital transformation, IT, systemvetenskap eller motsvarande.
* Minst tre års erfarenhet av UX-design eller nära samarbete med UX-designers.
* Teknisk erfarenhet av arbete med lärplattformar och digitala lärverktyg.
* Erfarenhet av att leda projekt och samarbeta tvärfunktionellt med interna och externa stakeholders.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med att omsätta affärsstrategi och kompetensbehov till pedagogiska och tekniska lärlösningar.
* Nyfikenhet på trender/digital utveckling som AI, mikrolärande, gamification och adaptivt lärande


 Som person är du kommunikativ och trygg i att leda dialoger och bygga goda relationer. Du är nyfiken, följer utvecklingen inom området och drivs av att ligga steget före. Samtidigt arbetar du strukturerat och målfokuserat, med förmåga att följa upp, prioritera och säkerställa hög kvalitet i det du levererar. Du har ett pedagogiskt förhållningssätt och ett användarcentrerat fokus, med förståelse för olika målgruppers behov.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en spännande och utvecklande roll i ett bolag som satsar på digitalt lärande och där du får möjlighet att påverka och forma framtidens kompetensstöd inom ICA Gruppen. Hos oss blir du en del av ett dynamiskt och engagerat team med goda möjligheter att växa och utvecklas.
   

  

**Plats:** 
 Solna
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-04-10, intervjuer och tillsättning sker löpande. Vid frågor, kontakta Ann Hennicks, ann.hennicks@ica.se
   

  

 ICA ska spegla våra kunder och samhället, vi strävar därför efter att anställa människor med olika bakgrund, kompetenser, kunskap och erfarenheter. Om rollen kräver det så behöver du genomgå tester, bakgrundskontroller och drogtestning innan anställning.

title: Field Service Engineer - LC LCMS
description:
**Job Description**
 At Agilent, our technologies enable discoveries that improve the quality of life. In laboratories around the world, our instruments are relied upon for accuracy, reliability and insight. Behind that reliability are Customer Support Engineers who operate as
 **trusted technical experts** 
 —solving complex problems and keeping critical scientific work moving forward.
   

  

 We are looking for a
 **highly skilled Customer Support Engineer** 
 with strong experience in LC, LC-MS and HPLC. This role is suited for someone who is already technically confident and motivated to further establish themselves as a
 **go-to expert** 
 within chromatography support.
   

  

**The Role**
 In this role, you will work directly in customer laboratories across Sweden, supporting Agilent’s chromatography portfolio in real-world, high-expectation environments. You will handle
 **technically demanding cases** 
 , make independent decisions in the field, and build long-term trust with customers who rely on your expertise.
   

  

 This is not a purely reactive service role. You will be expected to
 **anticipate issues, optimize performance, and raise the technical bar** 
 —both for customers and internally.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Deliver advanced on-site support including installation, implementation, optimization, maintenance and repair of GC, GC-MS systems in single- and multi-vendor environments.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex system, method, hardware and software issues, often under time pressure.
* Act as a technical authority for customers, advising on best practices, preventive maintenance and system configurations.
* Proactively identify potential risks and performance limitations before they impact customer operations.
* Execute integrated system solutions involving hardware, software, networking and peripherals according to defined architectures.
* Serve as an internal escalation point for challenging technical cases and collaborate closely with Support, Sales, Marketing and R&D.
* Maintain accurate documentation and ensure full compliance with Agilent quality and regulatory standards.
* Share expertise by delivering technical training, workshops or mentoring for colleagues and customers.
* Support key or high-volume customers, including calibration and qualification activities when required.


**Qualifications**
 We are looking for someone who combines
 **hands-on chromatography expertise** 
 with strong professional judgment.
   

  

**Required:**
* Degree in Chemistry, Biochemistry or a related scientific discipline.
* Solid practical experience with GC and GC-MS chromatography; experience with special valves is an advantage.
* Proven ability to work independently in laboratory environments and manage complex customer situations.
* Clear, confident communication skills—both verbal and written.
* Fluency in Swedish and English.
* Valid driving license and willingness to travel.


**Advantageous:**
* Experience with Agilent systems and software.
* Exposure to multi-vendor laboratory setups.
* Experience acting as a technical reference, trainer or mentor.
* Proximity to an international airport.


**Personal Attributes**
* Strong problem-solving mindset and attention to detail.
* High standards for quality, compliance and documentation.
* Comfortable taking ownership and responsibility in the field.
* Curious, motivated, and driven to continuously deepen technical expertise.


**Additional Details**
 This job has a full time weekly schedule. It includes the option to work remotely.
   

  

 Our pay ranges are determined by role, level, and location. Within the range, individual pay is determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training. During the hiring process, a recruiter can share more about the specific pay range for a preferred location. Pay and benefit information by country are available at: https://careers.agilent.com/locations
   

  

 Agilent Technologies Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, disability or any other protected categories under all applicable laws.
   

  

**Travel Required:**
 50% of the Time
   

  

**Shift:**
 Day
   

  

**Duration:**
 No End Date
   

  

**Job Function:**
 Services & Support

title: AML Expert
description:
AML Office is structured into two units: AML Operations and AML Strategy. Together, we are around 20 colleagues across Stockholm, Oslo, Trondheim, and Copenhagen, working collaboratively across the Nordic region.
   

  

 AML Operations, made up of analysts and investigators, focuses on day-to-day activities, while AML Strategy, where this role is placed, brings together specialists and experts driving risk management, framework development, governance, and strategic initiatives.
   

  

**Jessica Darnelius, your future manager**
 As a manager, I value clarity, structure, and creating a supportive team environment. I strongly believe in a purpose-driven organization and encourage curiosity, continuous improvement, and open dialogue, don’t hesitate to challenge how we do things.
   

  

 I try to create a culture where we say, “let’s try” more often than “no,” and where learning from mistakes is a natural part of how we grow. My biggest challenge is probably my patience, I tend to move quickly and focus more on the bigger picture than every small detail, so I really value having people around me who help make sure we have the full picture. But as I see it, if something is “good enough,” it’s usually worth trying, we can almost always adjust and improve along the way
   

  

 Your role at Entercard
   

  

 The AML Expert is a expert role within the AML Office, responsible for the management of AML/CTF and Financial Sanctions risks. The role operates with a high degree of independence and is expected to manage complex processes and initiatives, as well as provide subject matter expertise across the organization.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain policies, procedures, and guidelines
* Establish, maintain, and execute first-line control plans across AML and Sanctions, including follow-up procedures, and monitor and report on the effectiveness of controls.
* Conduct business risk assessments and ensure appropriate mitigation strategies and activities
* Conduct regular reviews and updates of AML/CFT and financial Sanction processes
* Design and deliver training initiatives to ensure and support stakeholder as well as team colleagues, awareness of policies, regulatory requirements, and emerging risks, with ongoing evaluation and enhancement of training effectiveness.


**Communication and Stakeholder Management**
 This role requires regular communication with both internal and external stakeholders. The AML Expert is expected to present, interpret, and clearly articulate complex regulatory requirements across all levels of the organization, including executive management. The position also involves influencing and negotiating in cross-functional contexts, as well as providing expert guidance to support informed decision-making and ensure alignment with regulatory expectations.
   

  

 Your strengths
   

  

**Qualifications And Experience**
* University degree (e.g., Law or equivalent)
* 5–10 years of relevant fulltime AML/CTF experience as AML-officer, manager or specialist


**Skills and capabilities that will support you to succeed in this role:**
* Strong understanding and proven experience of AML, CFT, and Financial Sanctions regulatory frameworks, including associated controls
* Demonstrated ability to translate theoretical knowledge into practical application, supported by strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Experience working in a structured and process-oriented manner
* Excellent communication skills in both English and Swedish


**About Entercard**
 Our culture is driven by our unwavering values:
 **We keep our promises, We always improve, We make a difference, We win together.** 
 These values are not just words on a wall—they shape our behavior, our interactions, and our decisions, guiding us through uncertainty and reflecting who we are as a company. They form the bedrock of our dynamic and inclusive culture.
   

  

 You'll be joining a team of passionate professionals with diverse skills and experiences, where hard work and fun go hand-in-hand. We believe in fostering an environment where everyone can thrive, collaborate, and contribute to something meaningful.
   

  

 If you're eager to be part of a team that truly lives its values, offers exciting challenges, and engaging tasks, then this role is for you.

title: Product Designer (Automotive)
description:
**We’ve signed up to an ambitious journey. Join us!**
*As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isn’t a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Let’s grow better, together.*
**The Role**
 In Arrive’s product offering, the automotive products are currently some of the most forward-looking, as well as representing the fastest-growing area of the business. The products in this space allow our end users to not only pay for parking easily – right from their car’s dashboard – but also get navigational guidance to help them find parking more easily. These products are also offered towards car manufacturers – through close partnerships, we deeply integrate well-liked features into their vehicles. As a designer supporting the cross-functional teams in this space, you will have an unparalleled opportunity to help shape the direction of these products.
   

  

 The main focus is on automotive platforms (chiefly Android Automotive and Google Automotive services, as well as occasionally Android Auto and Apple CarPlay), but at times you’re expected to work in other ecosystems, for instance with smartphone apps or web experiences.
   

  

 This is a fantastic opportunity to grow your skills within a world-class, 30-person strong, design organisation that covers design leadership, UX research, UX writing, localization and accessibility expertise. You will have a chance to make a tangible impact on a key part of Arrive’s product portfolio.
   

  

**How To Make An Impact**
* Take ownership of the end-to-end design process for all key features within the Automotive product offering, from initial concept to final implementation and further iteration.
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Engineers, and UX Researchers to define problems, explore solutions, and deliver the best possible user experience.
* Design and iterate on user interfaces – focused on automotive platforms, but at times also within web and app contexts – creating concepts, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups that meet both user needs and business goals.


**About You**
 We’re looking for a motivated and skilled product designer to join our team. You should have a passion for solving complex user problems and a proven ability to deliver high-quality design work in a fast-paced environment. You’re expected to effectively navigate the complex constraints of the automotive space (including safety considerations, regulations, hardware limitations, certifications, and more) without losing sight of the end user. We have high ambitions in this space, pushing the envelope of what’s expected and possible in the automotive space, including navigating the rising adoption of electric vehicles, software-defined vehicles, and even autonomous vehicles.
   

  

**Your background**
* 3+ years of experience in product design, working in a cross-functional team environment.
* Proficiency in working with design work across different ecosystems.
* Experience with automotive interfaces is a big plus. Together with knowledge of GAS (Google Automotive Services) templates versus custom OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) skins as well as experience with navigating the automotive context constraints and best practices.
* A strong portfolio demonstrating proficiency in UX and UI design, problem-solving, and the ability to ship impactful products while navigating business and technical constraints.
* Proven experience in defining user problems, leveraging research, and translating insights into well-executed design solutions, while balancing output velocity with precision and craft.
* Proficiency with modern design and prototyping tools (e.g. Figma) and best practices (e.g. compliance with WCAG).


 This role can be based in Stockholm, Sweden, or London, UK.
   

  

 Arrive, including brands like EasyPark, Flowbird, RingGo, ParkMobile and Parkopedia, is a leading global mobility platform. Present in over 90 countries and 20,000 cities, the company helps people and decision-makers make smarter decisions about urban mobility and ease the experience of travel worldwide. Arrive delivers a unique combination of the core ingredients to make cities more livable: from smart payments and optimized car parks to data-driven traffic reduction and support for reinvestment in public transport and green space. It’s about more than function, it’s about saving time and simplifying the experience of travel for everyone. Travel is more than a journey, it’s how you Arrive.

title: Product Director (Parental leave cover)
description:
*Are you an experienced product leader who enjoys combining people leadership, commercial thinking, and close collaboration across the business? Do you want to help shape solutions that protect people, property, and critical functions in society?*
**AddSecure** 
 is a leading European provider of secure IoT connectivity and end-to-end solutions. Within our Smart Alarms business, we provide secure solutions for monitored alarm transmission and reliable crisis communication, supporting organisations and emergency teams when it matters most.
   

  

 We are now looking for a
 **Product Director, Product Area Alarms** 
 to join us in a
 **full-time, fixed-term position covering a parental leave** 
 . In this role, you will lead an international product team and drive the business performance, strategy, and lifecycle management of a key portfolio within alarm transceivers, transmission services, and user experience.
   

  

**The role**
 This is a key leadership role where you will combine people leadership, portfolio ownership, and cross-functional collaboration in an international environment.
   

  

 You will lead a team of Product Managers and work closely with colleagues across Product Management, R&D, Sales, Marketing, and Operations. Together, you will ensure that our offerings meet customer needs, remain competitive in the market, and support strong business performance across AddSecure markets.
   

  

 The role requires strong leadership, analytical capability, and excellent communication skills. You need to be able to create alignment, explain priorities and trade-offs clearly, and build trust across teams and stakeholders.
   

  

 You will be part of the leadership team and report to the
 **Chief Product Officer of the Smart Alarms Business Unit** 
 .
   

  

**You will:**
* Lead, coach, and support a team of Product Managers
* Drive the strategy, priorities, and business performance of an assigned portfolio across markets
* Own the lifecycle management of offerings within alarm transceivers, transmission services, and user experience
* Define, anchor, and communicate portfolio strategy
* Identify market opportunities and translate customer needs into competitive products and services
* Work closely with R&D on requirement handling, prioritisation, and backlog management
* Define, maintain, and communicate product roadmaps
* Set price levels and support product positioning
* Work closely with Sales to understand market needs and support commercial success
* Provide Marketing with value propositions and content that strengthen the offering
* Help improve ways of working within the product area
* Ensure product data is in place to support an effective order-to-invoice flow
* Build strong relationships across markets, functions, partners, and customers


**Who You Are**
 You are an experienced and confident leader who combines strong people leadership with an analytical and commercial mindset. You enjoy turning market insight, customer needs, and business performance into clear priorities and concrete actions.
   

  

 You are comfortable navigating complexity, making tough prioritisation decisions, and balancing customer value, commercial potential, and technical feasibility. You are also a strong communicator who can create alignment, build trust, and engage stakeholders across the organisation.
   

  

 We believe you bring:
   

  

* At least 5 years of experience in product management
* At least 3 years of experience in line management
* Experience leading product portfolios in a technical environment
* Strong analytical skills and the ability to turn market insight, customer needs, and business performance into clear priorities
* A strong ability to translate market requirements into products and service offerings
* Experience working closely with software and hardware development teams
* A commercial mindset and a good understanding of business models and customer segmentation
* Experience with agile product management and development methodologies
* Good technical understanding of areas such as hardware, IT, IoT, and telecom
* The ability to lead through others, build trust quickly, and create alignment across teams and stakeholders
* Strong communication skills and the ability to work effectively across teams, countries, and functions
* Fluency in Swedish and English, spoken and written
* A Technical Master’s degree


**What We Offer**
 Our employees are our greatest asset and for us it is of great importance to build a culture where our employees thrive and want to perform. You will be part of a motivated team in an international company. In addition, we offer:
   

  

* Wellness allowance
* Occupational pension
* Enhanced parental pay
* Health checks
* Parking


 This is a full-time, fixed-term employment to cover a parental leave. We are looking for someone who wants to join AddSecure as an employee during this period and become an important part of the team and business.
   

  

**Start** 
 : preferably as soon as possible / according to agreement
   

  

**Duration** 
 : approximately 12 months
   

  

 We're all change makers!
   

  

 If you seek a company that encourages you to be yourself and to have fun at work, where your work contributes to a safer, smarter, and more sustainable world, then AddSecure might be your destination. Join our growing international team, where each day is an opportunity to make a real difference.
   

  

 Would you like to take part in our journey? Apply by attaching your CV and answering a couple of questions, we look forward to receiving your application.
   

  

 We work competence-based throughout the process, and this includes psychological tests, interviews, and reference taking.
   

  

 As applications are processed and interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis during the application period, we recommend that you submit your application as soon as possible. Background checks are carried out on all employees, and it is a requirement that you are eligible to work in Sweden.
   

  

 #addsecure #joinaddsecure #forasaferandsmarterworld #smartertogether #ioT #alarms #DirectorProductManagement #ProductLeadership #ProductStrategy #CriticalCommunication #JoinAddSecure
   

  

 AddSecure is a leading European provider of secure IoT connectivity and end-to-end solutions. We help customers optimise their operations, drive business value, and secure vital functions. By combining connected, data-driven, and sensor-based solutions with best-in-class expertise, we meet our customers’ needs regardless of industry. Our secure IoT solutions are used within the areas of buildings, alarms, transportation and logistics, personal safety and security, elderly care, construction, municipalities, schools, rescue services, power grids, and more.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
Vill du vara med och forma framtidens dataarbete på ett snabbväxande fintechbolag?
 



  





 På BROCC är data en central del av verksamheten och grunden för allt från riskhantering till strategisk tillväxt. Som Senior Data Engineer får du en nyckelroll i att bygga och vidareutveckla vår dataplattform från grunden och omvandla komplex data till tillförlitliga insikter som driver rapportering, regelefterlevnad och bättre affärsbeslut.
 



  





 Du blir en del av ett högpresterande och innovativt fintechbolag och arbetar i ett litet, seniort och T-format team. Rollen kombinerar hands-on tekniskt arbete med strategiskt inflytande och ger dig möjlighet att designa skalbara, framtidssäkra datalösningar samtidigt som du bidrar till att etablera en stark datakultur i hela organisationen.
 



  





**Din roll** 




 Som Senior Data Engineer på BROCC kommer du att:
 


* Arbeta med en modern teknikstack (Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, Fivetran, AWS, Kubernetes) i en bred och samarbetsinriktad roll, där du optimerar prestanda, skalbarhet och tillförlitlighet genom hela datavärdekedjan – från rådata till färdiga insikter.
* Designa, implementera och förvalta end-to-end-ELT-processer samt utveckla tydliga, väldokumenterade transformationer och affärskritiska datamodeller som fungerar som en
 *single source of truth* 
 .
* Samarbeta nära team inom finans, risk, verksamhet och produkt för att omsätta databehov till skalbara och praktiska lösningar samt möjliggöra self-service-analys genom strukturerade datamängder, dokumentation och gemensamma definitioner.
* Bidra till en stark datakultur genom gemensamma standarder och best practices samt säkerställa hög datakvalitet, spårbarhet och konsekvent användning av KPI:er och mätetal i hela organisationen.
* Ta ett helhetsansvar för arkitektur, standarder och arbetssätt i datateamet, samtidigt som du är operativ och hands-on i implementationen.
* Löpande identifiera och driva förbättringar som ökar automatisering, effektivitet och prestanda.



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* Flerårig erfarenhet inom data engineering, analytics engineering och/eller BI-utveckling.
* Djup teknisk kompetens kombinerad med god förståelse för samspelet mellan data, teknik och verksamhet.
* Mycket goda SQL-kunskaper samt flera års erfarenhet av dimensionell och relationell datamodellering.
* God förståelse för dataorkestrering, datainhämtning och transformation samt tillhörande verktyg.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av molnbaserade data warehouses, exempelvis Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Synapse eller Databricks.
* Ett självgående och lösningsorienterat arbetssätt, med struktur, nyfikenhet och en vilja att dela kunskap och bidra till helheten.
* Förmåga att förklara komplexa datakoncept på ett tydligt sätt för både tekniska och icke-tekniska målgrupper.
* Erfarenhet från reglerade branscher såsom fintech, bank eller finansiella tjänster är meriterande.



  





**Om BROCC** 




 BROCC grundades 2016 som ett Stockholmsbaserat fintechbolag specialiserat på peer-to-peer-utlåning. I dag är vi en etablerad paneuropeisk nischbank inom konsumentkrediter och skuldhantering, verksamma på över 15 marknader i Europa med kontor i Sverige, Finland och Storbritannien.
 



 Vår ambition är att bygga ett starkare europeiskt finansiellt ekosystem genom transparenta, datadrivna och rättvisa lösningar. Läs mer på www.brocc.se.
 



  





**Ansök idag** 




 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med placering i Stockholm. Rekryteringen sker i samarbete med Inhouse IT & Tech och urval sker löpande. Ansök direkt via www.inhouse.se.
 



 Vid frågor, kontakta rekryteringskonsult Louise Hagen Furugård på louise.furugard@inhouse.se eller 073-311 87 26.

title: Account Executive – Sweden
description:
**Do you thrive in B2B sales and love turning conversations into long-term partnerships?**
 Are you motivated by achieving results, eager to take ownership, and looking for an environment where your efforts are valued and your work truly makes an impact?
   

  

 Do you enjoy building meaningful client relationships and seeing the tangible results of your work?
   

  

 If that sounds like you, keep reading.
   

  

**Your Mission**
 As an
 **Account Executive for the Swedish market** 
 , you will play a key role in expanding Aurora Live’s presence.
   

  

 You’ll build your own client base from scratch, managing the full sales cycle — from prospecting to closing and beyond.
   

  

 Once you win new business, you’ll manage and nurture those accounts over time, ensuring clients continue to see value through our exclusive B2B matchmaking platform.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
* Identify, qualify, and engage potential clients to build and maintain a strong sales pipeline.
* Reach out proactively via phone, email, and LinkedIn to generate new business opportunities and start meaningful conversations.
* Understand each client’s challenges through in-depth needs assessments and propose solutions that truly address their goals.
* Earn trust and credibility by demonstrating expertise, consistency, and genuine customer focus.
* Take full ownership of the accounts you win — maintaining close relationships and ensuring ongoing satisfaction and success.
* Act as a strategic partner to your clients, helping them achieve results while strengthening long-term collaboration.
* Work closely with cross-functional teams to align objectives, share insights, and ensure the highest service standards.
* Stay ahead of industry trends by continuously expanding your market knowledge and understanding of client needs.


**What We’re Looking For**
* Proven track record in B2B sales, ideally within tech, SaaS, or professional services.
* A proactive, results-driven approach and ambition to grow in an international environment.
* Ability to build trust, credibility, and long-term client relationships.
* Excellent communication skills in Swedish and English.


**What We Offer**
* Performance rewarded: You’ll receive an attractive compensation package with base salary, commission, and an additional starter bonus to support you as you ramp up and build your sales pipeline.
* Growth and learning: From day one, you’ll benefit from a four-week onboarding program and continuous coaching through our international AL Academy, ensuring you’re always developing and moving forward in your career.
* Career opportunities across Europe: As we continue to grow, you’ll have the chance to explore international opportunities. With offices in Helsinki, Amsterdam, Antwerp, Copenhagen, Berlin, Stockholm, Kuala Lumpur, and Barcelona, your career can take you anywhere.
* Recharge & Thrive: We care about your well-being and want you to stay energized both inside and outside of work. That’s why you can earn up to 12 extra vacation days each year and enjoy local perks such as gym and massage discounts, along with other wellness benefits. Curious about the details in your location? Ask your recruiter to learn more.
* We win together: Collaboration is our driving force, and every success is shared. That’s why we love bringing people together through company trips, international events, and local office celebrations — whether it’s hitting the slopes in Levi, running the Berlin Marathon together, or celebrating milestones across our offices in Europe.
* Annual company trip: Every summer, all employees from our different offices come together in Finland for an exciting company trip - a mix of team building, knowledge exchange, and celebrations.
* Global Community & Diversity: Diversity is part of our DNA. With colleagues from over 50 nationalities, you’ll join an international community where every culture, perspective, and background fuels innovation and success.


**Recruitment Process**
* Screening video call with our Recruitment Team.
* First interview with the Hiring Manager.
* Second interview (including a short role-play) with the Team Manager.
* Reference check and/or short personal assessment


 Please submit your
 **CV in English** 
 .
   

  

 At
 **Aurora Live** 
 , we’re transforming the way leaders connect, collaborate, and grow.
   

  

 Working with us means being part of an
 **international, fast-paced, and purpose-driven company** 
 , where ambition meets action and every idea can make an impact.
   

  

 Our teams bring together smart, curious, and driven individuals who love what they do — connecting visionary leaders, shaping industries, and celebrating success along the way.
   

  

**Ready to be part of something extraordinary?** 
 Join us and help shape the future of business connections.

title: Part Time Supervisor, Tommy Hilfiger - NK Stockholm
description:
**Be part of an iconic story.**
 TOMMY HILFIGER is one of the world’s most recognized global lifestyle brands, confidently welcoming and inspiring consumers since 1985. Originally established in New York City and infused with the vibrant spirit of Americana, to create the modern uniform of accessible luxury. The TOMMY HILFIGER brands consist of TOMMY HILFIGER and TOMMY JEANS, complemented by a range of licensed product categories that extend the brand lifestyle across generations, geographies, activities and occasions. Tommy Hilfiger’s global marketing approach and communications strategy taps into culture through the world of F.A.M.E.S.: the people, organizations and ideas boldly driving the future of Fashion, Art, Music, Entertainment and Sport. Major global campaigns, sponsorship platforms, and disruptive activations with world-class athletes, musicians and entertainers bring a constant source of energy and inspiration to the brand. Immerse yourself in TOMMY HILFIGER here! (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok)
   

  

 Tommy Hilfiger is one of the world’s leading designer lifestyle brands, internationally recognized for celebrating the essence of “classic American cool” style.
   

  

 Founded in 1985, Tommy Hilfiger delivers premium styling, quality and value to consumers worldwide with a breadth of collections including Hilfiger Collection, Tommy Hilfiger Tailored, men’s, women’s and kids’ sportswear, Tommy Hilfiger Denim, accessories, and footwear.
   

  

 In addition, the brand is licensed for a range of products, including fragrances, eyewear, watches and home furnishings. Tommy Hilfiger, which was acquired by PVH Corp. in 2010, has more than 17,000 associates worldwide and an extensive distribution network in over 115 countries and 1,600 retail stores. Global retail sales of the Tommy Hilfiger brand were US $6.5 billion in 2015.
   

  

**About THE ROLE**
 Our stores are the life and soul of our business. They act as our main touch points with our ever evolving consumer base. As the world of retail evolves, we, as a business, believe that for all other parts of the chain to work, our stores must set the tone of what our two brands are all about. Irrespective of where our consumers eventually make a purchase, our stores, are always a window to our great brands. As a result our locations are paramount, the first class experience must be a given and our in-store standards should never be questionable.
   

  

 To deliver this, we strive to hire the individuals who live and breathe the values of our business; who are obsessed with delivering great service to our customers and who truly believe that to remain relevant in today’s world, we must be nimble and adapt to change and evolution.
   

  

 The Supervisor plays a key role in achieving these standards, they lead by example, embrace our entrepreneurial spirit and inspire their teams through their passion and belief in our brands.
   

  

**Responsibilities Include**
* Ensure the efficient running of the shop floor, in order to achieve the highest levels of customer service, sales and profit.
* Support the management team managing all personnel, product & merchandising functions, business processes and results for the store.
* Participate in weekly management meetings and other staff meetings.
* Clearly communicate to staff all marketing and sales promotions.
* Driving shop floor sales and exceeding store targets through motivating the team to achieve these goals, whilst offering our customers’ an exemplary store journey.
* Consistently foster a positive store experience by treating all customers and colleagues in a fair and consistent manner.
* Support the team in delivering the business strategy, and ensuring everyone has received consistent training on product knowledge and store maintenance.
* Achieve company standards/goals for personal sales results: sales v budgets, sales per hour and units per transaction.
* Perform manager-on-duty functions, manage store opening/closing functions and the sales floor.
* Focus staff on the importance of quality relationships with internal & external customers.
* Ensure staff accountability of building a repeat customer base by providing all customers with unparalleled spirited service.
* Ensure “door to floor” best practices with visual merchandising directives for sales floor and back room are being executed; continually review these to ensure they are consistent.
* Work with the management team to build a talent pool for key positions, including possible successors.


**About YOU**
* You'll have a previous track record of supervisory or specialist roles within a premium or luxury brand.
* You'll have previous people management experience with the ability to resolve conflict and unproductive disagreements.
* You'll be an effective communicator with the ability to build relationships with ease.
* You'll be a team player who recognises and celebrates the contributions and achievements of others.
* You'll be confident in giving feedback that promotes positive behavioral change.
* You will work well with change, being able to quickly adapt and work with pace.
* You will be energetic and authentic showing a clear presence on the shop floor.
* You'll approach all issues with a ‘can do’ approach and act with initiative to find in store solutions.


**About WHAT WE OFFER**
 At PVH, we understand that the success of our organisation is directly related to our hardworking and dedicated associates who contribute their time and talents to help make our Company the success it is. That is why we are committed to providing a competitive and comprehensive benefits program that offers the protection, peace of mind and flexibility designed to support our associates – both at home and at work.
   

  

 PVH Europe and our brands, TOMMY HILFIGER and CALVIN KLEIN, are committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse community of associates with a strong sense of belonging. We believe we are bettered by all forms of diversity, and take pride in working with top talent from every walk of life and corner of the world. In the spirit of inclusivity, qualified applicants will be considered without regard to age, ethnicity, ability, gender, gender expression, gender identity, nationality, race, religion or sexual orientation.
   

  

**About PVH**
 We are brand builders who focus our passion and creativity to build Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER into the most desirable lifestyle brands in the world and at the same time position PVH as one of the best-performing brand groups in our sector. Guided by our values and enabled by our scale and global reach, we are driving fashion forward for good, as one team with one vision and one plan. That’s the Power of Us, that’s the Power of PVH+.
   

  

 One of PVH’s greatest strengths is our people. Our collective desire is to create a workplace environment where every individual is valued, and every voice is heard, and we are committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse community of associates with a strong sense of belonging. Learn more about Inclusion & Diversity at PVH
 **here** 
 .
   

  

*PVH Corp. or its subsidiary ("PVH") is an equal opportunity employer and considers all applicants for employment on the basis of their individual capabilities and qualifications without regard to race, ethnicity, color, sex, gender identity or expression, age, religion, national origin, citizenship status, sexual orientation, genetic information, physical or mental disability, military status or any other characteristic protected under federal, state or local law. In addition to complying with all applicable laws, PVH is also committed to ensuring that all current and future PVH associates are compensated solely on job-related factors such as skill, ability, educational background, work quality, experience and potential.*

title: Enhetschef systemutveckling och förvaltning
description:
Är du en erfaren ledare inom it-området med mycket god samarbetsförmåga och förmåga att anpassa dig till nya förutsättningar? Vi söker dig som vill medverka till att utveckla vår it-förvaltning under ett vikariat på tio månader. Var med och bidra till skolans framtid!
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 Som enhetschef för enheten förvaltning och systemutveckling 1, ansvarar du för flera utvecklingsteam som förvaltar och nyutvecklar funktioner i myndighetens applikationer. Du ansvarar även för leveranser av support, utveckling och förvaltning av några it-stöd som externa it-leverantörer tillhandhåller.
   

  

 Du har en central roll i myndighetens effektiviserings- och moderniseringsarbete, där modern förvaltning såsom agila arbetssätt och flödesoptimering ingår. Enheten ansvarar för applikationsförvaltning och utveckling av system, där vi stödjer från kravanalys, design, utveckling och testning till driftsättning. Skolverkets applikationsutveckling sker agilt.
   

  

 Du ingår i några av styrgrupperna för myndighetens sju förvaltningsobjekt och säkerställer att den it-nära förvaltningen stöttar verksamheten på ett ändamålsenligt sätt. Du har budgetansvar för it-förvaltningen. Du har ansvar för enhetens resurs- och kompetensförsörjning på kort och lång sikt.
   

  

 \* \* \* \* \*
   

  

 ”Här får du vara med och driva it-förvaltning och utveckla dina medarbetare. Häng med på en spännande resa där din insats gör skillnad varje dag.”
   

  

 Eric Markström, tf It-chef
   

  

 \* \* \* \* \*
   

  

 It-avdelningen har fem enheter. I avdelningens ledningsgrupp bidrar du till en god ledning, styrning och samordning av avdelningens uppdrag. Avdelningen genomsyras av tvärfunktionellt arbetssätt där it-utveckling och förvaltning har ett agilt förhållningssätt med scrum som utvecklingsmetodik. Vi har höga ambitioner för vår it-verksamhet och står nu inför stora förflyttningar och satsningar framåt i digitaliseringen. Du arbetar i en dynamisk och framåtblickande organisation med stora möjligheter till personlig och professionell utveckling.
   

  

 Att vara ledare på Skolverket innebär att leda med helhetsperspektiv, i partnerskap och i relation till omvärlden. Du skapar förutsättningar för utveckling och engagemang samt sätter tydliga ramar och förväntningar på dina medarbetare. Du är en bärare av Skolverkets kultur, värderingar och fattade beslut.
   

  

 Du arbetar på vårt moderna och rymliga kontor i Solna Business Park. Du kan också ha möjlighet att arbeta upp till 50% på distans.
   

  

**Om dig**
 För att göra ett bra jobb och trivas hos oss behöver du stå för och leva upp till den statliga värdegrunden och till våra kärnvärden för medarbetarskap: förebild, tillit, ansvar, samarbete och utveckling. Läs mer på skolverket.se/jobb
   

  

**I det här jobbet ska du ha**
* högskoleutbildning inom data- och systemvetenskap alternativt annan utbildning i kombination med arbetslivserfarenhet som Skolverket bedömer som relevant,
* flerårig aktuell ledarerfarenhet inom it,
* aktuell erfarenhet av styrning, planering, budget och uppföljning,
* god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska.


**Det är meriterande** 
**om du** 
 har flerårig erfarenhet av arbete i statlig myndighet eller annan politiskt styrd organisation, erfarenhet av att ha arbetat med förvaltningsstyrningsmodell pm3, erfarenhet av att ha drivit transformationsarbete inom agil utveckling och erfarenhet av scrum. Det är även meriterande med erfarenhet från arbete på Skolverket.
   

  

**Som person behöver du**
* ha en mycket god samarbetsförmåga,
* vara flexibel och kunna anpassa dig till nya förutsättningar,
* ta egna initiativ, vara drivande i ditt arbete, våga vara proaktiv att leda utveckling och fokusera på resultat,
* ha ett gott omdöme och vara lugn och trygg i rollen som ledare.


**Viktigt att veta**
 Sista ansökningsdag är 6 april. Anställningen är ett vikariat som längst till mars 2027.
   

  

 När du registrerar din ansökan får du svara på några frågor i stället för att bifoga ett personligt brev. Läs gärna igenom ansökningsformuläret och förbered dina svar innan du gör ansökan.

title: Senior Operativ inköpare – Processutveckling
description:
Är du en erfaren operativ inköpare eller processutvecklare som vill kombinera operativt ansvar med ett uppdrag att förbättra processer och verktyg? Vill du leda förändring och bidra till omställningen till förnybar energi inom en engagerad och internationell organisation? Då kan rollen som Senior Operativ Inköpare hos Rexel vara något för dig!
   

  

**Vilka är vi?**
 Vi är Rexel och vi brinner för en hållbar framtid. Vårt sätt att bidra till det är genom elektrifiering. Varje dag, i mer än 20 länder runt om i världen, guidar vi kunder genom utmaningar i deras arbete för att göra installationer, infrastrukturer och fastigheter mer bekväma och säkra. Och inte minst, mer energi-, ekonomi och miljösmarta. Vi kopplar samman och distribuerar morgondagens hållbara elektriska värld redan idag.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Som Senior Operativ Inköpare kommer du att kombinera dagligt operativt ansvar för inköp till våra centrallager med ett övergripande fokus på processutveckling och förändringsarbete.
   

  

**Ditt Fokus Kommer Att Ligga På**
* Kartlägga och standardisera inköpsprocesser och driva implementation av förbättrade arbetssätt.
* Initiera och leda förbättringsinitiativ inklusive mindre implementationsprojekt och kravställning mot leverantörer.
* Implementera och följa upp policys, rutiner och instruktioner för processer och verktyg.
* Ansvara för utveckling och utbildning av inköpsstödjande verktyg i samarbete med IT och leverantörer.
* Driva förändringsarbete genom kommunikation, utbildning och stöd för användare vid process- och systemförändringar.
* Analysera data och etablera relevanta KPI:er samt ta fram rapporter för uppföljning och beslutstöd.


**Operativt Ansvar**
* Hantera lagernivåer och skapa inköpsorder med hjälp av inköpssystem och ERP för att säkerställa tillgänglighet och kapitalbindning på våra centrallager enligt givna mål
* Kommunicera med leverantörer angående order, bekräftelser, leveranser, prognoser och andra relaterade frågor.
* Administrera avvikelser, reklamationer, fakturor och kreditnotor.
* Analysera försäljnings- och lagerdata för att stödja inköpsbeslut


**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har eftergymnasial utbildning inom inköp eller andra relevanta områden inom Supply Chain med minst fem års erfarenhet från operativt inköp eller andra liknande roller och med dokumenterad erfarenhet av processutveckling. Erfarenhet av att arbeta i affärssystem är ett krav; kunskaper i IBS ERP och inköpssystemet AWR (E3) är meriterande.
   

  

 Du har god teknisk förståelse, är van vid metodik och processmodellering samt förbättringsmetoder som LEAN eller Six Sigma. Du har dokumenterad erfarenhet av att leda mindre till medelstora implementationer och driva införande och förändringsarbete. Analytiskt arbetar du bekvämt med KPI‑styrning och rapportering. Du behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift och kan arbeta obehindrat i Officepaketet.
   

  

 Vi söker en person med eget driv och engagemang, som har en stark vilja att utvecklas och växa inom inköpsområdet. Du upplevs som enkel att ha att göra med och har goda förutsättningar att passa in och bidra till Rexel Sveriges fortsatta utveckling. Du kommer ofta med idéer och nya angreppssätt i arbetsrelaterade frågor. Ditt nytänkande kan omsättas i praktiken och leda till resultat. Du är lugn, uppmärksam och tillmötesgående, med en vilja och förmåga att hjälpa kunden och leverera lösningar.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
 Du sitter på vårt kontor i Älvsjö och ingår i ett erfaret team av inköpare. Tjänsten är heltid med 6 månaders provanställning.
   

  

 Du arbetar endast på vardagar och vi har kollektivavtal. Utveckling är centralt för oss, och genom vår utbildningsplattform 'SkillUp' och andra utbildningssatsningar får du möjlighet till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling.
   

  

**Hör av dig!**
 Är du lika nyfiken på oss som vi är på dig? Sök tjänsten redan idag! Vi intervjuar löpande vilket innebär att tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum.
   

  

 Du kan läsa mer om Rexel på rexel.se.
   

  

**Rexel. Electrifying solutions that make a sustainable future possible.**
 Vi undanber oss kontakt med mediesäljare, rekryteringssajter och liknande i samband med rekryteringsarbetet.

title: HR Generalist – Sweden (Maternity Cover, 8–10 months)
description:
A specialist in identity, secure transactions, and digital services, IN Groupe is the global leader in secure identity and trust services. Every day, our 4,000 employees across 40 countries work to ensure that everyone has access to a reliable and secure identity, both in the physical and digital worlds. With our solutions and our international network of 10 R&D centers, we support governments and businesses in more than 130 countries.
   

  

 Joining IN Groupe means helping to shape the future of the identity and secure transaction market. Become part of our international teams — driven by innovation and proud to design solutions that make life easier and protect personal data for millions of people around the world.
   

  

****The role****
 We are looking for an experienced
 **HR Generalist** 
 to join our team in Sweden on a
 **fixed-term maternity cover (8–10 months)** 
 .
   

  

 This role is a temporary replacement for our fantastic colleague
 **Elin** 
 , who is going on parental leave. She has built strong relationships across the organization and set a high standard for HR support — so we are looking for someone who is excited to step in, continue her great work, and bring their own energy and experience to the role.
   

  

 You will be a key partner to managers and employees, supporting them in their day-to-day HR needs while also contributing to broader HR initiatives in an international environment.
   

  

 We are located in bright and newly renovated offices at Telefonplan, and we practice hybrid work.
   

  

****What you will do****
* Act as a trusted HR partner to managers and employees in Sweden
* Support and guide managers in all HR-related topics, from employee relations to development and performance
* Drive core HR processes such as recruitment, onboarding, performance management, and compensation reviews
* Ensure compliance with Swedish labor law and internal policies
* Handle employee relations matters with confidence and care
* Contribute to HR projects both locally and across Europe
* Help foster a positive, inclusive, and engaging workplace culture


****Who you are****
* You have solid experience in a broad HR role (HR Generalist or HRBP)
* You are comfortable working hands-on while also thinking strategically
* You have good knowledge of Swedish labor law
* You enjoy building relationships and supporting managers in their everyday challenges
* You are structured, pragmatic, and solution-oriented
* You are use to HR operations and all it's related tasks
* You communicate fluently in Swedish and unhindered English (don't worry, you speak better English than you think!)


****Why join us?****
* You will step into a well-functioning role with strong foundations (thanks to Elin!)
* You’ll be part of an international HR team where collaboration and support are key
* You’ll have the opportunity to make a real impact from day one
* You’ll gain experience in a global company working with meaningful, secure digital solutions


****Interested?****
 We’d love to hear from you — and are looking forward to welcoming someone who will carry Elin’s great work forward while adding their own touch.

title: Refunder
description:
*Who we are* 




*At Global Blue, we firmly believe that enhancing the shopping experience drives performance.* 




*Our mission is to seamlessly connect shoppers and brands worldwide by simplifying the shopping experience and boosting retailer performance. With over 40 years of industry expertise, we have pioneered Tax Free Shopping and expanded into the Payment and Post-Purchase business.* 




*As a technology partner, we lead our industries with innovative technology and data-driven insights, bringing unparalleled value at every touchpoint along the shopping journey. We support retailers in handling over 35 million Tax Free Shopping transactions every year and our payment partners in elevating the experience of more than 31 million transactions worldwide. Our post-purchase solutions also cater to the needs of over 47m e-commerce shoppers. Listed on the New York Stock Exchange, we generated €20bn Sales in Store and €311M revenue in FY 2022/23.* 




*Our diverse community of over 2,000 employees represent more than 80 nationalities across 53 countries. At Global Blue, we cultivate a culture of empowerment, encouraging our teams to collaborate and support one another.* 




*Together, we innovate, create, and strive towards a brighter future for the businesses we serve.* 




*With Global Blue, enjoy the journey.* 




  





 We are looking for two
 **Refunders** 
 for part-time and fixed-term positions to strengthen our Arlanda Airport Refund team from June to August 2026. The working hours in this role will be around 4 shifts per week, meaning about 80%. As a Refunder you will support the team in providing best possible customer experience while refunding VAT and controlling export of goods from Sweden at Arlanda Airport.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




 Refunder is not just a typical customer service role – it offers you the possibility to work in an international and dynamic environment with multiple cultures and languages when at the same time focusing on creating a great customer experience. The position also provides a great insight to the Tax Refund industry.
 



 Our Refund offices at the airport operate from Monday to Sunday from early morning to late evening. We are looking for someone who can work according to our opening hours during weekdays and weekends.
 



  





**Main duties and responsibilities** 




 As a Refunder you will be:
 


* Reviewing tax free forms for completeness, accuracy and compliance
* Applying good judgement and making on spot decisions on tax refund eligibility
* Controlling Travellers’ export of goods
* Processing customer payment transactions for eligible customers
* Following the Fraud Prevention and security policies
* Delivering professional customer experience with various Travellers
* Observing Global Blue policies, guidelines and preparing reports and statistics
* Supporting Sales team in improving issuing quality by giving feedback on anomalies
* Promoting locally agreed Global Blue initiatives
* Other office tasks



  





**Preferrable skills and competencies** 



* Fluency in English and some knowledge of Swedish
* Other languages are beneficial e.g. Chinese, Japanese or Korean
* Dedication to customer service and providing the best possible customer experience
* Ability to work under pressure
* Positive attitude towards colleagues & good team player
* Trustworthy to manage GDPR related data and customer payment transactions
* Experienced in using of Microsoft Office software
* Clean criminal record as per Airport requirements



  





**Experience** 




 Preferably with 1-2 years of work experience in customer service roles.
 



  





**How to apply?** 




 If you recognize yourself as the candidate we are looking for, don't hesitate to apply. Please send your application (with CV and cover letter) via our company website as soon as possible. We are reviewing the applications and having the discussions with the candidates continuously and will fill the position when we find a suitable candidate. At Global Blue we follow Tjänsteföretagen Gröna Collective Agreement and salary is determined according to it.
 



  





*At Global Blue, we foster career growth through internal mobility, a multicultural environment, and an Agile Working Model that supports work-life balance and team spirit. Committed to sustainability, we prioritize positive impacts for employees, clients, and communities. Guided by our 5 Ways of Working, we focus on client satisfaction, collaboration, innovation, and value creation. As forward thinkers, we embrace open dialogue, continuous learning, and shared success to shape the future while delivering tangible results.* 




*Feels like you? Explore further!* 




*Let’s write the future together: apply now!* 




*Follow us on Social Media!* 

 Global Blue

title: Starta din it‑resa som supporttekniker hos oss på Finansinspektionen
description:
Är du i början av din karriär och sugen på en spännande digitaliseringsresa? Kom till oss på Finansinspektionen (FI) och bidra med din kompetens genom att ansvara för användarstöd på FI. Vi är ett engagerat it-team som arbetar agilt för att leverera tjänster till FI:s medarbetare, allmänheten och företag under vår tillsyn. Nu förstärker vi vår it-organisation.
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 Som supporttekniker på avdelningen Applikationsdrift och it-support är du en del av teamet it-support som primärt ansvarar för användarstöd på FI. Teamet jobbar uteslutande on-site med högt fokus på att stötta och hjälpa FI:s medarbetare med applikationer och teknisk utrustning. Arbetet sker via ärendehanteringssystem, över telefon eller på plats. Du kommer också arbeta med felsökning och konfiguration av teknisk utrustning samt att stötta andra team på It. Du förväntas aktivt bidra till förbättringar av de processer och rutiner som styr och kvalitetssäkrar arbetet.
   

  

**Din utbildning och erfarenhet**
 Vi söker dig som
   

  

* har jobbat med ett ärendehanteringssystem
* har kunskaper om felsökning, konfiguration och installation av PC och Windows 11
* har kunskaper om iOS och MS Office
* har arbetat i Active Directory
* har någon typ av erfarenhet som supporttekniker on site, antingen via arbete eller praktik
* uttrycker dig väl på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.


 Det är meriterande om du
   

  

* har relevant eftergymnasial utbildning eller certifiering inom it
* har kunskaper i Powershell
* har arbetat med ärendehanteringssystemet Easit
* har kunskap om uppsättning och driftsättning av videokonferensrumsutrustning, i synnerhet Logitechs produkter.


**Om dig**
 I det här jobbet behöver du
   

  

* bidra till ett gott samarbete
* vara hjälpsam, flexibel och bemöta andra på ett vänligt och respektfullt sätt
* driva ditt arbete framåt och ta beslut inom ditt ansvarsområde
* vara effektiv även när uppgifterna är rutinartade.


**Om oss**
 Finansinspektionen (FI) bidrar till ett stabilt finansiellt system, välfungerande marknader, en hållbar utveckling och ett högt skydd för konsumenter. Vi erbjuder dig att arbeta med samhällsviktiga uppgifter, där du är med och påverkar den finansiella marknaden.
   

  

 På FI arbetar cirka 600 personer och våra värderingar präglas av att vi är engagerade, beslutsamma, målinriktade och hjälpsamma. Vår arbetsplats ligger centralt i Stockholm. Det finns även möjlighet att delvis arbeta på distans. För mer information om vår organisation: https://www.fi.se/sv/om-fi/organisation/
   

  

**Bra att veta**
 Vi baserar vår rekrytering på kompetens. Det innebär att vi noggrant definierar vilka kvalifikationer som efterfrågas och sedan utgår från dem genom hela rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  

 Vi arbetar aktivt för mångfald och likabehandling och välkomnar därför medarbetare med olika erfarenheter, bakgrunder och kompetenser.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 På FI arbetar vi aktivt för att vara en attraktiv arbetsgivare där du som medarbetare trivs och utvecklas. Läs mer om hur det är att jobba på FI och vad vi erbjuder: https://www.fi.se/sv/om-fi/arbeta-pa-fi/vi-erbjuder/https://www.fi.se/sv/om-fi/lediga-jobb/vi-erbjuder/
   

  

 En anställning på FI kan innebära att säkerhetsprövning och registerkontroll görs enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen.
   

  

**Sök jobbet**
 Välkommen med din ansökan som ska innehålla cv och relevanta intyg eller examensbevis.
   

  

 Vi avböjer all hjälp med rekrytering och annonsering.
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Tillsvidareanställning som inleds med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
   

  

**Kontaktperson:** 
 Joakim Sandberg, avdelningschef, 08-408 980 93
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 2026-04-10

title: Project Manager - Performance Marketing
description:
**We are seeking a Project Manager to lead and oversee our client projects mainly within performance marketing.** 




  





 Vekst is a digital agency that develops digital strategies, creates operational action plans, and executes measurable, high-impact campaigns. We specialize in driving performance for large, global B2B companies. The combination of our strategic depth and tactical expertise allows us to deliver solutions that make a difference for our clients.
 








**The role** 
 .
 



 We are now seeking a Project Manager to lead and oversee our client projects mainly within performance marketing, ensuring smooth delivery, resource management, and financial efficiency.
 



  





 As a Project Manager, you will be responsible for planning, executing, and following up on client projects. You will ensure that resources are effectively allocated, budgets are maintained, and project outcomes align with client goals. You’ll be working closely mainly with our client directors and specialists within performance marketing, but also with content specialists and analytic specialists depending on the projects you lead. You’ll play a key role in the operational and financial success of our projects.
 



  





**Key responsibilities.** 



* **Resource Allocation** 
 : Plan and allocate resources across projects to ensure efficient and high-quality delivery.
* **Project planning** 
 : Manage project plans, timelines and tasks in our project management system in collaboration with the Operations Manager.
* **Budget tracking** 
 : Monitor and manage project budgets, particularly for media costs, ensuring accuracy and alignment with client goals.
* **Invoicing** 
 : Manage the invoicing process, ensuring accurate and timely billing for all projects.
* **Profitability monitoring** 
 : Analyse project profitability and identify areas for improvement.
* **Project follow-up** 
 : Track and evaluate project progress, providing updates and insights to both internal teams and clients.



  





**About you.** 




 To thrive in this role, you need to be highly organised, detail-oriented, and proactive. Your ability to manage multiple projects, collaborate across teams, and keep a strong focus on both operational and financial performance will be key to your success.
 



  





**Requirements.** 



* Advanced knowledge of digital advertising platforms (e.g., Meta, Google Ads, LinkedIn) is a prerequisite for this role.
* Experience managing projects, preferably at an agency and within digital marketing.
* Familiarity with project management and resource allocation tools (e.g., Forecast, Harvest, Monday.com, Roughly Right or similar).
* Advanced skills in tracking budgets, managing media costs, and ensuring project profitability.
* Excellent organisational and communication skills with a proactive and solution-focused mindset.
* Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams and stakeholders.



  





**Location** 
 : You will be based in Göteborg and in this role, you will travel to our different offices and client locations regularly. Our clients are mainly based in the Nordics and Central Europe.
 



  





**Questions.** 




 We do not accept applications via email due to GDPR and to ensure that everyone is fairly included in the process. If you have any questions about the role or Vekst, we are happy to answer them, and you are more than welcome to reach out to
 **Peter Stopp, Hiring Manager, phone number: 0708-790 490.** 




*We are working with an ongoing screening and interview process, so don’t wait to submit your application. We look forward to reading it!*

title: Senior Analytics Engineer to Alva Labs
description:
**TL;DR**
 Alva Labs is looking for a
 **Senior Analytics Engineer** 
 with strong SQL skills and experience building data pipelines and analytics models. In this role, you’ll design data models, build ELT pipelines in BigQuery, ensure data quality, and enable data that drives product and business decisions.
   

  

**Why Alva?**
 At Alva Labs, they’re redefining how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science. They’re building an AI-first Hiring System: the only platform companies need to define roles, assess candidates, make confident decisions, and continuously improve their hiring.
   

  

 Instead of fragmented tools, they’re creating one cohesive system designed to make hiring more accurate, fair, and scalable. Leading companies across Europe already trust them to improve the quality and inclusiveness of their hiring.
   

  

 The team in Stockholm is small and ambitious, with a strong culture of ownership, velocity, and low-ego collaboration. They care deeply about their craft and about each other, and they’re driven to build something that lasts.
   

  

 Joining now means being part of an exciting growth journey as Alva Labs scales their product, explores new AI-powered capabilities, and brings fair hiring to millions more people.
   

  

**What Alva Labs Is Looking For**
* Strong technical background in data architecture, ETL processes, and data modeling
* Proficiency in SQL and experience with Python
* Experience implementing data governance practices and monitoring data quality
* Strong problem-solving skills
* Collaborative mindset — you enjoy working cross-functionally with product, design, engineers, and researchers


**Bonus If You Have**
* A track record of leading data-driven projects and initiatives
* Experience developing and executing data strategies aligned with business objectives


 Most importantly, they’re looking for someone passionate about enabling data-driven decision-making and continuously improving data infrastructure and processes.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
**In one sentence:** 
 Build data pipelines that power high-quality analytics.
   

  

* Build scalable data models and optimize ELT pipelines to power dashboards and self-serve analytics
* Ensure data quality through testing, governance, and documentation
* Collaborate closely with engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders
* Continuously improve tools and processes for scalability, performance, and reliability


**Tech Stack**
* Data Pipelines & Models: BigQuery, dbt, synq, dlt
* Dashboards & Visualization: Metabase, Lightdash
* Data Platform: Google Cloud Platform, Cloud run, Docker, terraform


**Questions and contact**
 Alva Labs is working with Amendo in this recruitment process. If you have any questions regarding this specific role, please contact Business Area Manager Johanna Hallenberg at johanna.hallenberg@amendo.se. Interviews are conducted on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. Please submit your application in English, as it is the company language at Alva Labs
   

  

**About Amendo**
 Amendo is one of Sweden’s leading recruitment and consulting company, with a clear focus on accounting, banking, finance, insurance, IT, and tech roles and expertise. We help companies grow and people develop - we are your trusted and dedicated talent partner.
   

  

 Follow us on
 **Linkedin** 
 ,
 **Instagram** 
 and
 **Facebook** 
 .
   

  

 #IT
   

  

 Amendo har arbetat med framtidens kompetens sedan 2001 och är landets ledande konsult- och rekryteringsföretag inom ekonomi, bank, finans, försäkring, IT och tech. Vi är ett expansivt bolag verksamma över hela landet med lokala kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Örnsköldsvik.
   

  

 Vår vision att utveckla världen med kompetens når vi genom att arbeta nära våra kunder och kandidater, vara nyfikna på omvärlden - och hela tiden vilja framåt.
   

  

 Läs mer på amendo.se.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description:
**Senior Data Scientist for advanced AI industrial software** 




  





 We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist in Sweden or in Norway (where you are located is up to you, but note that the application goes via Finn.no in Norway).
 



  





 We are a technology company focused on applying advanced data science and AI to solve complex problems in heavy industry, including energy, maritime, manufacturing, renewables, and infrastructure.
 



  





 Our work combines deep expertise in industry verticals, with modern software engineering, AI, and machine learning to deliver products and solutions systems that generate measurable value for our customers.
 



 We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to lead and grow our data science capability.
 



  





 This role combines technical leadership, customer-facing solution development in industrial environments, and occasional applied research.
 



  





 You will lead a team of data scientists / applied AI engineers building production-grade AI systems that integrate machine learning, physics-informed modelling, and generative AI.
 



 You will work closely with customers, domain experts, and software engineers to translate industrial challenges into scalable AI solutions.
 



  





 The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise with strong leadership and stakeholder engagement skills, and thrives at the intersection of applied AI research, industrial engineering, and real-world deployment.
 



  





**Responsibilities (“What will you work on?”)** 




**Leadership & team development** 



* Build, mentor, and grow a high-performing data science and applied AI team
* Foster a culture of technical excellence, experimentation, and pragmatic delivery
* Support recruitment, onboarding, and professional development of data scientist



  





**Applied AI & technical direction** 



* Lead the development of machine learning, physics-informed models, and GenAI-powered systems applied to industrial data
* Drive adoption of modern AI architectures, including LLM systems, AI agents, and hybrid ML/physics models
* Define standards for production-grade AI systems, including monitoring, evaluation, and lifecycle management
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to integrate data science capabilities into scalable software products



  





**Customer engagement & solution development** 



* Work directly with customers and subject matter experts (SMEs) in the asset-heavy industry to identify and scope high-value AI use cases
* Lead the design and delivery of end-to-end data science solutions, from exploration to production deployment
* Communicate technical results clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Contribute to pre-sales activities, including workshops, technical discussions, and proposal development



  





**Thought leadership** 



* Represent the company externally through technical publications, conference talks, and industry engagement
* Help shape the company’s strategy in industrial AI, GenAI applications, and physics-informed modelling
* Further develop our already high standards for quality of process and deliverables in our customer engagements



  





**Required qualifications (“Who are we looking for?”)** 




**Academic** 



* Master’s degree or PhD in computer science, physics, applied mathematics, statistics, engineering, or related field
* Strong foundation in statistical modelling, machine learning, and scientific computing



  





**Technical Skills and Experience** 



* Applied Machine Learning & Data Science
* Proven experience building and deploying production machine learning systems
* Strong background in statistical modelling, time-series analysis, and predictive modelling
* Experience applying data science to real-world industrial systems



  





**Physics-Informed and Hybrid Modelling** 



* Experience with modelling complex systems using first-principles approaches, physics-informed machine learning, or hybrid physics/ML techniques
* Ability to combine domain knowledge and physics constraints with data-driven methods to build robust, interpretable models
* Comfort working with industrial process data, sparse labels, noisy sensors and systems which physical intuition matters as much as statistical methods



  





**Generative AI & Modern AI Engineering** 



* Hands-on experience or strong familiarity with the current GenAI frameworks (langchain, crewai etc.), LLM-based tooling, concepts such as agentic workflows or AI-assisted pipelines
* Familiarity with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) concepts and how they can be applied to structured knowledge systems



  





**Engineering & Software Development** 



* Strong coding skills in Python
* Experience with the core Python data science ecosystem (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, Scikit-learn)
* Experience with time-series data handling and analysis at scale
* Familiarity with deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch or TensorFlow is a plus
* Experience building and deploying production ML systems using MLOps practices, experiment tracking, model versioning, monitoring
* Experience building production systems using tools such as Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP)
* Experience with APIs and microservices, CI/CD workflows



  





**Collaboration & Communication** 



* Demonstrated ability to work effectively with engineers, product teams, and domain experts
* Strong communication skills and ability to explain technical concepts clearly
* Experience working directly with customers or internal stakeholders



  





**Leadership** 



* Proven experience leading data science teams or technical groups
* Track record of delivering AI systems into production



  





**We Offer** 



* Opportunity to work on real-world industrial problems with measurable impact
* Highly talented and collaborative colleagues across engineering, product, and data science
* Exposure to cutting-edge AI technologies including GenAI and hybrid modelling
* Flexible and autonomous work environment
* Competitive compensation and benefits package
* Opportunities for professional development and international collaboration



  





 We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company.
 



  





 We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status
 



  





 Location can be Oslo, Norway or Stockholm, Sweden. Travel | Up to 10%
 



  





**Disclaimer** 




 This job description is intended to describe the general nature and level of the work being performed by individuals in the position.
 



  





 It is not intended to include every job duty and responsibility specific to the position.
 



  





 Arundo reserves the right to amend and change responsibilities to meet business and organisational needs as necessary.

title: Data Platform Developer inom Data Provisioning till Handelsbanken
description:
Vill du vara med och forma bankens dataförmåga och arbeta i en central roll med stort inflytande? Vi söker dig som vill utveckla och optimera vår dataplattform i samarbete med engagerade kollegor.
   

  

**Ditt team**
 Du blir del av ett tvärfunktionellt team som består av utvecklare, Agil Product Owner och Team Coach. Tillsammans jobbar vi för att leverera funktionalitet som stärker Handelsbankens dataförmåga. Utöver teamet samarbetar du nära med Data Analysts, Data Governance Specialists, Arkitekter och Data Engineers.
